name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z777t3rol503q2o2dg738mh99glhh59lmrho27k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5im2p30cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpm4t72mhgj9phlmiq32t9gseom1dph66o74c9mcgojaclj6lpn8orncdom4p30cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6oj0e8q6cc5n6dj3fc5lclp2bs)
| This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7ommtcabrs4mvjoag775npifs6h7kl1vg3gdl20_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5im2p30cph2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcvjpnuepj70dps66k260hsg9ofi9idbm2qc4o2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5im2p30cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z75u5ta92h4ot4t7sau9umd477027abtulvh4fi8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5im2p30cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Michael Letts Proud Police officer and founder of InVest USA | | InVest is a 501c3 nonprofit organization, your donation is tax deductible to the extent provided by law. | | If you don ́t want to receive any more alerts from us, please .

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing twitter and we need your help
body:
My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Te
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjfu1n2ipgk8sv0l67p548n694pik5kln1plf8qo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uqpbfcjkcmo63c3ks9i7dc75m4q7ct9kc5qmcpblmsrb7crn68rb4d1gcpqbctpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchjcoqm9ddicur64phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cpgmaob0c9h649fg)
[](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties – _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate – and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes—out of school—during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation – and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) [**DONATE**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-AAN&utm_content=aan) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr6ogamtqktv2kvicm1k4movgndq2icfm3cpls38_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5im2o32c9h2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2a1lk3857a7neucshllcv014pk95427abbridbo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cpgmaob0c9h649fg)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: The Beauty of Genesis
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWU0pLWHQN

Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story:
Reading Biblical Narratives," is still available online for free!
In this six-lecture
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWU0pLWHQN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing
with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course,
"The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is still
available online for free!

In this six-lecture course, you'll explore
some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex
relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about
divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale
College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught this
text to undergraduate students here at the College for over 15
years.

This course aims to deepen a student's
theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the
literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and
introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Larry P.
Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at
Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher
education.

Then, Professor Jackson explains the four
relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and
creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the
narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac,
Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course is perfect for personal study,
viewing with your family, or for use in small groups such as
Bible studies and book clubs
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59553309:WU0pLWHQN:m:3:2532013465:B9F9C23FDC7E2962FCB77208B3ED3C2A:r

Please use the secure link above to explore
the beauty of the first book of the Bible with "The Genesis
Story: Reading Biblical Narratives."

Kyle Murnen, '09

Director of Online Learning

Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWU0pLWHQN

name: American Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8408%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fMliSQbBccK0QqGcxn8grw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12423%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FoNSorOOtHGLl6FHjsk6gQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12423%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FoNSorOOtHGLl6FHjsk6gQ&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12424%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8ELM2Grrk5KbdJvrPVzG1g&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8408%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fMliSQbBccK0QqGcxn8grw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8408%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2fMliSQbBccK0QqGcxn8grw&sysid=1)

The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just announced that VA-02 is a frontline district, which means it's officially one of the most important races in the entire _country. _We can't afford to fall short. name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Steil on Sean Hannity - Biden’s Failed Economic Policies Are Crushing Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, Did you see my interview on Sean Hannity's radio show? I highlighted how Biden's economic policies are directly and negatively affecting Americans.
Hi Peter,**I joined Sean Hannity 's radio show to highlight Biden's failed economic policies. Listen [HERE](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijdtht-idtjvlhlh-r/).**Biden and the rest of the Democrats are destroying the budgets of families, workers, and seniors. The consequences of their out of control spending are hitting everyday Americans the hardest through rising costs, skyrocketing energy prices, and bare shelves in the grocery store.[**If you are able, please donate before our end of the month deadline so we can help educate voters on the failure of big government, socialist policies.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijdtht-idtjvlhlh-y/)**If we can successfully show the American people that the Democrat 's one-party rule in Washington is destroying the economy, we will be able to take back the House and stop the socialist agenda of Biden and Pelosi.**Thank you,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijdtht-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijdtht-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijdtht-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijdtht-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zijdtht-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

body:
As Team Hayes launches into our Congresswoman’s third re-election campaign, we wanted to keep you updated on what we’re keeping an eye on at the very beginning of this election year. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41187835/327711476/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzQ3MmE1Zi0wMzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1N7oz5eXztx0c3lkJk8S3skg0EWTTPg91Bi7zDoSxrM=&emci=6c1e1952-4a80-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=07472a5f-0381-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15529135) | New Year, New Election, New Challenges. **As Team Hayes launches into our Congresswoman’s third re-election campaign, we wanted to keep you updated on what we’re keeping an eye on at the very beginning of this election year.** First, Connecticut is still finalizing its new Congressional maps. The State Supreme Court just heard arguments on the Special Master’s proposed maps, and we’ll hear in the next few weeks about where exactly the lines of the 5th District will fall. _So we have to be ready to adapt and adjust depending on the final outcome._ Second, with the re-election campaign getting underway, we know nasty mailers, opposition advertising, and mistruths meant to fuel partisan divides are headed our way. _We have seen it all and we expect this year to be the worst yet. We will defend against the divisive attacks and focus on Jahana’s work for the next 9 months._ [**But to do so, we need YOUR support to get our communications out above the propaganda no matter where our new district falls. clean_body: As Team Hayes launches into our Congresswoman’s third re-election campaign, we wanted to keep you updated on what we’re keeping an eye on at the very beginning of this election year. | | New Year, New Election, New Challenges. As Team Hayes launches into our Congresswoman’s third re-election campaign, we wanted to keep you updated on what we’re keeping an eye on at the very beginning of this election year. First, Connecticut is still finalizing its new Congressional maps. The State Supreme Court just heard arguments on the Special Master’s proposed maps, and we’ll hear in the next few weeks about where exactly the lines of the 5th District will fall. So we have to be ready to adapt and adjust depending on the final outcome. Second, with the re-election campaign getting underway, we know nasty mailers, opposition advertising, and mistruths meant to fuel partisan divides are headed our way. We have seen it all and we expect this year to be the worst yet. We will defend against the divisive attacks and focus on Jahana’s work for the next 9 months. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Jahana’s re-election race is set to be one of the closest in the nation – and with Democrats only holding on to the House Majority by a few seats, the outcome in a toss-up district like CT-05 could determine who will be in control of Congress for the second half of President Biden’s first term. name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6772%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=V%2buTfgyq9RjXyAWBf7YL4w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69741%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zfHPvaHrhBOFmgWgeLNxow&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69742%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Gf9iBO3h6EoHHQwnaItBA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69743%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WiJH%2bLQd5sitT4CUqOc7MA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41191466/327723745/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2254-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGYxZDA3My0wYzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIuLArf1B4MuL4GKxoh7D5rBFosWYd8Go0gdT35dHH0=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow .12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41191467/327723746/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2254-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGYxZDA3My0wYzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oIuLArf1B4MuL4GKxoh7D5rBFosWYd8Go0gdT35dHH0=)**

subject: Outrage Over Survival Food
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor 4Patriots.
---
|
# Outrage Over Survival Food
According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means your family can become malnourished...

Well, I decided not to worry anymore.Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by most stores.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.).Currently 4Patriots survival food kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that protects you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high quality survival food without any fillers or poor-quality "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are made right in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are - just a **fraction of what some other brands charge**.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's military-grade sturdy stuff and can stand up to the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food has a **shelf life of up to 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using the most compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. I tried 'em and I think they **taste as good or better than any other survival food I've ever had**. And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# Last Time, Their Best-Selling 3-Month Kits _Sold Out_ Completely In Just 4 Days... Today They Have Them Back In Stock!
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._NDPGAEYPHcTgUKhg)**Since they finally have these best-selling kits back in stock...** They're going to load you up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) when you get yours today. Just look at all you get with this special:**It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit.** It retails for over $800, but during this special the standard retail pricing goes out the window.So you spare a **_ton_** and they're just getting warmed up, because...[**You also get $478 worth of FREE Gifts!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and they are a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today.That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through any short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of their top-rated items on our website.So you'll get those 2 complimentary 72-hour Survival Food Kits AND..._(Hold on to your hat, folks)_**FREE Bonus #2:** They're also going to give you their **Victory Garden Seed Collection.** Each Victory Garden Seed Collection contains survival seeds from 8 varieties of garden favorites. You'll harvest them again and again, season after season. And stored cold, they'll be good for years.**FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos.**FREE Bonus #4:** They're also going to give you their **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these books are valued at $80 but they're yours free as a thank you for your purchase.But that's not all because you also get...**FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids. Normally valued at $19.95, you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE.**FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit.**FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food.But we're still not done because you also get...**FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF Your Next Purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get our best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! Get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan. It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal.But we want to sweeten the pot more. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get...**FREE Bonus #9:** You get **FREE Shipping and Handling.** Last but not least, you'll get FREE shipping on your 3-Month Survival Food Kit and all of your bonus items today. It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._guT-Vfdiw7xIoSqQGwQ)** Isn't that great?The best part is...The peace of mind that comes from having a survival food stockpile shouldn't exclusively be for well-off Americans. [**So you're getting huge savings today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._aqoD67R9w)**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan.** Just the best-tasting, made-in-America survival food protection without the sticker shock.**Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._F2mE0q6Rmwv-0ChIcrlw)First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. And you can even keep the complimentary gifts for giving your survival food a try.Second, if you open your 4Patriots meals anytime in the next 25 years and find your food has spoiled or gone bad, you can return the entire stockpile and they will still **return triple your purchase amount.** That's how confident they are that this food will stay delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._3bQx89chBs3-HQ)** You need to get 'er done today.Why?Because if you don't [take action](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-G1E7X1mw) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry and you'll feel powerless.But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [imagine how much better you'll feel right away](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit.**As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do.**[Grab Your Kit And All Your Gifts Today Before They're All Gone](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._p4aSTKDgdRDw)** To your survival,

Frank Bates

| **Carol B.** Hey Frank, I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight ..... IT WAS DELICIOUS... Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---

Sure, sometimes it is for a few days and I pray that it is not longer than that for you or me or anyone we know. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good although if it is that dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. Get some water, too, and something to heat it with. We made some of this product and had family and friends over for them to taste and they all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.

It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This probably the cheapest survival food I have found and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor 4Patriots. | Outrage Over Survival Food According to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages.Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. | | Bumping this message from Tom!

[We are about $12,000 away from reaching our additional goal to raise $20,000 by the end of the month. Will you please make a donation right away to help us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41193629/327733501/-1267168964?amount=15&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_220129_1_3&refcode2=5fb7347b-1181-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmI3MzQ3Yi0xMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VQjmneaOVF7BM14m1aZZeQu0LJGHT00BeV2ZnfJgKfs=)

**_— Begin Forwarded Message —_**

Folks,

As you know, I won by the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat in 2020, which already made our district a top priority for the GOP. Now that we know our district map, two things are clear. We still face a huge challenge. And our district has emerged as the one true wild card race in New Jersey. That’s why, as more Republicans continue to enter the race, I need your help once again!

We’ve been able to achieve so much in Congress, thanks to your support in defending our House majority in 2020. We rescued the American economy in 2020, kept our promise to lower health care costs for millions of people, passed a historic infrastructure bill, and created tax credits that cut child poverty in half.

[To keep delivering, we have to win tough races like mine, so we’ve set a goal of raising an additional $20,000 by the end of the month on Monday. With the constant attacks from the GOP, our redrawn district, and more Republican candidates coming out of the woodwork, we need all the help we can get. The choice in November is clear: between the party of infrastructure and the party of insurrection; between those focused on creating jobs and those hell-bent on creating chaos. I look forward to running with a party that welcomes patriotic Americans of differing policy views, while always putting our country first.

I want to give you an inside look at our campaign.

| I want to give you an inside look at our campaign.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: About those gross drug ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220129&amount=28 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220129&amount=28]
Friend,
It’s hard to watch TV without seeing a truly astonishing number of ads for prescription drugs. At this point, it’s second nature – you’re watching Jeopardy, and during the commercial breaks, there come the smiling actors carrying out a variety of happy everyday activities while a voiceover reads out a laundry list of potential (but often scary or downright explicit) side effects.
Well, those ads aren’t just an annoying intrusion by Big Pharma into your living room. These pharmaceutical corporations actually get a tax break when they run them.
For too long, drug companies have been able to deduct the billions they spend on advertising from their taxes. The ads are aimed at getting you to ask your doctor for the brand-new drug you just saw on TV, when in reality, the generic version is much cheaper.
And it gets worse. Some of these companies are actually spending more on advertising per year than they are on research for new, live-saving medications.
We’re one of the only countries that lets drug companies advertise directly to consumers – and they’re getting tax breaks for those ads. That’s why I recently introduced the No Tax Breaks for Drug Ads Act, a bill to close that tax loophole that allows this behavior for good. The excessive cost of healthcare is one of the main reasons I decided to run for Congress, and it’s completely insane to let massive drug companies advertise their products to you at your expense.
The system has been stacked against the American people for decades, and the most vulnerable among us -- the folks we should be helping like our seniors -- are the ones left paying the price. It’s time we fight back, and this bill aims to do just that.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220129&amount=28]
Elissa

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfa7a0tvqbhk7b7pa5qtgc1d621uaqau49r22dj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5hm1ob4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4psoo9v8od3dbrqbcpqv1b6v6vd1dcd0pfgsko0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5hm1ob4chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg9rj0n73kff9jhpq26f22a2ij0gbvtgu0av77co_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5hm1ob4chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

|

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Voting rights: Death by 1,000 cuts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Our voting rights are being stripped. It's not all happening at once, but rather it's a death by 1,000 cuts.

In Georgia, another battleground state, officials in one rural county are closing all but one polling place and have eliminated Sunday voting, which is popular with Black churchgoers. They're dismantling county election boards and kicking Democrats off of them.

Since President Biden took office, there has been an avalanche of other voting restrictions in Texas, Arizona, and Florida — no surprises there — in an effort to control the midterm election outcomes.

But in Pennsylvania, the birthplace of democracy, it's happening here, too. We are up against not only politicians who want to create chaos and doubt in our electoral system through expensive and pointless recounts, but terrible gerrymandering schemes that aim to squash our rights and silence those of us who face the greatest barriers to voting.

We need to step up NOW.

Please help us with a donation TODAY so that we can meet our end-of-month goal to keep this movement thriving. We have to organize and rise to meet these challenges, and we can't do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012922]

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012922&amount=10]
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012922&amount=20]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012922&amount=50]
Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=012922]

Every dollar helps. Thank you for everything you do.

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

One of the most important issues in Kansas today is expanding Medicare, which not only would help thousands of people better access healthcare, but would also create **_thousands of new jobs in the state._** Expanding Medicare would fuel a **_stronger Kansas economy and promote healthy communities_** , yet our opponent is not concerned with this at all.

It’s truly time to show up for a better vision for Kansas. I am tired of the deeply partisan politics that prevent necessary services to the people of this state — I know that if you’re with me, you must be too.

[Will you step up and join me in supporting Mark’s campaign? **Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

I am tired of the deeply partisan politics that prevent necessary services to the people of this state — I know that if you’re with me, you must be too. = Thank you, Brandi | | | = Meet Mark: Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years. ** Paid for by Holland for Kansas Holland for Kansas PO Box 171236 Kansas City, KS 66117 United States

name: John Gomez  - Chabot for Congress
subject: Chabot for Congress - Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
The latest from Steve Chabot on the campaign trail!
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-r/)
# Update from the Campaign Trail 1/28/22
Good evening,It's been another busy few weeks on the campaign trail for Team Chabot. Our team has been working hard to ensure that Congressman Chabot is re-elected, and we do our part to fire Nancy Pelosi, take back the House, and put our country on the right track. **_Steve on the Trail_** Last Friday, 1/21, Congressman Chabot met and prayed with constituents from the 1st District who were in Washington D.C. for this year's March for Life. Over the course of Congressman Chabot's career, he has been a strong supporter of the right to life and will continue to be for as long as he is in Congress. On Wednesday, 1/26, Steve spoke at the West Side "We the People" event at The Farm in Delhi. There were over 150 excited people in attendance. The amount of energy in the room to take back our country from the disastrous rule of Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer. Great to see so many friends, old and new! Earlier today, Congressman Chabot toured the construction site of the new Hampton Inn & Suites on Harrison Ave. We started the visit with a roundtable discussion of the difficulties that projects like this are facing. We talked about issues with the supply chain, labor shortages, and bureaucratic red tape. Owner Shaun Pan and his partners ended the visit by giving the Congressman a tour of the hotel. Once open, this will be a great addition to the West Side. _Greg Landsman - Defunding the Police_Point five of this week's blog was that Republicans support law enforcement and keeping our streets safe. As the Washington Free Beacon reported this week, our likely Democrat opponent for Congress pushed to defund the Cincinnati Police Department.In the summer of 2020, Greg Landsman pushed to pull $200,000 from the Cincinnati Police Department's budget. WLWT's reporter stated that this was, by definition, defunding the police. Not only did Landsman push to defund the police, his plan was to weaponize the money against CPD by putting the funds into the Citizens Police Complaint Board.Landman's radical proposal came as Cincinnati was experiencing record levels of homicides and violent crime. Our community does not need a dangerous radical like Greg Landsman in Washington D.C.Read the full article on Landsman's push to defund the police by the Free Beacon [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-y/). [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-j/) _This Week 's Blog_This week's blog post is about 10 of the most important principles that Republicans stand for as we head into the upcoming midterm elections.Read the blog post [here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-t/). We recently passed the first 365 days of the Biden Presidency. That occasion was marked with soaring inflation, rising crime, an ongoing crisis at the southern border, and lingering effects of the debacle in Afghanistan. We must do all that we can to take back the House and Senate in 2022 and put an end to this madness.Have a great weekend!Yours truly,John GomezCampaign Manager - Chabot for Congress [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-i/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-u/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-o/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-n/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-p/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-trkuxiy-l-z) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. [Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-trkuxiy-961825B2-kujkulhluu-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-trkuxiy-kujkulhluu-e/)

Good morning, team,

I just saw a message from my team asking me to reach out about our end-of-month fundraising goal.

So I’m typing out a quick email before I read the newspaper — and before my breakfast gets cold.

Our race has gotten a bit tougher, so we had to raise our end-of-month fundraising goal this month because it’s crucial that we have the resources we need to win. Republicans are targeting this seat, and they think they can win. If our grassroots supporters come together, we can send a message to National Republicans and Dark Money groups that we’re a strong team that can’t be beaten.

[**I know we’re a strong team, and I’m asking you to help me prove it. If you’re able, will you please chip in $10, $15, or whatever you can afford to our end-of-month goal today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41196822/327747552/954943298?refcode=em_fr_2022.01.29_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzE2NTAxNS0xNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYAxKwoJMp4cpkn9DBi3Mlq29ZRU91HyiST88VsydAc=)

I’m getting back to my breakfast, but thank you for being a part of this team. Folks like you understand how important it is that we keep this seat blue, and I’m asking for your help. [**I know you probably have a lot to do this weekend (I do too), but I’m asking for your help now: Please, chip in any amount to our campaign before you start your weekend.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41196824/327747608/954943298?refcode=em_fr_2022.01.29_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzE2NTAxNS0xNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lYAxKwoJMp4cpkn9DBi3Mlq29ZRU91HyiST88VsydAc=)

Have a great weekend,

_Tom_

body:
This governor’s race will be the most expensive in Maryland history.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41197259/327749641/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220129-b1_fr_actives-TK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220129-b1_fr_actives-TK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220129&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=TK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=ccf728ca-1681-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2Y3MjhjYS0xNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JQ2cq5TJ1DCbuDYiZz9dqCfulZaBdRy-qcO2Dn4G5Gg=)

| **Peter – with our January fundraising deadline just two days away, we have some good news and bad news.** **Good news:** This race for Maryland governor is predicted to be Democrats’ best chance to flip a state from red to blue, and our campaign is drawing attention and grabbing headlines across the state. John’s message and plans for Maryland are resonating with voters, and our massive fundraising haul earlier this month garnered national attention! **Bad news:** This governor’s race will be the most expensive in Maryland history, and our end-of-month fundraising deadline is in just two days. name: Deb McGrath
subject: Congress must defend reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, this impacts all of us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41198237/327753922/1035481494?refcode=ea.1734b053-1881-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.1734b053-1881-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzM0YjA1My0xODgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UOCYrPJVpQy_SsILg3UkDM75K-AGnWIFo9YE_Dk8XxM=&emci=3af6b7fb-5280-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1734b053-1881-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)
---
| | **Women have a right to privacy and deserve the freedom to make their own medical decisions.** But as we pass the 49th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , reproductive rights have never been more at risk, Peter.

If _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned, a 172-year-old law making abortion a felony in Wisconsin could go back into effect. With the Wisconsin GOP controlling our legislature, any attempts to repeal this ban are unlikely to advance. We need Democrats in Congress to take action and codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law.

I will protect reproductive rights from unconstitutional government intrusion. If we work together, I will be the unwavering advocate for women's rights western Wisconsin needs in Congress. I am a woman, and understand how personal, and yet universal, this right is.

**[If you are with me, please chip in $10 to help meet our January end-of-month goal so we can keep organizing and win this critical open body:
**_The Providence Journal_ : Langevin retirement fuels RI GOP's hopes for U.S. House seat** "Has Democrat Jim Langevin's decision not to seek reelection to the U.S. House given Rhode Island Republicans the best shot they've had in three decades at winning a seat in Congress? They think so."
---
Peter,

National Republicans like Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy seek to divide America, undermine democracy, and appeal to the most chaotic, hateful, and dangerous elements of their party. Their top priority is reclaiming the House majority in November, and history is on their side.

History has proven time and time again that the party of a sitting president is at a disadvantage when in midterm elections. Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the House majority -- **and Rhode Island Republicans think the open seat in our second Congressional District can be one of them.**

Seth just announced he's running for Congress because it's critical we prevent the Republicans from taking back this seat in Rhode Island. But he needs your help.

[**Will you chip in $10 or more to help us launch Seth's congressional campaign to keep RI-02 blue before our end-of-month deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41198269/327754003/1121428702?refcode=em22_220128_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_EOM1_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzM0YjA1My0xODgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=psPXxF38wtCI5D8T0BqsU3ju4fno3ajsf2ZTZGndqOE=)

Team Seth

clean_body: The Providence Journal : Langevin retirement fuels RI GOP's hopes for U.S. House seat "Has Democrat Jim Langevin's decision not to seek reelection to the U.S. House given Rhode Island Republicans the best shot they've had in three decades at winning a seat in Congress? They think so." Peter, National Republicans like Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy seek to divide America, undermine democracy, and appeal to the most chaotic, hateful, and dangerous elements of their party. Their top priority is reclaiming the House majority in November, and history is on their side. History has proven time and time again that the party of a sitting president is at a disadvantage when in midterm elections. Republicans only need to flip five seats to take back the House majority -- and Rhode Island Republicans think the open seat in our second Congressional District can be one of them. Seth just announced he's running for Congress because it's critical we prevent the Republicans from taking back this seat in Rhode Island. But he needs your help. = Thank you, Team Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

Friend, It’s been awhile since I’ve shared photos and highlights from the campaign trail. [**Before I ask if you can chip in to help us reach our January fundraising goal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41198335/327754131/284315840?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220129eom4_GV_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGE1NDU2NS0xODgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Au3gPWI1WhvQMUwR0NGU2slDxHJykgTHRwIqVI9-FQ4=), I hope you’ll let me explain what our campaign has been up to in 2022, and why your donation matters more than ever. **On Monday, we face two critical deadlines in one day: our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and our deadline to collect hundreds of petition signatures from Democratic voters in NM-02 to get me on the ballot for the June 7 primary election.** This is much less time than campaigns usually have, so we have had our work cut out for us! clean_body: | = Friend, It’s been awhile since I’ve shared photos and highlights from the campaign trail. =, I hope you’ll let me explain what our campaign has been up to in 2022, and why your donation matters more than ever. On Monday, we face two critical deadlines in one day: our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and our deadline to collect hundreds of petition signatures from Democratic voters in NM-02 to get me on the ballot for the June 7 primary election. This is much less time than campaigns usually have, so we have had our work cut out for us! But since January began, my team and I — and some amazing volunteers — have hit the ground running, knocking on doors, making phone calls, and holding petition collection events across the district to reach our goal. We started gathering signatures in my community at the Las Cruces Farmers Market, and went on to Anthony, Albuquerque, Belen, Silver City, Hobbs, and Mesilla to name a few. | = We met up with wonderful supporters in Grant County who have stepped up in a big way to help us get on the ballot. = I was grateful to the good folks of Socorro who came out to meet me and sign petitions. = It was great to visit the South Valley of Albuquerque and meet with community leaders. I’m excited to learn more about ABQ’s west side and South Valley neighborhoods, issues, history and opportunities. I look forward to fighting for these communities in Congress. = And earlier this week, we held a trio of petition collection events back in Las Cruces. = Block by block and community by community, we are gearing up to give New Mexico’s 2nd District the representation it deserves. And it’s only possible through grassroots contributions from people like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you so much to everyone who believes in this campaign and is helping us get on the ballot! Your donations, volunteering efforts, petition signatures, and words of support are all so deeply appreciated. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsIe9CWHpN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osIe9CWHpN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/

For our
children,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isIe9CWHpN

name: FiveThirtyEight Update (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: NH “will likely decide control of the Senate”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
This is serious – _FiveThirtyEight_ is reporting that Maggie Hassan is at risk of losing. With our narrowest of narrow majorities, losing in New Hampshire would mean Democrats losing the Senate. **New Hampshire is the swingiest state on the map in 2022, and the GOP knows it.** That’s why they’ve spent more money attacking Maggie than on any other race in the country. And the attacks are working – a recent poll showed her TIED with a far-right Trump Republican. Our January deadline is just TWO days away, but our online fundraising has fallen off a cliff in the past few days. If we can’t turn our numbers around, and soon, it spells trouble for the rest of the year. **[Please, can you rush $5 or whatever you can to defend our Senate majority? Maggie Hassan is the most vulnerable Democrat in the country right now, and we really need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41199518/327761479/-1281091919?refcode=e20220129_538&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjVkODE3Zi0xYzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pq10rOOEC1mukdzHRLvZjnjMitkkbnd7f-l448lrGGQ=)** Thank you for your support! – Team Maggie

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: Here’s a peek into our fundraising this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our campaign is powered by lots of people chipping in what they can, when they can
#

Hey there! It’s Malcolm’s Finance Director, Catherine, here.
We’ll be closing the books on our January fundraising deadline shortly, so I wanted to give you this peek into our fundraising this month. Here’s what I see at the top of my dashboard:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41200114/327763368/-358086307?refcode2=9c3d1a31-1d81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220129-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzNkMWEzMS0xZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6hu30vDm3LeCUgx0QUIXZUTKyF2VGfBLmgaBpzvyHo=)
That’s a number I’m proud to share with you all — our average contribution of $28.69 is a testament to the power of our small-dollar, grassroots movement!
**Remember: Malcolm is not a self-funded candidate, and he’s not taking money from corporate PACs, either.**
That means our campaign is powered by lots of people chipping in what they can, when they can, including these generous folks:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41200115/327763370/-358086307?refcode2=9c3d1a31-1d81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220129-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzNkMWEzMS0xZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6hu30vDm3LeCUgx0QUIXZUTKyF2VGfBLmgaBpzvyHo=)
Each name on this list is an individual committed to this grassroots campaign. And we have supporters from every state across the country, and in every county in Pennsylvania! So, are you ready to join the movement? I haven’t seen your name on this list yet, but I hope I will soon!
[We’re so close to our goal! If you’re able to pitch in your first online $3 right now, you could be the one to put us over the top! Any amount you’re able to give will mean so much, especially as we close the books on our first fundraising deadline of the year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41200116/327763372/-358086307?refcode2=9c3d1a31-1d81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220129-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzNkMWEzMS0xZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6hu30vDm3LeCUgx0QUIXZUTKyF2VGfBLmgaBpzvyHo=)

name: Sarah
subject: One quick question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
&n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3e1ww--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I’m reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump’s brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven’t you responded? Would you join Trump’s site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump →](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e1ww-1vmdp-4qqlpo2/)**
**[No. I Don’t Support Trump →](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e1ww-1vmdq-4qqlpo3/)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e1ww-1vmdr-4qqlpo4/)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

Hey, folks, I hope your year is off to a great start. While the girls and I eased into this year, Michael hit the ground running to serve Coloradans. Michael’s policy to ban surprise medical bills went into effect on the first day of 2022. Lowering healthcare costs is one of his top priorities, and this bill will protect folks in Colorado and nationwide from unexpected costs following medical emergencies. He also doubled the amount of money available to help Colorado families cover their energy bills this winter. Colorado winters are serious business, and no one should have to worry about staying warm. Finally, after passing the historic infrastructure bill, Michael secured a critical investment to support bridge reconstruction projects across the state. This investment in our bridges will help rural, mountain, and urban communities travel safely, as well as create scores of jobs across the state. Michael’s continued dedication to our state is lowering costs for working families, creating opportunities for this generation and the next, and so much more. His work is made possible by this grassroots team, and folks like you can help him build on these achievements by supporting his re-election campaign. Right now, Michael is a top target for the GOP, which raised $104.8 million last year to flip states like Colorado. They’re focused on winning his seat to take back the Senate, while Michael is focused on securing more victories for working Coloradans. Michael and his team are facing their first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year and could use your help, folks. **Please donate $10 — or whatever works best for you — to help Michael reach his first end-of-month goal of this election year. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
I’m embarrassed as an Arizonan and an American to have someone like Paul Gosar in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201399/327769362/-363952900?refcode=BLU-DDC-20220129-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGY1MTU2OS0yMDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WndThudUOiRcydf42sX7fE1MrpRty1adKZxPf-nBI3g=)

| I’m about to ask you to chip in to my campaign ahead of our upcoming fundraising deadline. But first, I’d like to tell you why I’m running to defeat Paul Gosar.
---
| [CHIP IN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201400/327769363/-363952900?refcode=BLU-DDC-20220129-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGY1MTU2OS0yMDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WndThudUOiRcydf42sX7fE1MrpRty1adKZxPf-nBI3g=)

Paul Gosar has been representing me in Congress for a decade. But in that time, I can’t name a single time he’s voted in my best interests as a constituent. Peter,

**[We’re emailing to ask you to contribute $10 to Aramis Ayala’s campaign for Florida’s 10th district today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201482/327770105/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.29_b1_EOM2_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=10&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.29_b1_eom2_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGMyNzFiMy0yMDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yirJPzxTnsXuxka2yeGkYW1MPCGOS96u1ikTVNEqiN8=)**

We know we ask a lot. So we would appreciate it if you would give us one minute to say why your donation -- especially today -- is so important to Aramis.

Aramis is an experienced reformer who understands this district better than anyone else. She cares about fighting for what is right. She wasn’t afraid to stand up to Governor Rick Scott as Florida’s first Black State Attorney over her opposition to the death penalty, and she will bring that same conviction with her to Congress. **She refuses to stand silent in the face of inhumanity, injustice, police misconduct, gun violence and systemic racism.**

Aramis brings the forward-focused vision needed to restore public trust and create a fairer, more just future for all of us.

But the only way she will be able to get to Congress is through the grassroots support from people like you, chipping in a few dollars at a time.

And right now, our end-of-month deadline is a few days away, and we’re still a little bit short of this important goal.
