Aramis Ayala is an award-winning advocate for justice reform and human rights. As Florida’s first Black State Attorney, she has devoted more than two decades to public service and building safer, healthier communities. Aramis’s unflinching commitment to justice earned national headlines when she went head-to-head against former governor Rick Scott to oppose the death penalty. She has successfully established innovative pre-trial diversion programs, published a historic Brady list of questionable police, advanced public transparency, and accountability of law enforcement, halted pre-trial deportations, and expanded support for survivors of domestic violence and human trafficking. Her work has won accolades from the Florida ACLU’s Campaign for Criminal Justice Reform, and the Southern Poverty Law Center. An educator, cancer survivor, and mother of two, Aramis is running for Congress to deliver a bold, forward-focused vision that restores public trust and guarantees an equitable future for all of us.

So we would appreciate it if you would give us one minute to say why your donation -- especially today -- is so important to Aramis. Aramis is an experienced reformer who understands this district better than anyone else. She cares about fighting for what is right. She wasn’t afraid to stand up to Governor Rick Scott as Florida’s first Black State Attorney over her opposition to the death penalty, and she will bring that same conviction with her to Congress. She refuses to stand silent in the face of inhumanity, injustice, police misconduct, gun violence and systemic racism. Aramis brings the forward-focused vision needed to restore public trust and create a fairer, more just future for all of us. For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqo34qp2i45e9ibp7j56cft4u7nh0h51qj15ofk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jmco70cth2bs)**

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201776/327771300/-420428835?refcode=20220128_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc0ODE2OC0yMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocKFra88fIXC31JMt8gZjOZ4zaBs3ceWIAg5JQCQso=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201777/327771301/-392698372?refcode=20220128_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc0ODE2OC0yMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocKFra88fIXC31JMt8gZjOZ4zaBs3ceWIAg5JQCQso=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201778/327771302/-420428835?refcode=20220128_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc0ODE2OC0yMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocKFra88fIXC31JMt8gZjOZ4zaBs3ceWIAg5JQCQso=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201779/327771303/-392698372?refcode=20220128_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc0ODE2OC0yMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocKFra88fIXC31JMt8gZjOZ4zaBs3ceWIAg5JQCQso=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41201780/327771304/-420428835?refcode=20220128_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc0ODE2OC0yMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ocKFra88fIXC31JMt8gZjOZ4zaBs3ceWIAg5JQCQso=)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for America
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhlfu8tqu8s31p6ahehl3cjgrebj774lqtuflgp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jmco74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlm4rbfd76e9qeaohkmhomcc5n65r73c73c4qn8tjlepi6ctlncmrred9l62rm1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cr66lhbbdhnmtgmcdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we’ve caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That’s why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties – _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O’Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for “violating the government’s rules about election integrity.” _Hopefully, I don’t need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment._ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris’ vacated seat in the U.S. Senate – and he was afraid that Rogan’s tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) That’s why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today’s left. We’ve taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes—out of school—during the pandemic. We’ve taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa’s vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we’re taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O’Handley’s freedom of speech.** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) I’m not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation – and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to “steal” the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left’s hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That’s why I’m urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) [**DONATE**](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) [](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](https://secure.anedot.com/center-for-american-liberty/c8506d0b083c8a4e33dfd?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220128_BDG_CFAL_TLAW_REV_PA-GOPP&utm_content=GOPP) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6rt4lnnegtbsju5v5po9nl8h8i15s60jk61bfjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jmco74c3h2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

**Come November, all eyes will be on Iowa.** This is one of the most competitive seats in the country, and winning this seat is critical if we want to see real change for Iowans.

Strong online fundraising is the only way I can keep growing our team and stay competitive. If we don’t hit this end-of-month goal, we may have to cut back on resources critical to winning this campaign. If you have been waiting to chip in, _now is the time to get involved._

name: Team Beshear
subject: Redistricting shouldn't be a partisan issue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Earlier this month, the Republican-controlled legislature redrew congressional and state legislative maps. These maps determine whether there is fair representation in Kentucky, or partisan, gerrymandered districts that favor Republicans. Peter,

Earlier this month, the Republican-controlled legislature redrew congressional and state legislative maps. These maps determine whether there is fair representation in Kentucky, or partisan, gerrymandered districts that favor Republicans.

Here's the thing, Peter: Kentucky Republicans quietly passed these new maps quickly and without transparency. The fact is, they tried playing politics with our maps to benefit their party without any regard for the folks who elected them.

**Redistricting is a crucial process that will impact elections for the next decade, and it should NOT be a partisan ploy that happens behind closed doors. That's why Andy took a stand and vetoed these unconstitutional maps.

The voters should pick their representatives, not the other way around.**

Since being elected governor, Andy has prioritized transparency and reaching across the aisle to get things done for Kentuckians. He's working to ensure that every Kentuckian has fair representation, but he needs your support.

**[Democracy should be about representation, not political games. If you agree, will you chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline to support Andy as he fights for the commonwealth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41202234/327775174/-758409691?refcode=em22_220128_eom1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_eom1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzc5NDFlNi0yNDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SHG6zGmZUITRxY1I3QEvQbp-7sGYdfVe5ZlArVYVIIs=)**

Thank you,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41202235/327775175/-758409691?refcode=em22_220128_eom1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_eom1_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzc5NDFlNi0yNDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SHG6zGmZUITRxY1I3QEvQbp-7sGYdfVe5ZlArVYVIIs=)

name: Emily @ Team Benson
subject: Let’s talk campaign fundraising… honestly
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

My name is Emily Mellits. I’m a proud mom of two wonderful kids, Carter and Ellie, and a German Shepherd named Piper. I also help manage the finances for Jocelyn’s campaign and that’s why I’m reaching out to talk about our fundraising progress this month.

Now, I’m not going to mislead you with some ‘all caps' headline about needing to donate in the next 10 minutes or the sky will fall rhetoric. That’s not how I roll and that’s not what this campaign is about.

I’m reaching out because, yes, we have a monthly fundraising goal to hit but also to give you an honest and clear understanding about why we are asking you to pitch in with a contribution today.

We have just over nine months left in this campaign. On the finance side, that means we are crunching numbers and planning exactly how much money we need to raise today, in January, and every month until Election Day so we can finish as strong as possible. That means organizing our budget to see how many TV ads we can afford, how much travel we can plan, and what our voter contact is going to look like. That means making sure supporters like you, friend, know about the need to start our fundraising off on a high note to make sure we give Jocelyn all the resources possible to reach voters and get re-elected in November.

Now, we still have about $4,000 to go to hit our goal this month. I’m not saying the world is going to end if we don’t hit it, but we’ve got a budget to plan and every bit counts, especially when our opponents can deposit a check signed “DeVos” any time they need one. Friend , will you make your first contribution to support this campaign today?

Donate today>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=012922nondonors

We really appreciate your support. I know Monday at midnight is coming up quickly – on Tuesday, I’ll send everyone a note with how we ended up for the month and if we hit our monthly goal. You are the reason we’re in such good shape so far, and I want to keep you up to date on our progress. (Besides, hitting a goal feels good, right?)

- Emily

name: Team Warner
subject: Supreme Court update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Playing partisan games with the fate of the Supreme Court is bad for the court and bad for our country.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203176/327777830/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTIyYmQ3Mi0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kmOvRfGoqeKnPdUW43ze6aiiqQ25uweit4OwDmxUIEc=&emci=c228163c-7980-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c922bd72-2581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Earlier this week, Justice Breyer announced his retirement from the Supreme Court. After nearly 30 years of dedicated public service, it’s now the Senate’s responsibility to consider and confirm a new Justice. **But we know from experience that it might not be that simple.** In the past, Senate Republicans have worked to obstruct the process and endanger the fate of the Supreme Court. The Senate has an obligation to fill vacancies on the bench, and with so many important decisions on the horizon, we cannot allow any obstruction to the Senate’s process of reviewing and confirming a nominee. **_[Sign on now to send Mitch McConnell and the GOP a message: do not let partisan gridlock stand in the way of the Senate fulfilling its duty.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203177/327777831/899052501?ms=mw_em_220129_1&refcode=mw_em_220129_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTIyYmQ3Mi0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kmOvRfGoqeKnPdUW43ze6aiiqQ25uweit4OwDmxUIEc=&emci=c228163c-7980-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c922bd72-2581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4568237)_** Playing partisan games with the fate of the Supreme Court is bad for the court and bad for our country. Especially at such a pivotal moment during our recovery, we simply cannot allow for needless obstruction to interfere with the Senate confirmation process. **So here’s the deal:** we’re asking folks from across the country to speak up and send a message to Senator Warner’s colleagues. After nearly 30 years of dedicated public service, it’s now the Senate’s responsibility to consider and confirm a new Justice. But we know from experience that it might not be that simple. name: Deb and Jerry Finkenauer
subject: will you help her?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
📎 photo
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203410/327779036/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk543-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjFlMTQ5YS0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld9_gHLh8iNRulVtusxlOgFKwLrBPMu-vuCrJOJX1uQ=)
Hi Peter,

That's our little girl, Abby, you're looking at – and she's ready to fight for Iowa's families!

Back then, if you had told us our little girl would grow up to be elected to Congress and go on to challenge Sen. Chuck Grassley (who, by the way, was our senator even all those years ago!), well – we _absolutely_ would have believed you.
You see, Abby's always stuck up for what she believes in and fought for what's right. Since the age of 10, she has sat at the kitchen table with her grandfather and uncles – some of them Democrats, some of them Republicans – and talked politics. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college, but what we did give her was her work ethic.

So as Abby grew up and saw work to be done, she signed up and _did_ the work. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours.
We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley. But we've seen how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment will pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like our daughter – and right now, they have more than $32 million in the bank to protect Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby will win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [So will you help her raise another $30,000 before her first end-of-month fundraising deadline? Donate $5 or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203411/327779042/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk543-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjFlMTQ5YS0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld9_gHLh8iNRulVtusxlOgFKwLrBPMu-vuCrJOJX1uQ=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203412/327779050/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk543-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjFlMTQ5YS0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ld9_gHLh8iNRulVtusxlOgFKwLrBPMu-vuCrJOJX1uQ=)

Deb and Jerry Finkenauer

subject: what’s on my mind before this fall’s midterms →

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NEk6oQsJSHGXGX6np0-lmyz8iY1_kCrB4t29Pzx9OCI=/k1CH9C_dAOVfwLXYVQ-Tp0_xK_H7FXKCqzvIXBO0dqE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220129-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

A lot has changed since I won re-election in Virginia's 7th District. With redrawn district lines, there are eight new localities in VA-07. In this district, we saw Republican momentum grow during the 2021 gubernatorial election, and **our new Republican Governor won the district by 5.5 points!**

National Republican groups see opportunity in districts like ours to pick up a seat and ultimately regain control of the House. I'm confident we'll do what we've done in the last two elections - **win in one of the most competitive districts in the nation.**

That being said, I want to talk for a moment about the stakes of retaining control of Congress. The threats facing our democracy are unfortunately multiplying, and losing the House could give way to restricted access to our polls and a suppressed investigation into the Jan. 6 insurrection.

I know as well as you do that we can't afford to head in that direction as a country, which is why I'm standing up for integrity in Congress and campaigning hard to continue my work there. [_**To support that work, will you consider investing in our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/NEk6oQsJSHGXGX6np0-lmyz8iY1_kCrB4t29Pzx9OCI=/k1CH9C_dAOVfwLXYVQ-Tp0_xK_H7FXKCqzvIXBO0dqE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220129-1-EM&amount=25)

body:
I cannot fall behind on resources
| |

I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my End of Month fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**

name: Clay Aiken
subject: we're on our way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
With your help, our team will have the chance to speak with voters all over North Carolina’s 6th district about the issues we all care about — from climate change to systemic racism to income inequality and voting rights.
We have the chance to show North Carolina and the whole country that level-headed, open-minded, compassionate Democrats are ready to raise our voices.
We’re done with the folks at the extreme ends of the political spectrum taking up all the oxygen, and we’re ready to get to work solving our nation’s problems... but we need your help.
Our very first fundraising deadline since announcing is on Monday at midnight. Can we count on you to donate $22 (or whatever you can) to help us hit our January 2022 end of month goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01292022_EOMFR_2&amount=22]
contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01292022_EOMFR_2&amount=22]
Hitting our goal will show the nation that our message is resonating. Let’s show everyone what’s possible when we raise our voices together.
Donate today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01292022_EOMFR_2&amount=22]
Let’s do this!
Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]

name: Hattie Miller, Team Collier
subject: Dan Patrick, Donald Trump, and their endless list of big donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Team — In just a few days, we’ll close the books on fundraising for January, rounding out the first month of this all-important election year. It’s absolutely critical we hit our first major goal of 2022. Now, I’m not trying to cause a panic. Our numbers actually looked pretty good the last time I checked, but everyone knows that could change in an instant. Especially since Dan Patrick has help from Donald Trump and their endless rolodex of big donors. **In fact, Trump will be in Texas _today_ to throw his support to Dan Patrick and rally his right-wing base ahead of our primary election in just one month. ** Trump and national Republicans know that leaders like Mike, who’s fighting hard for Texas families, would be an independent, honest check on their dangerous agenda. So, they’re doing whatever they can to tear us down. The last thing I want to do during these critical first months of 2022 is to have to find places to scale back our budget. So, I’m turning to some of Mike’s best supporters (like you!) for help. **[Folks: Will you add a donation of $10 or more to Mike’s campaign and help us prepare to defeat Dan Patrick by reaching our fundraising goal for the first month of the new year? This is important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41204372/327783231/134239794?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220129_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTMyOGIxNi0yOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5EI-mnM9dlYYZjngKsV1HHpwsCA6vQbpU5mxDvxxrA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41204373/327783232/-839969798?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220129_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTMyOGIxNi0yOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5EI-mnM9dlYYZjngKsV1HHpwsCA6vQbpU5mxDvxxrA=)

Especially since Dan Patrick has help from Donald Trump and their endless rolodex of big donors. Trump and national Republicans know that leaders like Mike, who’s fighting hard for Texas families, would be an independent, honest check on their dangerous agenda. So, they’re doing whatever they can to tear us down. The last thing I want to do during these critical first months of 2022 is to have to find places to scale back our budget. So, I’m turning to some of Mike’s best supporters (like you!) for help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Every dollar you give helps us build the campaign we need to win this competitive race and take back the Texas Lieutenant Governor’s office for Democrats. Thanks for all you do, — Hattie Hattie Miller Deputy Finance Director Collier for Texas The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

body:

| |

| | Peter,

Caucus night is Tuesday! I hope you [have a plan to go](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=268b9cefa6&e=33b11688c1) and become a "Jensen" delegate! We need you there.

I also wanted to personally invite you to our "Pre-Caucus" Rally Monday night! We are having an event at Cowboy Jacks in Apple Valley! If you can't make it, don't worry! We're also going to go live on Facebook that evening, so you can join us virtually.

Join us for a night of invigoration before Minnesota's precinct caucuses! It will be a wonderful event before everything heats up Tuesday night. [_Join us:_](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=68ad71e5a2&e=33b11688c1)
## _The Dr. Scott Jensen Pre-Caucus Rally_
MONDAY, JAN 31 6-8 PM
**COWBOY JACKS**
14998 Glazier Ave
Apple Valley, MN 55124
Get updates and notifications by clicking ["Going" on our Facebook event](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e2182431a2&e=33b11688c1)! See you Monday night and I hope you'll participate at your caucus on Tuesday. Your engagement matters!

-Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

| | Team, We’re just 48 hours out from our first big fundraising deadline of 2022, so I wanted to take a moment to let you know where things stand right now. The field for governor grew this month, and our opponents are being backed by the wealthy and well-connected. That means there’s more pressure to show the power of our movement. With supporters like you, we’ll not only reach our goal – we’ll surpass it. **There’s no better time to invest in a progressive Massachusetts. If we’re going to win, we need to raise $8,000 in the next 48 hours.**_**[Can we count on you to contribute to our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41204478/327783562/1643942387?refcode=em_20220129_f_e_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg3YTFkOS0yOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKKpawEz67zEdjTDhf-OrGUoy4EhZWyyvb-abftkQfA=)**_[**If you pitch in before noon on Monday, you could receive a call from Sonia. She is looking forward to talking with supporters like you about what really matters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41204479/327783563/1643942387?refcode=em_20220129_f_e_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg3YTFkOS0yOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKKpawEz67zEdjTDhf-OrGUoy4EhZWyyvb-abftkQfA=) Our goal is ambitious, but with your help we can show Beacon Hill just how powerful our grassroots team is. With so much at stake, we can’t afford to fall short. [_**Let’s show the big money candidates how strong our grassroots support is. Pitch in $15 or whatever you can before our deadline this Monday for a chance to talk with Sonia.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41204480/327783564/1838604251?refcode=em_20220129_f_e_eom2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTg3YTFkOS0yOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKKpawEz67zEdjTDhf-OrGUoy4EhZWyyvb-abftkQfA=) Thank you for being a part of this fight. Emily Neckes

clean_body: | | | | 2022 is our year. | Peter, From now until election day we have TEN financial deadlines. Each one of these goals is to make sure we stay ahead of Liberal Lisa Murkowski and her Washington, D.C. elitist donors. Did you know only 3% of her donors in 2021 were from Alaska? Even worse, Murkowski has broken from the Senate Republicans to confirm over 90% of Joe Biden’s radical nominees. There’s no mystery why the Alaska Republican Party has censured her, prohibiting her from identifying as a Republican. She has abandoned Alaska values to represent Biden and enable his radical agenda. I have been endorsed by the Alaska GOP and by President Trump. When I’m your U.S. senator, I will represent the people of Alaska and the United States — not Biden and the Washington, D.C., insiders. Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka Candidate for United States Senate FROM ALASKA. FOR ALASKA. ⭐️CONSERVATIVE⭐️PRO-LIFE⭐️PRO-2ND AMENDMENT | | | | ==

| | Hi everyone. It’s Norma – Charles’ wife. Charles has been talking a lot about his upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I wanted to reach out and let you know why it’s so important to him. [**But first, will you chip in? I know Charles has about $3,550 left to raise.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41204943/327786098/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220129_FR_EOM4Norma_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2E3MDM0OC0yZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g07G7N6biTHAluPXP6NBKqOtQ-d_5NgSJKNSjQoH-wA=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41204950/327786126/1028796401?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_220129_FR_EOM4Norma_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2E3MDM0OC0yZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g07G7N6biTHAluPXP6NBKqOtQ-d_5NgSJKNSjQoH-wA=)

Ever since I’ve known him, Charles has been working hard to give folks who are usually ignored a seat at the table.
He worked with special needs students for years to empower them to get their needs met in school, and he’s been in the North Carolina General Assembly for the last 10 years working towards getting Native Americans and rural Americans the representation they deserve.
And that’s exactly why he’s running for Congress – these folks have been marginalized and ignored for too long on the national stage. Charles believes they deserve a representative who knows firsthand the issues that they face.
Charles told me that this end-of-month fundraising deadline is so important because it will set the tone for election year – there are a lot of extremists running for office in North Carolina, and Charles wants to signal to them that he has the resources it takes to win and give the folks of NC the representation they deserve.
[**So, folks, will you chip in $25 or whatever amount makes sense for you? name: Team Kilmer
subject: The fight for equal pay is far from over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Thirteen years ago today, President Barack Obama signed the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act into law to help address the gender pay gap. This anniversary is a reminder that we still have work ahead to end the gender pay gap in our country. In Washington State, women only earned 80.2% of what their male counterparts earned in 2020, and these disparities are even worse for women who are Black, Indigenous, or people of color.

The COVID-19 pandemic has only worsened the gender pay gap, and the consequences are expected to be felt for years to come. We need to take steps now to turn things around and to fight for a world where equal work means equal pay, period.

[**The pay gap hurts women, our families, and our economy, and we need to address pay disparities now. If you believe that we need to take action to address the gender pay gap, add your name >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/sn161nlWJFMryyW-kN5yMwzZ-Rwj2WceZFUxGNbOH4c=/4wBTztmAEVyBKRDNU8mj6t-cBQB5Uofname-zxIiZV4=?ms=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

It's simple, Peter. People deserve equal pay for equal work, and that's why Derek is committed to taking steps to ensure workers are paid fairly and aren't discriminated against because of their gender.

Last year, Derek co-sponsored and voted for the Paycheck Fairness Act to strengthen the Equal Pay Act of 1963 to help end pay discrimination and eliminate the gender pay gap. And he proudly co-sponsored the Equality Act to prohibit discrimination based on sex, sexual orientation, and gender identity.

[**Together, we can end pay discrimination and make sure people are compensated fairly for their labor. Sign on to our petition if you 're with Derek in the fight to ensure everyone has equal pay for equal work.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sn161nlWJFMryyW-kN5yMwzZ-Rwj2WceZFUxGNbOH4c=/4wBTztmAEVyBKRDNU8mj6t-cBQB5Uofname-zxIiZV4=?ms=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/sn161nlWJFMryyW-kN5yMwzZ-Rwj2WceZFUxGNbOH4c=/yPbP5uXfRquZdOS5cW0vgObbQSnN_iLfrOW8BODk2FA=?refcode=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_equlpy_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Team Schrier
subject: Big Pharma wants to defeat Kim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim understands firsthand how important it is for everyone to be able to afford the lifesaving medication they need. But right now, too many Americans are forced to choose between putting food on the table and affording their prescriptions. | **HEALTH INTERESTS POUR CASH INTO D.C. LOBBYING**
"Spending by most health-focused lobbying shops increased in 2021 as President Joe Biden and a democratically controlled Washington moved to enact top party priorities like reducing prescription drug prices and expanding health coverage for Americans"
---

Peter,

As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim understands firsthand how important it is for everyone to be able to afford the lifesaving medication they need. But right now, too many Americans are forced to choose between putting food on the table and affording their prescriptions.

Over the years, the cost of prescription drugs has skyrocketed as Big Pharma CEO's place their profits above peoples' wellbeing. Even in the midst of a pandemic, Big Pharma has remained focused on their bottom line.

In 2021, pharmaceutical lobbyists increased their spending to try and stop Kim and Democrats in Congress from passing much-needed legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs and expand access to affordable health care. And dark money groups funded by pharmaceutical companies already aired over $500,000 worth of dishonest ads attacking Kim for her work to lower prescription drug costs in 2021 alone.

**[We need your help to take a stand against Big Pharma and fight back against any attack that comes our way. Will you chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline to help Kim in the fight to lower prescription drug costs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41205201/327786455/1005875745?refcode=em22_220129_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220129_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E3MDM0OC0yZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VeLxBF1UcQItckeVNHTfktKZuhoTt-tdD25AQwyzE8=)**

In Congress, Kim has fought to keep pharmaceutical companies from raising prices faster than the rate of inflation, to bring cheaper generic drugs to market sooner, and to give Medicare the power to negotiate better prices for all of us. She's ready to continue fighting until every family can afford the medication they need.

But we know dark money groups will do and spend whatever it takes to replace Kim with a representative who will put their corporate interests before the needs of families in our district. Kim doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so she's counting on this grassroots team to help fight back against these attacks so she can stay in Congress and continue this important work.

**[If you're with Kim, chip in $5 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline to protect Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41205205/327786459/1005875745?refcode=em22_220129_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220129_eom4_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2E3MDM0OC0yZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VeLxBF1UcQItckeVNHTfktKZuhoTt-tdD25AQwyzE8=)**

Thanks,

Team Schrier

**To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?**

clean_body: As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim understands firsthand how important it is for everyone to be able to afford the lifesaving medication they need. But right now, too many Americans are forced to choose between putting food on the table and affording their prescriptions. | HEALTH INTERESTS POUR CASH INTO D.C. LOBBYING "Spending by most health-focused lobbying shops increased in 2021 as President Joe Biden and a democratically controlled Washington moved to enact top party priorities like reducing prescription drug prices and expanding health coverage for Americans" Peter, As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim understands firsthand how important it is for everyone to be able to afford the lifesaving medication they need. But right now, too many Americans are forced to choose between putting food on the table and affording their prescriptions. Over the years, the cost of prescription drugs has skyrocketed as Big Pharma CEO's place their profits above peoples' wellbeing. Even in the midst of a pandemic, Big Pharma has remained focused on their bottom line. In 2021, pharmaceutical lobbyists increased their spending to try and stop Kim and Democrats in Congress from passing much-needed legislation to lower the cost of prescription drugs and expand access to affordable health care. And dark money groups funded by pharmaceutical companies already aired over $500,000 worth of dishonest ads attacking Kim for her work to lower prescription drug costs in 2021 alone. = In Congress, Kim has fought to keep pharmaceutical companies from raising prices faster than the rate of inflation, to bring cheaper generic drugs to market sooner, and to give Medicare the power to negotiate better prices for all of us. She's ready to continue fighting until every family can afford the medication they need. But we know dark money groups will do and spend whatever it takes to replace Kim with a representative who will put their corporate interests before the needs of families in our district. Kim doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so she's counting on this grassroots team to help fight back against these attacks so she can stay in Congress and continue this important work. = Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Esther Lopez
subject: re: my son
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41205649/327788517/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk430-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI4ZjFmNS0yZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8M7ILxMrlGNaElN3rcxbwHFnNAe8RCIJ7TAOOq5jjX8=)
---
Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona****, especially during such an exciting time****.**
Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him – especially in the months leading up to this election. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his ****first MAJOR end-of-month goal – a goal that determines the next steps for his entire campaign –****** ** and I don't want to let him down.** **So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:[Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41205652/327788551/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk430-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI4ZjFmNS0yZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8M7ILxMrlGNaElN3rcxbwHFnNAe8RCIJ7TAOOq5jjX8=)**

clean_body: | | | = Friend – I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona, especially during such an exciting time. Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco. From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for all people. But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact opposite of my son. That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him – especially in the months leading up to this election. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory. Peter, take a look at the power that comes from small dollar donors. 👇

Moments like this are exactly why Team Holly is so proud to be a grassroots funded campaign. We know that sometimes your $20 might seem like it won’t help, especially running against someone like Marjorie Taylor Greene. But getting an outpouring of $20 throughout the day is exactly how we stay afloat.

Our support comes from across the country, those fighting with us to help unseat a member of Congress who has lost sight of the true goal of Democracy: **to fight for the people you represent.** But, we also have an outcry of support from across Georgia. From Savannah to Atlanta to right here in Ringgold. We’re all working for one thing: A better future for ourselves, our kids, our neighbors. _And that’s**EXACTLY** what makes this campaign so special._

Holly started this race not knowing what would happen, just that she had to stand up and do something. It’s been a struggle, having to balance a job, kids, and the campaign. But when Holly sees the support from across the country, the call to action to fight in unison – not against someone, but for something – she knows that this was the right call. **She knows that we can win and make history.**

A few years ago I quit my job, started a nonprofit, and spent years traveling our state to build a grassroots movement to pass the Child Victims Act. **Now, Prince Andrew and the estate of Jeffrey Epstein are being held accountable under the law I helped pass.** When I came forward about being assaulted as a child by an Olympian who was my speed skating teammate on the U.S. National Team, I didn’t expect that my voice and advocacy would lead to here. I didn’t come forward for myself — I just wanted to make the sport I loved to be a safer place for children speed skating in the North Country. **But my story ended up being a testament to the fact that _anyone and everyone can make a difference._** Since we passed the Child Victims Act, more than 11,000 survivors in New York, and many more across the country, have come forward to hold their abusers accountable, _taking on some of the most powerful people and institutions in the world._ When I replace Elise Stefanik in Congress, I won’t shy away from standing up for you in every context — whether that’s taking on corrupt politicians, special interest lobbyists, or the big drug companies charging us all insane amounts for the basic medications we need to be healthy. clean_body: | = A few years ago I quit my job, started a nonprofit, and spent years traveling our state to build a grassroots movement to pass the Child Victims Act. Now, Prince Andrew and the estate of Jeffrey Epstein are being held accountable under the law I helped pass. When I came forward about being assaulted as a child by an Olympian who was my speed skating teammate on the U.S. National Team, I didn’t expect that my voice and advocacy would lead to here. I didn’t come forward for myself — I just wanted to make the sport I loved to be a safer place for children speed skating in the North Country. But my story ended up being a testament to the fact that anyone and everyone can make a difference. Since we passed the Child Victims Act, more than 11,000 survivors in New York, and many more across the country, have come forward to hold their abusers accountable, taking on some of the most powerful people and institutions in the world. When I replace Elise Stefanik in Congress, I won’t shy away from standing up for you in every context — whether that’s taking on corrupt politicians, special interest lobbyists, or the big drug companies charging us all insane amounts for the basic medications we need to be healthy. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In solidarity, Bridie Farrell Bridie Farrell is a crime victims advocate and former U.S. National Speed Skater running against far-right Rep. Elise Stefanik in her home district of NY-21. = | Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US Bridie Farrell for US PO Box 166 North River, NY 12856 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: American Defense News
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z64s1ft3739a71rv2j3b0ousctuep2mh0e9ahf3g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbon4t1j65om1pb3c9pn8dbiccp7ddb2ceqn0otheupj1cb4ceon7ddn68o76p9gsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6oj0e9omct74mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5j62pr4s9i61oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zesieeaa2qt5nu6jj68khp8n1m64ltm0uv6rhuvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqsuld1ontriat4rokqmmto8m25er1trcm6gdhb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4c3h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2d53e3eemuscjbbbogb92eljqk4labiuovblq5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4c3h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7m94dru0nrsijajgrrnfgr9apflaqfb9ikrifvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4c3h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm37qrgcdg2he6bui14mvpbrk63r74lk7qn7uv4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4c3h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq7127bfjpdcraoh16r7vmc7j4rbdrgfngrdbeq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: ICYMI News
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg5ugl1d5pldsicrhm4q7kbc3k8eovisbe3aucg8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqeadr3mlp60stncurr1dr76lh68ptkmmoe8tj0marreo9hmdg74sbhm5j30o376v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6oj0e9omct74mdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5j62pr4s9i69oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ehv0j53oq3mn37rr1nou4aornbfcll55v96e50_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm39u8dgu8d08dh3hd2a4g4df9ob5o2linhcui3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4cjh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg352g2rrr3u0mefskr4o7n3clvvg8hfe4045q58_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5jm9oj4cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Cheryl Stephens via NanWhaley.com
subject: How we beat Mike DeWine:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We need you with us if we’re going to change Ohio.

Team,
After Nan asked me to join the ticket as her candidate for Lieutenant Governor, I couldn’t wait to get started. Defeating Ohio Governor Mike DeWine and ending 30 years of corruption in Columbus is a MUST in 2022.
But I need to be honest with you — we need your help. One of our GOP opponents, Jim Renacci, just loaned his campaign $4 million. Mike DeWine loaned his campaign the same amount when he last ran in 2018. Nan and I are not millionaires — we’re middle class. So we’re counting on supporters like you to power us to victory.
**[I just got word that we’re just $11,058 short of our goal to raise $25,000 online before January 31. Chip in $5 now to become a Founding 2022 Donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41206291/327791605/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220129_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzE4MTIwYy0zMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ww7ZGzduIeR8deeQ9YLzkwn_pFteBpv95vEfN5JS0dk=)**
My Ohio story began in high school when my father, who served in the military, retired at Wright-Patterson Air Force Base.
I am a product of the American Dream, but that dream is moving further and further away from so many Ohioans. I saw it when I served as a mayor and as a county councilmember. I saw it again in my career as a housing advocate. And the root cause is state officials like Mike DeWine looking out for themselves and their special interest allies over their constituents.
I’m tired of it. I know Nan is too. We’re going to fight with every bit of energy we have to represent you as governor and lieutenant governor. But we need you with us if we’re going to change Ohio.
**[We’re up against two self-funding Republican millionaires and we’re facing a huge reporting deadline on January 31. Chip in $5 now to prove our campaign can compete.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41206292/327791606/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220129_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzE4MTIwYy0zMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ww7ZGzduIeR8deeQ9YLzkwn_pFteBpv95vEfN5JS0dk=)**
Thank you,
Cheryl Stephens
Democrat for Lieutenant Governor

**P.S. Just last week, a dark money group put hundreds of thousands of dollars behind ads to prop up Mike DeWine. But we know the truth behind his failed leadership. [Chip in $5 to defeat him before the January 31 deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41206293/327791607/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220129_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzE4MTIwYy0zMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ww7ZGzduIeR8deeQ9YLzkwn_pFteBpv95vEfN5JS0dk=)**

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41206298/327791608/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220129_1_t2_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzE4MTIwYy0zMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ww7ZGzduIeR8deeQ9YLzkwn_pFteBpv95vEfN5JS0dk=)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Action for Change – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132276?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**At the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we believe in action, not just words.**

That is why we published the **[Freedom Agenda 2022](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=155b0a1b48&e=5703353baa) **– an action plan to lift up our state.

Now that the state legislature has been in session for one month, I wanted to share with you details of how this agenda is progressing:
* **Action to combat Critical Race Theory:** We outlined the actions needed to combat Critical Race theory back in October. I am delighted to report that SB2113, a bill that reflected our thinking, was voted through the Senate by a large majority a few days ago.

* **Action on academic transparency:** We showed how important academic transparency is to give parents more power. I am so pleased that the Academic Transparency bill (SB2434) is before the Senate, as well as SB2679.

* **Action to safeguard free speech on campus:** We have been spearheading the campaign against cancel culture. It is wonderful to see the FORUM bill (HB164) back, which would deal with cancel culture on campus.

* **Action to abolish state income tax:** We have long supported our Governor and House Speaker as they seek to eliminate the state income tax. The Mississippi Tax Freedom bill cleared the House with a massive majority – and our Governor, Tate Reeves, used his State of the State speech to urge our lawmakers to act.

* **(Lots of) action to slash red tape:** Mississippi is smothered by regulation, so it is great to see so many bills designed to deal with it. They include SB2161 to begin a regulatory reduction program, HB1355 to allow mobile barbers, HB362 to remove restrictions on physical therapists, HB447 to do something similar on occupational licensing, HB917 to free up home-based businesses, HB440 on nurse practitioners, and HB814 to allow internet sales for cottage food producers ....

* **Action on school choice:** I am so pleased that bills that reflect our thinking on education are under consideration. HB874 proposes a Mississippi Scholarship system so that tax dollars follow the child. HB1349 and SB2177 would remove the ability of districts to block transfers.

* **Action to cap school board administration costs:** SB2089 and SB2186 are two bills designed to curb excess pay, and follow the publication of our Fat Cat report on bloated bureaucratic salaries.

* **Action on Charter Schools:** HB1194 proposes multiple authorizer boards, which would help address the systemic inertia that has prevented the creation of more Charter Schools.

* **Action to repeal CON laws:** Certificate of Need laws are a CON. They hold the healthcare in our state back. SB2174, HB330, and HB678 would address this.

* **Action to repeal the moratorium on home health agencies:** SB2905 would achieve this much-needed reform.

* **Action to encourage innovation:** HB1055 and HB1195 would allow so-called sandbox legislation, which would help make our state a center for innovation.

This is a bold agenda, but we will only put Mississippi – and America – on the right track if we set out a clear public policy agenda based on conservative principles – and drive it forward.

Thank you for your interest – and I will be sure to keep you updated.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

_**Ps. Do you think some of your friends might be interested to see this? Why not forward this to them now?**_

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, At the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we believe in action, not just words. That is why we published the – an action plan to lift up our state. Now that the state legislature has been in session for one month, I wanted to share with you details of how this agenda is progressing: Action to combat Critical Race Theory: We outlined the actions needed to combat Critical Race theory back in October. I am delighted to report that SB2113, a bill that reflected our thinking, was voted through the Senate by a large majority a few days ago. Action on academic transparency: We showed how important academic transparency is to give parents more power. I am so pleased that the Academic Transparency bill (SB2434) is before the Senate, as well as SB2679. Action to safeguard free speech on campus: We have been spearheading the campaign against cancel culture. It is wonderful to see the FORUM bill (HB164) back, which would deal with cancel culture on campus. Action to abolish state income tax: We have long supported our Governor and House Speaker as they seek to eliminate the state income tax. The Mississippi Tax Freedom bill cleared the House with a massive majority – and our Governor, Tate Reeves, used his State of the State speech to urge our lawmakers to act. (Lots of) action to slash red tape: Mississippi is smothered by regulation, so it is great to see so many bills designed to deal with it. They include SB2161 to begin a regulatory reduction program, HB1355 to allow mobile barbers, HB362 to remove restrictions on physical therapists, HB447 to do something similar on occupational licensing, HB917 to free up home-based businesses, HB440 on nurse practitioners, and HB814 to allow internet sales for cottage food producers .... Action on school choice: I am so pleased that bills that reflect our thinking on education are under consideration. HB874 proposes a Mississippi Scholarship system so that tax dollars follow the child. HB1349 and SB2177 would remove the ability of districts to block transfers. Action to cap school board administration costs: SB2089 and SB2186 are two bills designed to curb excess pay, and follow the publication of our Fat Cat report on bloated bureaucratic salaries. Action on Charter Schools: HB1194 proposes multiple authorizer boards, which would help address the systemic inertia that has prevented the creation of more Charter Schools. Action to repeal CON laws: Certificate of Need laws are a CON. They hold the healthcare in our state back. SB2174, HB330, and HB678 would address this. Action to repeal the moratorium on home health agencies: SB2905 would achieve this much-needed reform. Action to encourage innovation: HB1055 and HB1195 would allow so-called sandbox legislation, which would help make our state a center for innovation. This is a bold agenda, but we will only put Mississippi – and America – on the right track if we set out a clear public policy agenda based on conservative principles – and drive it forward. Thank you for your interest – and I will be sure to keep you updated. Have a wonderful weekend! | | Warm Regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO Ps. Do you think some of your friends might be interested to see this? Why not forward this to them now? | | | | WLBT reports on our education paper! | | Free Markets, Individualism Have Always Lead to Progress - Read Stone Clanton | | | BEST OF BROADCAST | WLBT: Jackson Man Challenges State Laws to Open Home Health Business (MJI interview) | |

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. I’ll get right to it. I’m tired of politicians who choose playing politics—taking extremist views—over helping their constituents.

Last week, James Lankford spoke at an extremist anti-choice rally here in Oklahoma. Instead of doing what he can as a Senator to ensure women don’t have to take such drastic measures, he attacked them.

Unlike Lankford, I truly believe in making politics for the people and will stand for common sense solutions for reproductive health.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: We can't slow down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Happy Saturday! I’m checking in ahead of our campaign’s January fundraising deadline on **Monday**.
Friend, can I count on your support to help our campaign reach our crucial $20,000 goal before time runs out?
I’m up for re-election this year, and I need your help protecting my seat. Republicans and even a few Senate Democrats are determined to obstruct our work every step of the way, and it’s never been more urgent to continue fighting together for a brighter future.
There are many tough battles ahead, but I’m ready to take them on. This year, I will continue to:
* Lead the fight to protect the right to vote
* Push to expand the Supreme Court to safeguard reproductive freedom
* Work to pass Build Back Better in the Senate
* Call on President Biden to cancel student debt

**[With these critical issues on the line, we cannot afford to slow down our efforts to protect this seat. clean_body: Happy Saturday! I’m checking in ahead of our campaign’s January fundraising deadline on Monday. Friend, can I count on your support to help our campaign reach our crucial $20,000 goal before time runs out? I’m up for re-election this year, and I need your help protecting my seat. Republicans and even a few Senate Democrats are determined to obstruct our work every step of the way, and it’s never been more urgent to continue fighting together for a brighter future. There are many tough battles ahead, but I’m ready to take them on. This year, I will continue to: Lead the fight to protect the right to vote Push to expand the Supreme Court to safeguard reproductive freedom Work to pass Build Back Better in the Senate Call on President Biden to cancel student debt = ****If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:** **= ** ** ** | **= ** ** ** | **= ** **= ** ** ** | **= ** ** ** | **= ** The American people deserve leaders who will step up to move our country forward.
