name: Team Gillibrand
subject: Historic legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
We have a real opportunity to make D.C. a state and bring TRUE representation to the more than 700,000 residents of the district.

| | | Friends, This year, the House passed the Washington, D.C. Admissions Act: Historic legislation to designate Washington, D.C. as the 51st state. And now, with Democratic control of the Senate, we have a real opportunity to make D.C. a state and bring TRUE representation to the more than 700,000 residents of the district. **But we want to hear from our top supporters: Do you support D.C. statehood?** **** **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207176/327795901/1762166123?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjIwMTdhZi0zNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQeKoTsy8kfIyw8aZGrTZ1JTjehPAUsjZceXi1cOzmg=&emci=b1cedc5c-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=eb2017af-3581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7659029)**** ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207179/327795910/1762166123?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjIwMTdhZi0zNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQeKoTsy8kfIyw8aZGrTZ1JTjehPAUsjZceXi1cOzmg=&emci=b1cedc5c-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=eb2017af-3581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7659029)** Today, residents of D.C. pay taxes to the federal government but have no say in how those tax dollars are spent. They abide by the laws of this country but have no representative or senators to debate and vote on those laws before they are passed. **Statehood would change that.** **So we want to know what you think: Should the District of Columbia become the 51st state?** **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207188/327795922/1762166123?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjIwMTdhZi0zNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQeKoTsy8kfIyw8aZGrTZ1JTjehPAUsjZceXi1cOzmg=&emci=b1cedc5c-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=eb2017af-3581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7659029)**** ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207198/327795938/1762166123?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjIwMTdhZi0zNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CQeKoTsy8kfIyw8aZGrTZ1JTjehPAUsjZceXi1cOzmg=&emci=b1cedc5c-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=eb2017af-3581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7659029)** -Team Gillibrand

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207150/327795828/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGVkZjNhOC0zNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i69uD8ATey_TsQbD-M9BV0pjImpNerIcasnoJXneHyc=&emci=fd9d434f-3281-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a0edf3a8-3581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207154/327795831/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGVkZjNhOC0zNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i69uD8ATey_TsQbD-M9BV0pjImpNerIcasnoJXneHyc=&emci=fd9d434f-3281-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a0edf3a8-3581-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask that you make a contribution to my campaign to help me defeat Sen Chuck Grassley in Iowa. Permit me to explain why this request is so important – especially today.
We are facing our first end-of-month deadline of 2022 in just two days, and it’s the most important fundraising deadline we’ve faced yet.
Up until now, our fundraising has been going very well – but there is now a realization within the GOP that they need ‘big bucks’ to attack my record of service _(good luck!)_.
This deadline will set the tone for the rest of the year – a grassroots campaign that speaks truth to power and turns Iowa blue. Our $250,000 online goal for January will put us on the path to victory this November.
But right now, our fundraising has started to slow down while I’m zorching around the state meeting with voters and grassroots organizations. _Outreach is good news; a rollback of donations is not._
We need to pick up the pace again or we risk falling short. And with Senate control at stake, we cannot afford to let that happen.
So I am humbly asking:
[**Will you please make a $5 donation, or more, to my campaign today – before my end-of-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley? clean_body: Hello, In a moment, I’m going to ask that you make a contribution to my campaign to help me defeat Sen Chuck Grassley in Iowa. Permit me to explain why this request is so important – especially today. We are facing our first end-of-month deadline of 2022 in just two days, and it’s the most important fundraising deadline we’ve faced yet. Up until now, our fundraising has been going very well – but there is now a realization within the GOP that they need ‘big bucks’ to attack my record of service (good luck!). This deadline will set the tone for the rest of the year – a grassroots campaign that speaks truth to power and turns Iowa blue. Our $250,000 online goal for January will put us on the path to victory this November. But right now, our fundraising has started to slow down while I’m zorching around the state meeting with voters and grassroots organizations. Outreach is good news; a rollback of donations is not. We need to pick up the pace again or we risk falling short. And with Senate control at stake, we cannot afford to let that happen. So I am humbly asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for your support. When we win this race, it’ll be because your donation today helped power our campaign. “All engines ahead full, Franken!” Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) subject: Rep. Bergman's Advertisement is Ridiculous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
, Have you seen this? **Jack Bergman begins smear campaign** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207903/327798831/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU0NGZhYS0zNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMeEI3EFXm8HxtEdTsETuBRAcfPfjcW3eOTr-e2eJq4=) _**Jack Bergman's smear campaign is beginning. Looks like they're trying to hit me for public service. Ridiculous. I had my****[team attach my resume](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207904/327798832/1075943361?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU0NGZhYS0zNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMeEI3EFXm8HxtEdTsETuBRAcfPfjcW3eOTr-e2eJq4=&emci=1d458131-3381-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8a544faa-3681-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)****to our "About" page, so you can judge for yourself. **_ [HELP US REPLACE BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207905/327798833/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU0NGZhYS0zNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMeEI3EFXm8HxtEdTsETuBRAcfPfjcW3eOTr-e2eJq4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207906/327798834/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU0NGZhYS0zNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMeEI3EFXm8HxtEdTsETuBRAcfPfjcW3eOTr-e2eJq4=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207907/327798835/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU0NGZhYS0zNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMeEI3EFXm8HxtEdTsETuBRAcfPfjcW3eOTr-e2eJq4=) I'm very critical of the current representative – transparent and open with my opinion about his shortcomings as a leader. But, I told my team when we go on the offensive, our message must have substance and be related to the issues. Jack Bergman's team isn't getting the same memo. His ads are ridiculous. According to Bergman's new fundraising page, dedicating a career of service to my community and country makes me an overreaching bureaucrat who wants to "run your life." It's time to get real with voters. He's using this lie to raise money, and[ **we're hoping you can help make it backfire. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207908/327798836/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU0NGZhYS0zNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMeEI3EFXm8HxtEdTsETuBRAcfPfjcW3eOTr-e2eJq4=) I'm **proud and honored** to work for the people. After humble beginnings, Northern Michigan/U.P. has been my home **for over 30 years** and I'm grateful for the opportunity to serve you. It's time to get back to the issues, but if you care to learn more about my service, download my résumé and read more at **[VoteDrBob.com/allaboutbob](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41207909/327798837/1794682790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTU0NGZhYS0zNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CMeEI3EFXm8HxtEdTsETuBRAcfPfjcW3eOTr-e2eJq4=&emci=1d458131-3381-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8a544faa-3681-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427).** **To summarize: **
* Marquette, Michigan has been home since 1989
* I have been married for nearly 40 years to Peggy, and we raised three children and now enjoy grandchildren.
* I was educated with advanced degrees in public health, social work, and medicine
* After medical school and residency, I started my medical career with the American Indian Health Service, serving the Navajo Nation
* I spent two-plus decades as a family physician in Marquette, serving in a variety of roles.
* Then from a desire for national service, Peggy and I joined the Department of State as a Diplomat for ten years. We did five tours — Pakistan during the search and capture of Osama bin Laden, South Korea, Afghanistan, Morocco, and finally in Iraq for my last two-years
* I came home in the Fall of 2020 to a planned retirement that never happened. So instead, I joined Marquette County Health Department as their medical director during the COVID pandemic again out of a sense of service and the community’s needs.

I grew up lucky and blessed in a small Midwest rural community. It wasn't always easy — my parents divorced early, worked paycheck to paycheck, and sometimes my family relied on government aid. We suffered the consequences of alcoholism, but we worked hard and were surrounded by love. Luck gave me talented educators, great mentors, and a quality education at a community college. I went on to attain three advanced degrees without insurmountable debt. We lived in a safe, clean neighborhood. We had affordable housing, access to medical care, sound infrastructure, and good jobs. My foundation was a blessing. It's how I developed a bedrock of principles that still guides me today — values like:
* Wisdom
* Justice
* Courage
* Integrity
* Equality
* Democratic Freedom
* Temperance
* Unity

I learned wisdom from my teachers, justice under the law, equality from leaders, courage from my friends and kindness from my grandmother. Many households in our district are like mine. We work hard. We take care of our families. We help our neighbors, and celebrate liberty. Government can't do it all, but proven federal solutions provided me the opportunity to lead an accomplished life — in social work, medicine, health administration, international diplomacy, and as a local public servant. I can't imagine I could have achieved all of it without such a supportive foundation. My goal as a member of Congress will be to champion similar efficient and effective federal programs that provide citizens more opportunity. Hardworking families of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula deserve no less than success. Every single one of you deserves to thrive. **Why am I running for Congress? ** In one word: Service. I have a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation. | |

clean_body: , Have you seen this? Jack Bergman begins smear campaign = Jack Bergman's smear campaign is beginning. Looks like they're trying to hit me for public service. Ridiculous. I had my our "About" page, so you can judge for yourself. = = = I'm very critical of the current representative – transparent and open with my opinion about his shortcomings as a leader. But, I told my team when we go on the offensive, our message must have substance and be related to the issues. Jack Bergman's team isn't getting the same memo. His ads are ridiculous. According to Bergman's new fundraising page, dedicating a career of service to my community and country makes me an overreaching bureaucrat who wants to "run your life." It's time to get real with voters. He's using this lie to raise money, and= I'm proud and honored to work for the people. After humble beginnings, Northern Michigan/U.P. has been my home for over 30 years and I'm grateful for the opportunity to serve you. It's time to get back to the issues, but if you care to learn more about my service, download my résumé and read more at . To summarize: Marquette, Michigan has been home since 1989 I have been married for nearly 40 years to Peggy, and we raised three children and now enjoy grandchildren. I was educated with advanced degrees in public health, social work, and medicine After medical school and residency, I started my medical career with the American Indian Health Service, serving the Navajo Nation I spent two-plus decades as a family physician in Marquette, serving in a variety of roles. Then from a desire for national service, Peggy and I joined the Department of State as a Diplomat for ten years. We did five tours — Pakistan during the search and capture of Osama bin Laden, South Korea, Afghanistan, Morocco, and finally in Iraq for my last two-years I came home in the Fall of 2020 to a planned retirement that never happened. So instead, I joined Marquette County Health Department as their medical director during the COVID pandemic again out of a sense of service and the community’s needs. I grew up lucky and blessed in a small Midwest rural community. It wasn't always easy — my parents divorced early, worked paycheck to paycheck, and sometimes my family relied on government aid. We suffered the consequences of alcoholism, but we worked hard and were surrounded by love. Luck gave me talented educators, great mentors, and a quality education at a community college. I went on to attain three advanced degrees without insurmountable debt. We lived in a safe, clean neighborhood. We had affordable housing, access to medical care, sound infrastructure, and good jobs. My foundation was a blessing. It's how I developed a bedrock of principles that still guides me today — values like: Wisdom Justice Courage Integrity Equality Democratic Freedom Temperance Unity I learned wisdom from my teachers, justice under the law, equality from leaders, courage from my friends and kindness from my grandmother. Many households in our district are like mine. We work hard. We take care of our families. We help our neighbors, and celebrate liberty. Government can't do it all, but proven federal solutions provided me the opportunity to lead an accomplished life — in social work, medicine, health administration, international diplomacy, and as a local public servant. I can't imagine I could have achieved all of it without such a supportive foundation. My goal as a member of Congress will be to champion similar efficient and effective federal programs that provide citizens more opportunity. Hardworking families of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula deserve no less than success. Every single one of you deserves to thrive. Why am I running for Congress? ** In one word: Service. I have a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation. | | = = Jack Bergman is targeting super wealthy donors and corporate PACs. We're earning the support and generosity of individual donors, like you. Your contribution, big or small, helps support our grassroots effort to unseat Jack Bergman. Can you make a contribution today? = = PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

clean_body: The RGA just put out a hit piece targeting Doug, blatantly lying about his stance on getting our children back in school. | | The RGA just put out a hit piece targeting Doug, blatantly lying about his stance on getting our children back in school.Why?Because they know he 's the only Democratic candidate who can take back the Governor's office. | RGA launches a hit piece against Doug: they're scared! January 28, 2022 | RGA News The truth? Doug wants to get kids back in classrooms, in a way that supports and protects families and teachers -- with mandatory vaccinations. Republicans may be fine with disregarding teachers and safety protocols, Doug is not. He firmly stands with the students, parents, and educators. Republicans are on the attack early because they know Doug is the only Democratic candidate who will block their path to another four years in the Governor's office. A party willing to lie to parents about an issue of such importance to their kids' health and education, a party willing to lie to the teachers who educate our kids for far too little pay has no business in being in charge of Maryland. Thank you, Shaun Daniels Campaign Manager By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

name: Andy Kim
subject: A story of dark money and lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41192299/327727908/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ2NWY3NS0wZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48X2z2ebP9wqm9cFPQ9AUI5k9pbFWRm2QPFR3DqkSp8=&emci=ad7e17d9-f26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f9465f75-0f81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389)
---

| |
## Let me tell you a story of dark money and lies.
A mysterious group called Healthy Future LLC is spending a ton of money spreading lies that I want to cut Medicare. Who are they? I looked up their address in Stafford VA and found this storefront in a strip mall. Hmmm... **A Healthy Future is blasting ads and stuffing mailboxes and inboxes with lies.** What I am actually trying to do is lower drug prices through negotiation, set out of pocket maximums, and give everyone on Medicare vision, hearing, and dental coverage. We are strengthening Medicare. So why is this group not talking truthfully about efforts to lower drug costs and instead lying about cutting Medicare? The answer is that efforts to lower drug costs are very popular with Americans, and _they know that._ [Check out this recent poll](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41192300/327727909/-790139469?nname=playbook&nid=0000014f-1646-d88f-a1cf-5f46b7bd0000&nrid=0000014f-8902-d780-a9ef-9d7a9c2e0000&nlid=630318&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ2NWY3NS0wZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48X2z2ebP9wqm9cFPQ9AUI5k9pbFWRm2QPFR3DqkSp8=&emci=ad7e17d9-f26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f9465f75-0f81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389). Who is this group spending millions, spewing lies? I went to A Healthy Future’s website to try and figure out who they are. They seem really friendly with a picture of a loving family. They have no info at all. Not a phone # or email. It’s literally just a homepage. Hmm... I searched for the LLC filing and found a filing in Ohio by an attorney named James G. Ryan. Not much there but found some additional information that this one attorney was also flagged as having established several other dark money groups. We don’t know who runs or funds A Healthy Future. I think the logical guess is Pharma, but it is absurd and cowardly that groups can spend millions with no accountability or transparency. We can’t have a political debate if the other side is hiding. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41192302/327727910/-1235410711?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ2NWY3NS0wZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48X2z2ebP9wqm9cFPQ9AUI5k9pbFWRm2QPFR3DqkSp8=&emci=ad7e17d9-f26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f9465f75-0f81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389) This outside money isn’t new, it just has a bigger influence that’s marked by a much bigger price tag. Dark money spending increased from $749 million in 1990 to $3.3 billion in 2020. Not only is spending exploding, but transparency is way down. Before the _Citizens United_ decision in the Supreme Court, 80% of outside spending was disclosed. In 2018, it was only 53%. Outside groups have spent $7.3 billion to influence elections since 2010. **I ran for Congress in 2018 to get government back to working for the people, not big corporations or dark money interests. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41192303/327727912/-1702728169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ2NWY3NS0wZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48X2z2ebP9wqm9cFPQ9AUI5k9pbFWRm2QPFR3DqkSp8=&emci=ad7e17d9-f26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f9465f75-0f81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389) I want to show people that we can disagree with decency and civility and still remain united as a nation. **To A Healthy Future and its backers, I say this:** _Since I can’t seem to find a phone number to call you, I want you to know that your lies and gross tactics to deceive only strengthen my resolve to protect Medicare and stand up for our Seniors and others who are asking for fairness._ _And know that there are many Americans that feel the same way as I do about stopping dark money and lowering drug costs. There is a legitimate debate that can be had about how we do this._ _So get out of the shadows and let’s talk._ _Oh yeah, and stop lying to my constituents._ **Would you consider sharing this story with your friends and family?** It's available to [share on Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41192304/327727913/158137503?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ2NWY3NS0wZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48X2z2ebP9wqm9cFPQ9AUI5k9pbFWRm2QPFR3DqkSp8=&emci=ad7e17d9-f26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f9465f75-0f81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389) – or **just forward this email** and [invite them to sign up on my website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41192305/327727914/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTQ2NWY3NS0wZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48X2z2ebP9wqm9cFPQ9AUI5k9pbFWRm2QPFR3DqkSp8=&emci=ad7e17d9-f26f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=f9465f75-0f81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26261389) for more stories about how we're fighting back. _Andy_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41192306/327727915/-821065315?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2022-kim-welcome-3

So get out of the shadows and let’s talk. Oh yeah, and stop lying to my constituents. Would you consider sharing this story with your friends and family? Peter, I know my team reaches out to you a lot.

And I won't lie to you: As we get closer and closer to the midterm elections, I can’t promise that we’ll slow down.

**But I _can_ promise you one thing:** I never have and will never stop fighting for YOU in Congress. I’m beholden to the people of this country – **not special interests or mega donors.**

That’s why I count on donations from people like you, Peter, to fuel my campaign.

name: Tom Perez
subject: Even in states like Maryland
body:
Last Saturday marked the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade, but it's in serious danger of never making it to its 50th. Across the country, we're seeing draconian legislation severely limiting access to safe, legal abortion – and the ripple effects are being felt right here in Maryland.

Team,

Last Saturday marked the 49th anniversary of Roe v. Wade, but it's in serious danger of never making it to its 50th. Across the country, we're seeing draconian legislation severely limiting access to safe, legal abortion – and the ripple effects are being felt right here in Maryland.

Even now, Maryland providers are seeing a sharp increase in the number of patients traveling from out-of-state, a number that will only rise if Roe is overturned, ultimately making it harder for Marylanders to access abortion care.

**As Governor, I'm pledging to protect reproductive freedom in MD and expand access to safe abortion. I'm asking you to sign on to join me.**

**_[Add your name alongside mine to show your support for reproductive freedom in Maryland and across the country. The louder our voices are, the bigger impact we can make here at home and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208321/327801053/2041504579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKqXdRIwJ8f8UPbdy4SKcKQ8Eb26Zpgvf_E-Gutr-Lc=&emci=8f6349c5-7180-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f45afda-3981-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
******[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208323/327801055/2041504579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKqXdRIwJ8f8UPbdy4SKcKQ8Eb26Zpgvf_E-Gutr-Lc=&emci=8f6349c5-7180-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f45afda-3981-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)******
I'm proud that Maryland ranks among states most protective of reproductive freedom, and while our issue is not one of legality, Delegate Ariana Kelly said _"just because you have a right doesn’t mean you can access it."_

**Access to abortion is an equity issue, and we should be making it easier, not harder, for people to get the reproductive health care they need.** As Governor, I promise to work with activists, medical professionals, and providers to ensure Maryland can get folks the support they need – regardless of where they live – and continues to set an example for the rest of the nation in what it means to truly value reproductive freedom.

**I'm asking you to join me:****_[Sign my petition in support of expanded access to reproductive freedom here in Maryland and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208325/327801057/2041504579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKqXdRIwJ8f8UPbdy4SKcKQ8Eb26Zpgvf_E-Gutr-Lc=&emci=8f6349c5-7180-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f45afda-3981-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
******[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208327/327801059/2041504579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKqXdRIwJ8f8UPbdy4SKcKQ8Eb26Zpgvf_E-Gutr-Lc=&emci=8f6349c5-7180-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f45afda-3981-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)******
Onward,

Tom

P.S. Abortion Funds need you now more than ever. **_[Click here to be directed to the National Network of Abortion Funds and offer your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208329/327801061/1528360079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKqXdRIwJ8f8UPbdy4SKcKQ8Eb26Zpgvf_E-Gutr-Lc=&emci=8f6349c5-7180-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f45afda-3981-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208331/327801063/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220129-Roe-v-Wade-button&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKqXdRIwJ8f8UPbdy4SKcKQ8Eb26Zpgvf_E-Gutr-Lc=)******

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: If Mike DeWine continues to stall, we'll take him to court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Ohio Democrats,

We've been working for months to get answers to who knew what about the HB 6 bribery scandal, only to be stonewalled by Mike DeWine's administration. Our requests for information have been met with crickets -- and it's bullshit.

We will not continue to sit by and wait while DeWine and his administration continue to stall. If they continue to ignore our public record requests, **we will take legal action to get the answers the people of Ohio deserve.**

The more they try to hide and ignore our requests on the public’s behalf, the more we will keep pushing for answers and accountability that Ohio voters deserve.

But here's the thing, taking legal action against the governor won't be cheap. He'll do whatever it takes to keep information from Ohioans about the largest public corruption scandal in our state's history. That's why we need your help ahead of Monday's end-of-month fundraising deadline -- to help us offset future legal costs. Can we count on your support today?

[**If you're ready to bring accountability and transparency back to our state, make a donation of $5 or more to help us hit our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208377/327801141/344735739?refcode=em22_220129_eom3_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220129_eom3_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jm5XJzU48ZqfADt6IWBDFyFbKiL20Rs6wCpibUCMFs=)

Thanks,

Liz

Liz Walters
Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208378/327801142/344735739?refcode=em22_220129_eom3_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220129_eom3_fndd_gq_act___lw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTQ1YWZkYS0zOTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_jm5XJzU48ZqfADt6IWBDFyFbKiL20Rs6wCpibUCMFs=)

The more they try to hide and ignore our requests on the public’s behalf, the more we will keep pushing for answers and accountability that Ohio voters deserve. But here's the thing, taking legal action against the governor won't be cheap. He'll do whatever it takes to keep information from Ohioans about the largest public corruption scandal in our state's history. That's why we need your help ahead of Monday's end-of-month fundraising deadline -- to help us offset future legal costs. Can we count on your support today? = Thanks, Liz Liz Walters Team ODP The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. clean_body: | | Peter, In case you need a reminder of what we're up against this year... Kevin McCarthy just reportedly raised over $9.5 million at a single fundraiser hosted at the Trump Hotel \- and he's planning to use that money to install himself as Speaker of the House! Think about this: a portion of every dollar raised by Kevin McCarthy goes to attacking us right here in California's 9th district. And when the GOP leader is raising $9.5 million at a single fundraising event with all these corporate mega-donors and his billionaire buddies, well ... you can do the math. We're in real danger, folks. We need to start preparing now so we can keep this seat blue and protect our razor-thin House majority. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your support will make sure we're competitive when the attack ads start hitting! \- Team Harder * = =

name: Jefferson Holt
subject: Update: A Night at Parizade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
Hi Peter, The response to my earlier email about the Night at Parizade event has been overwhelmingly positive. I especially thank all of you who reached out to share such wonderful memories about my mother and to support Ashley. We also had many of you express concerns about COVID. Due to these well-placed concerns and out of an abundance of caution, we have decided to postpone this event. We are working with the venue to determine the best options for a date later in the Spring. In the meantime, if you haven't already, I hope you will visit Ashley's website to learn more about her candidacy, sign up to volunteer, or chip in to support her campaign. Thank you again. I hope you and your families stay safe and well. [Check out Dr. Ward's website here. clean_body: Hi Peter, The response to my earlier email about the Night at Parizade event has been overwhelmingly positive. I especially thank all of you who reached out to share such wonderful memories about my mother and to support Ashley. We also had many of you express concerns about COVID. Due to these well-placed concerns and out of an abundance of caution, we have decided to postpone this event. We are working with the venue to determine the best options for a date later in the Spring. In the meantime, if you haven't already, I hope you will visit Ashley's website to learn more about her candidacy, sign up to volunteer, or chip in to support her campaign. Thank you again. I hope you and your families stay safe and well. = Jefferson Holt | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward Friends of Ashley Ward P.O. Box 1092 Mebane, NC 27302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Hi friend,
This is Tucson Mayor Regina Romero, and I'm proud to announce my support for Kirsten Engel for U.S. Congress. Here's why:
The people of Arizona’s 6th Congressional District deserve a Representative who will prioritize acting on climate change, investing in clean energy, and creating the jobs of the future.
**Kirsten is hands down _the_ environmental candidate in this race, with a proven record and experience as both a professor and a state legislator in combating the climate crisis.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208779/327804940/416963966?refcode=X_012922_EOM_D&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxNTIyMi0zZTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KeSsaOvv-UEWVujSMwIXbjw99zzlR8laOiVbuUPXjY=)
---
As our next Congresswoman, Kirsten will fight to bring good-paying union jobs, infrastructure investment, and economic and workforce development opportunities to Southern Arizona.
**I am proud to endorse Kirsten for Congress and I look forward to working with her on our shared goals.**

[**Until then, please consider supporting Kirsten by contributing today. Whether it's $5 or $100, every dollar will go toward keeping this district blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41208780/327804941/416963966?refcode=X_012922_EOM_D&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIxNTIyMi0zZTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9KeSsaOvv-UEWVujSMwIXbjw99zzlR8laOiVbuUPXjY=)

body:
Your support now is critical. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRV3ejDsxlWo-aoVFsg9IU78v0UcWyk7OVAqmtnyEe8LKhj3Rcyh8tY3u-oSQ5baMxmYtj8eWvbxeEiRJIpAZDqm4DkRYEr_CBt1s0lRCsJWlwSQoKGxHwN3_sDAOazvej_L3CbXiwGn4Uz6XaLgpNq_iinOB0UP080cXWl5iKjbsR8aPxb39ut-4qaBC4gstItjGMOZzvroGUVaqCHtQLhhvv3ra5dF8HLa9OvG3PhHJM5FoTPEIQwta81mLyTmEeQ/3j4/bybPoBPtRAqfnWmx72caIw/h0/ZZTnGlWmbI6RyWVWL702T2smYAPrab6AvdRpzXeg8v8) Peter, our end-of-month deadline is in just **2 days** and we’re just $8,000 away from hitting our $18,000 goal.

We only have one more month until the primary election. That means everything we raise in January will set us up for success in February. If we’re able to reach our goal by January 31st, we’ll be able to invest big in our organizing program, our field program, and be able to put up more posters and road signs for Jessica Cisneros.

[_**This is it. We are putting everything on the table to elect Jessica. There is no better time than now to make a contribution to our campaign. Can you make your first contribution of $5 or more so we can reach our goal?**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC1jmqIsAS2pA7OkDRNReuWwJtHCq3Iw_H5noHiOfMrKRu-4-AtMSV8jPlGK1rL0xNX0hsBX4pbKy_FIjvkODEy2xKepzbEDMU5spxc5oVZp9GYoTw-cVyK1o4DV1pEksAQCF4qNLNy526st-AJ-YT-cxtXRKNmBeWfvDunDi9ui5ZVy6-TSP_uut2lps8xziq4dg33kDDBV1SvsW0V58GwuN9Iak_Z6GY_Id_WXOgGewvUbJC_0t4wyRelyIN0gSUE1edV6MTizEzDe4OSzNh5vQcir0svFJnOBVhWNVzOFwoblfrlZSkpOZOMFSM_razTp_jLZ0pMZsGFyNOiSVsJomCI0T78MDGwywnUQ1bgYA/3j4/bybPoBPtRAqfnWmx72caIw/h1/aXySJJ71n8_E305jnIVOTby3iuxuC__ZHTVE4oxM7Hc) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC1jmqIsAS2pA7OkDRNReuWwJtHCq3Iw_H5noHiOfMrKSgIVZ16s-eVqvzCFigtgQM0H0JuXhviVXyy-1ydxI4tEaALY02Scscui6Y-vGF_VaTutKy9_t2G6p75AeeSVqhGh8nDs3aHa2R5sQ9GATwC3Ttji8GWwdiGDn9pfPYcW8TtuQcViH-o5YtSeEM-QHQlCmhgXaC6CxM62tZhqh6_QPAgHhRXpPTZserH70e7p5QZCAK6TXzFqIW4l3G4EFOpNg4t6vXxcWV_prjL4bt5-3XjCHyEDp7-6VqK5wVUxXq2qKU_L2Ldb-G1r4lhMoqm8m5tEPwv9NwLZKKYr6C_49xYWMop1-UPgap1fG6PCY/3j4/bybPoBPtRAqfnWmx72caIw/h2/3CV_WYImBWPgZOAtUKB0g88QJGc0MtvRTiVclRMDrMU) Since the start of this campaign, Jessica has never accepted a dime from corporate PACs and special interests — because she isn’t planning to fight for them when she’s elected to Congress. _She’s planning to fight for you, Peter._

As a congresswoman, Jessica will deliver for South Texans who demand and deserve change. Unlike Henry Cuellar who has turned his back on South Texans for over a decade to please his conservative donors.

We only have **32** days before the TX-28 Democratic primary election — so now Cuellar is doubling down on his fundraising war chest to defeat us. He already has $2.21 million in the bank for his campaign — and he’s likely to get more from his conservative donors: the NRA, Big Oil, the Koch network, the private prison industry, and corporate PACs.

That's why we need as much support as we can get to show Cuellar and his corporate donors that our people-powered movement is relentless and has what it takes to take him on.

[_**We can’t afford to fall a penny short, Peter. So if you're able, please make your first contribution of $5 or more to help us replace Henry Cuellar with Jessica Cisneros in Congress.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC1jmqIsAS2pA7OkDRNReuWwJtHCq3Iw_H5noHiOfMrKRmszuNIW3ypgF5PXesmz8hoSstx8wbNL79JxOCPrMYAmIGHUAQ4EQNhZjEMYNC7RICSTa9bX_5L84dKmmGUGSrWBeOjKhuLzTF9UtdCMqOeuUDe-cTII_XAC3O1odPad5GRhkCF3Xnf2ERNTDe4gjyGmgKsybO7od8qJy9zgkeO2pi8S0g1ulAKAWGylwXDaGqE35ctuR7S7RXRp9sl3vcl7ltY_T9huhzoYqC5IKSWpqDAbt1-VzSQsrwVWxEJU0Sgy9uAxMJ2otW2juCffEUGuT_ylrb3pr3bzTWwNvjBaG6y-Gowj1lhNWpQ4yvsNQ/3j4/bybPoBPtRAqfnWmx72caIw/h3/u33KEJGyG4wW10fp3TmHsHWFBtK-faXIIcXuroZkgRI) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC1jmqIsAS2pA7OkDRNReuWwJtHCq3Iw_H5noHiOfMrKSGyAoj19l4D0emDgmWqFvGKcp4yoZHDusYhNplKfxipXZ8F6NxFz75dZPgTlqinF-FPkbO293pDBh_r9V4LotAZuENjHwCe5JiTcC1f8XlBWaPa6kb36dyzh_lJtURciSJhHEw5Se-UPAkCGuPZd0Cd4YUEEMlF63OJhXCaWKAUlY5KK_xtvqlQSzfpbnWWFPIxBZR9mvmDb_JqTTpD1v1DVoCG8S6NyNghs2ZavzwJzmFhMQkEjA0JInVA4e-FDFgh2bn-40td20nxzA8tD-e0pGB4lfpJCBRvntKudbg7SQ6hBb1UFjiGVbIXCJddjI/3j4/bybPoBPtRAqfnWmx72caIw/h4/iGhOjSepK2s9jw5JK4YAXV6YirXqf_gzASNN2609u34) Every amount — no matter how big or small — counts.

clean_body: Your support now is critical. | | | Peter, our end-of-month deadline is in just 2 days and we’re just $8,000 away from hitting our $18,000 goal. We only have one more month until the primary election. That means everything we raise in January will set us up for success in February. If we’re able to reach our goal by January 31st, we’ll be able to invest big in our organizing program, our field program, and be able to put up more posters and road signs for Jessica Cisneros. Since the start of this campaign, Jessica has never accepted a dime from corporate PACs and special interests — because she isn’t planning to fight for them when she’s elected to Congress. She’s planning to fight for you, Peter. As a congresswoman, Jessica will deliver for South Texans who demand and deserve change. Unlike Henry Cuellar who has turned his back on South Texans for over a decade to please his conservative donors. We only have 32 days before the TX-28 Democratic primary election — so now Cuellar is doubling down on his fundraising war chest to defeat us. He already has $2.21 million in the bank for his campaign — and he’s likely to get more from his conservative donors: the NRA, Big Oil, the Koch network, the private prison industry, and corporate PACs. That's why we need as much support as we can get to show Cuellar and his corporate donors that our people-powered movement is relentless and has what it takes to take him on. Every amount — no matter how big or small — counts. Thank you so much for contributing today, — Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This next month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In just a few short weeks, early voting will begin in Texas, kicking off
our long 2022 primary calendar.

Our January fundraising deadline is our first big deadline of the year,
but also our last big chance to fundraise before voting starts in Jessica
Cisneros and Greg Casar’s election next month.

With the primary season approaching, and so many candidates we’re
fundraising for, we’re behind on the $140,000 we need to raise for the
movement this month. We’re fighting to transform the Democratic Party to
be more progressive, champion Medicare for All and a Green New Deal, and
truly fight for the people. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91493?refcode=em20220129-21717&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21717%2E1203867%2EdHJgcR ]Donate $3 now to keep the
movement’s fight strong as we close our $19,893 fundraising gap for the
month.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91493?refcode=em20220129-21717&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21717%2E1203867%2EdHJgcR ]Contribute $3

Winning primary elections is at the heart of what we are doing at Justice
Democrats. We’ve already seen the power of just a few Justice Democrats
standing up against Pelosi and the party establishment. Now in 2022, we’ve
got a shot to elect six more JDs to join them.

But it will take all of us to succeed in beating back decades of the
Democratic Party centering the interests of corporations, Wall Street, and
the fossil fuel industry. Let’s do this together.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91493?refcode=em20220129-21717&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21717%2E1203867%2EdHJgcR ]Peter,
please support our movement’s work to
elect more Justice Democrats and make progressive policies a reality. Any
donation, small or large, will help us meet our $140,000 January
fundraising goal!

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21717%2E1203867%2EdHJgcR ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21717%2E1203867%2EdHJgcR ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220129-21717-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21717_1203867_dHJgcR&akid=21717%2E1203867%2EdHJgcR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21717%2E1203867%2EdHJgcR

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

But it will take all of us to succeed in beating back decades of the Democratic Party centering the interests of corporations, Wall Street, and the fossil fuel industry. Let’s do this together. [ ]Peter, please support our movement’s work to elect more Justice Democrats and make progressive policies a reality. Any donation, small or large, will help us meet our $140,000 January fundraising goal! In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: American Action News
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9t1auis2optbbbl7irme8ka3c5tm2huair43nmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5ge6ob1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcp1gchhbasr663i62t34c1pr2dticmp6ctphe3gm1plh6uo66cr0s6pncsdhmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8pmcdb76kpmfchkcoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg07fa3rni2llurodg1rb9a1is40foe42m2615f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5ge6ob1c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziscockm1os4u9mq5gnupq0ubi5f4friqtt79lf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5ge6ob1c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9tqrgfkfrj3ckmvik9137m42ogordtrjvc9o78_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5ge6ob1c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

body:

---
Friend, Thanks to some reporting by Fox News, we have become aware of federally contracted busses dropping off dozens of migrants at a parking garage in Brownsville, TX. The migrants were mostly single male adults, and they were dropped off near an area with a makeshift sign reading, “Border Patrol drop-off.”
---
[**CHIP IN NOW FOR BORDER SECURITY >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/366ae68517c5e2e5/bf87d58f4f2115ecc3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
They then went into a small, unmarked office, before taxis showed up to shuttle them to a nearby airport. There were no children present, and several of the men told Fox News that they had crossed illegally that morning, and that they were flying to destinations including Miami, Houston and Atlanta. _This is absolutely unconscionable._ Nearly 2 million illegal immigrants have crossed the border since Joe Biden took office — how many of them are on the streets in your town? Troy needs your help right now to crack down on border security to keep our country safe. We have our first major fundraising deadline of 2022 coming up Monday night at MIDNIGHT. Please chip in what you can right now to show the left that we’re not going to tolerate their open borders.

subject: RE: FIRST 2022 DEADLINE

body:
We have to close the books on the first month of the election year.
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5a433dbcfc2543dc8d17fbfec19dae9f&_m=2f697cc2f9a44bcaa9c0c86ef0d41449&_e=lj7SE5X7BPzmhIJPTFloGtBZOdfTpm7LuSMihfeiH2ieW5hn6i9l2U2M9BiU-7Y7CmM4nrt1VXOO-Cm0KGMssqK6FDq_pFkSC-AUSDJW2vcP6paDnECSFfvJiVcJ0ApGWnLS_VQTtJLbIUTRQv0mTz3ed0eavVqVim-eOvV16fsZ_OxunrjM1HUPysIOP22Cxk8GYTqPKVQO8O5h4akLnnu8VtgCi5IWHF2pBlx61JlYAYlb5sJeIMLxaZOwqJVyk69dzR9nU2vhZPaXm7XOOh6xE0HwQQorfKV-hj3jlEDrXUWfi01NKFbQ-AZzNWO9uwQmSJLlELJ0D0cKzkEEmkfwcxbd6pF6XvqG0b1RLZFcDnJAsz1hXPcnKBvN2ypOcKiVk0FfFXSXANJnyjoLp4QdQR8PorLTB0gJnAumHdX3tzeO727IZeAFk6abWjtfED-2rjXOvvxxdf_yIebgRnc5Pt8VlLrmJh3jtCyZtSxtPJXDnBixNM2snO1nqwV6_m4PR_eEI1O8gCJ33ByaISlGEWpjuza1BEsxnQJRJGA%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Monday’s end-of-month deadline will set the pace for the entire election year.
---
_**That’s why our campaign’s National Chair – Kimberly Guilfoyle – set an ambitious goal of $100,000 for our FIRST deadline of 2022. **_
---
Kimberly knows that to win this all-important seat and FLIP the 50-50 Senate, we’ll have to fend off attacks from the likes of liberal billionaire George Soros, Kamala’s DSCC, and RINOs alike.
---
And if we fail to hit this first goal, we’ll lack the resources we need to go toe-to-toe with these radical left-wing forces.
---

clean_body: We have to close the books on the first month of the election year. | Peter, Monday’s end-of-month deadline will set the pace for the entire election year. That’s why our campaign’s National Chair – Kimberly Guilfoyle – set an ambitious goal of $100,000 for our FIRST deadline of 2022. Kimberly knows that to win this all-important seat and FLIP the 50-50 Senate, we’ll have to fend off attacks from the likes of liberal billionaire George Soros, Kamala’s DSCC, and RINOs alike. And if we fail to hit this first goal, we’ll lack the resources we need to go toe-to-toe with these radical left-wing forces. But with YOUR help, we will CRUSH Kimberly’s goal and win the 1 SEAT we need to END Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

That's why I’m introducing a bill that BANS non-citizen voting in Wisconsin, I need to gather support for my bill, and that’s why I want to go into this fight fully prepared with the support of Wisconsin voters. Will you join me? Together, we can make sure this madness never happens in Wisconsin, no matter how hard the Democrats try. Thank you, Sen. Roger Roth Paid for by Roth for Wisconsin

But this is an extremely tight (and expensive) race, and we need to double down on our support for Conor and keep the momentum going if we want to win. = = Thanks, friend! – Team Lamb = = *

subject: Kickstart this movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Run Betsy Run
body:
[](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=957fcd8ad0&e=b87254c2cd) |
---
Dear Friend, This is the moment for Oregonians to stand up and make change. Kate Brown, Ted Wheeler, and Tina Kotek have accomplished something I didn't think was possible in Oregon...they've bridged the rural-urban divide...united the people in the city and the country...in mutual disgust for their leaders and government. The consequences are all around us...a homeless and public safety crisis in Portland, eight counties voting to leave Oregon for Idaho, permanent mask mandates, our kids falling even farther behind in school. Oregon is going backward divided...instead of forward united. **This is the moment we can change all that.** And real change won't come from the political parties -- it will only come from the people. To fix what's wrong with Oregon we need an independent leader loyal only to Oregonians. We need a straight-talking, no BS governor who will force the two parties to work together. **We need a leader like Betsy Johnson.** **[Help us kickstart a powerful, populist movement to change our state today -- will you chip in $25, $50 or $100 or whatever you can?](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=58abca79ce&e=b87254c2cd)** **[Donate Today](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=fd875638a4&e=b87254c2cd)** Together, we can capture Oregon's independent spirit and change Oregon for the better. Can we count on you? **[Donate Today](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=9c42b9273c&e=b87254c2cd)** Real change won't come from the political parties -- but it will come from people like you who love Oregon more than any political party. Are you with us? Emmet Duffy
Campaign Coordinator
**[Donate Today](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=c35411cc2e&e=b87254c2cd)**
* * *
Paid for by Run Betsy Run
This movement is powered by grassroots supporters like you and it's so important that we work together to capture Oregon’s independent spirit. But we still understand if you'd prefer not to recieve emails anymore. To update your email preferences or unsubscribe, [click here](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=81558e5d2e&e=b87254c2cd&c=5a92986f47). Hey Peter, it’s Andrew.

Frankly, I’m embarrassed by this White House.

One week we have Joe Biden calling Republicans as bad as segregationists for not passing Pelosi's election takeover bill.

The next week, he’s cursing out reporters further and completely tarnishing the office of President.

**It’s bad enough, we have politicians up here in Washington treating the work of the American people as their own personal reality show, but now we have a divisive President participating in it. **

While our politicians continue to fight, the average American is hurtingー _inflation is out of control_ , _crime is skyrocketing_ , and _these mandates are disrupting our children’s lives_.

I’m sick of the direction our country is headed in, and I believe you are too, Peter!

Peter, that’s why I’m asking you to help end this era of divisiveness and help Take Back the House this Novemberー[**can I count on your support with a small donation today to help make that a reality?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b83b888155fe481b8ff3f7f7c13333aa&_e=b1ABRvL_4100-Z1BeTN7dhS8E9JAtRJOnOlCMw0cnSzg1W35IaBRCmUMbEHEqNGhx3kcer-FQhlZ3pdA0MrXcEClPcaSVu2pkd1XvuMFMtzNnV-fnoeM3gkn3S00ATcvf9mSXlH0M0ymWiLqmgibn98GPgmOLeRGsOw0CbLCe5FE-r4CMuWkCJ3kcA-45ARnPcHFd3dvpTEHPxpOk-z8N6ZtBbY8ucKJPJ218A9VdeWKU7vMFxAOEkgrYRUP5jRtiYH-1KF4CGeSE3GyNzhJA-CQ1mGniVf2hl0ftl5Y9ChNgOJqjma2RI7Msdspxzs0jZpYRZHJjQ66wToWXSqUlKwZb8IyiJJpcamqO6BH2t7Y2uUc8fAEhRqR00HOqC8RGwfctpXBTJYCcoDwGteXTwmlt1Dvb0C8jWKVQ_GFK-gE3-bu4Jarg36En4nFAvx6lWZAJCupJA0OHtLdq6NTL7rfNK_J80kiQe52etM-E-BDgnsqQX7_riQCzopk2GI1)

Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b83b888155fe481b8ff3f7f7c13333aa&_e=b1ABRvL_4100-Z1BeTN7dhS8E9JAtRJOnOlCMw0cnSzg1W35IaBRCmUMbEHEqNGhx3kcer-FQhlZ3pdA0MrXcEClPcaSVu2pkd1XvuMFMtzNnV-fnoeM3gkn3S00ATcvf9mSXlH0M0ymWiLqmgibn98GPgmOLeRGsOw0CbLCe5FE-r4CMuWkCJ3kcA-45ARnPcHFd3dvpTEHPxpOk-z8N6ZtBbY8ucKJPJ218A9VdeWKU7vMFxAOEkgrYRUP5jRtiYH-1KF4CGeSE3GyNzhJA-CQ1mGniVf2hl0ftl5Y9Cg8c8-ms6-unpR8itCDP6NwE7ERHsh2vNMPmFKYYgGItQRQwgSLiEoXj1Wy6FGZEgKQj_u6qkcxZQjO8yQl9x4F2PZstdeM3iimWJHn830VmOSNR_3Q7qcv5KF3iIxsalLriKJmo9p0suKQ4UsW_UiubTJUJHpdYUVLjbDYGJsx59N9wIamDXW9OlP3fP2zDi6u3L9Hw-8eYhnUy-zSrmLl)

Peter,

Did you see this disgusting attack on our free press by our sitting President?

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b83b888155fe481b8ff3f7f7c13333aa&_e=b1ABRvL_4100-Z1BeTN7dhS8E9JAtRJOnOlCMw0cnSzg1W35IaBRCmUMbEHEqNGhx3kcer-FQhlZ3pdA0MrXcEClPcaSVu2pkd1XvuMFMtzNnV-fnoeM3gkn3S00ATcvf9mSXlH0M0ymWiLqmgibn98GPgmOLeRGsOw0CbLCe5FE-r4CMuWkCJ3kcA-45ARnPcHFd3dvpTEHPxpOk-z8N6ZtBbY8ucKJPJ218A9VdeWKU7vMFxAOEkgrYRUP5jRtiYH-1KF4CGeSE3GyNzhJA-CQ1mGniVf2hl0ftl5Y9ChxImc6Z4rl2TFWJk2e8yH__mZQYY1s4y9wgsxHCQTakEhN6USJeRmsMyvG6qZ_tKMLmf4f998XhCaxJDKvzvv-y5I8bT3CvOBDGk38fb7B0AUrmTWmNrGMw-ZFmg6A5F7A1Mt4TtyWebtXq0RO3DPfZF_2JVGaIw5mt6hzFYDCNto4Adnwm93HKd7XimsYj7fNcXZbLCsfOEm_w8kHGkl1)

[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=b83b888155fe481b8ff3f7f7c13333aa&_e=b1ABRvL_4100-Z1BeTN7dhS8E9JAtRJOnOlCMw0cnSzg1W35IaBRCmUMbEHEqNGhx3kcer-FQhlZ3pdA0MrXcEClPcaSVu2pkd1XvuMFMtzNnV-fnoeM3gkn3S00ATcvf9mSXlH0M0ymWiLqmgibn98GPgmOLeRGsOw0CbLCe5FE-r4CMuWkCJ3kcA-45ARnPcHFd3dvpTEHPxpOk-z8N6ZtBbY8ucKJPJ218A9VdeWKU7vMFxAOEkgrYRUP5jRtiYH-1KF4CGeSE3GyNzhJA-CQ1mGniVf2hl0ftl5Y9Ci5ZSUnQekGiWMjUeTP_zjQ7G0F44mgj6rJUS7FyOY8EP50SpjvafRFD8oorDE1gnFO9SQ7OGK3gbYajMH95pN5LmCHNroiaSZSewOHXSQi7myJSn9PVeDGfrtmGaMSKLdNiD4PtjFjouapUbIjFDykkGaz0O1C1m4fJLKdVH5y2bJr_NV-FMvm1WdARmKkU3XGa1VMZxZzU10gouc36vV5)
The Fox News reporter asked a benign question about the effect inflation will have on the upcoming election, and Biden called for ‘MORE INFLATION’ and called him an expletive.

I’m sorry, but weren’t we told over and over again in 2020 that Joe Biden was ‘the nice guy’ and a ‘unifying figure’ー _**it seems like the only thing he spews is vitriol and inflation.**_

Andrew is sick of these children in Washington, name-calling each other and failing to lead the American people during a time of crisis.

We bet you are too, Peter.

That’s why we’re reaching out to you todayーwe want to Take Back the House this November to restore _conservative leadership_ , _civility_ , and _common sense_.

clean_body: His actions are unforgivable... | | Hey Peter, it’s Andrew. Frankly, I’m embarrassed by this White House. One week we have Joe Biden calling Republicans as bad as segregationists for not passing Pelosi's election takeover bill. The next week, he’s cursing out reporters further and completely tarnishing the office of President. It’s bad enough, we have politicians up here in Washington treating the work of the American people as their own personal reality show, but now we have a divisive President participating in it. While our politicians continue to fight, the average American is hurtingー inflation is out of control , crime is skyrocketing , and these mandates are disrupting our children’s lives. I’m sick of the direction our country is headed in, and I believe you are too, Peter! Peter, that’s why I’m asking you to help end this era of divisiveness and help Take Back the House this Novemberー Thank you, Andrew Garbarino \---------- forwarded message below ---------- | Peter, Did you see this disgusting attack on our free press by our sitting President? The Fox News reporter asked a benign question about the effect inflation will have on the upcoming election, and Biden called for ‘MORE INFLATION’ and called him an expletive. I’m sorry, but weren’t we told over and over again in 2020 that Joe Biden was ‘the nice guy’ and a ‘unifying figure’ー it seems like the only thing he spews is vitriol and inflation. Andrew is sick of these children in Washington, name-calling each other and failing to lead the American people during a time of crisis. We bet you are too, Peter. name: Paul Gazelka
subject: January was jam packed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
An update from the trail! [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=a726e0b1d78545f68a382063ed525bdd&_e=T4_HmP-s2omJkfWqFt5z74ZZ2ojFo0C0neEQ9Su_wRdqeB_HfpbvNcItXP5WgXVIAt4xI6ShWPS_RzRyZXABMFZD9LarBS42JUkv4eRR3xsnK43n7AABU0RKQsf5f7mDcOCBez_oKVEu1LH8T-0lW_AG0S4rGv8yuA1WAuYws1F1ADboVrrkDlxwfELAUkUGoE7NM15gSL2XRBjZRMKqoDEhZtlwsvDgtlf9OmMoe3G6an_e_Z6djlmkxVx6v-SZjlaZSxfzgjzCPOJX_eT9u9nz7JCFKcjpsYFQfMVX6xiufz3o1Ofw6qPxtUIIGmdWD0MO8QWklYVcwDWVKV5lDA%3D%3D) My friend,
January was our busiest month yet — and we're still just getting started! _
_ I've said it over and over again: this campaign is not any ordinary campaign. **It's a movement.** A movement for a safer, more independent, and better Minnesota. How do we get there? By empowering **YOU** and telling government to get out of the way. Our movement was all over our beautiful state in January as we worked to earn your support in our fight against the radical liberal agenda attempting to infiltrate our state. It was a pleasure having the opportunity to talk with all of you, and I thank you for taking the time with me! [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=a726e0b1d78545f68a382063ed525bdd&_e=T4_HmP-s2omJkfWqFt5z74ZZ2ojFo0C0neEQ9Su_wRdqeB_HfpbvNcItXP5WgXVIAt4xI6ShWPS_RzRyZXABMFZD9LarBS42JUkv4eRR3xsnK43n7AABU0RKQsf5f7mDmQixCfpqWxU1BbnY3qhJiIpufQAZjRW91e25KE1GqdHDU6wuZt_oJY2b_noQESrfNeBgu75iZy7RjwMdftgVmRKIm21V4qJdTLdhA7FHRSfgN8fWQJ3pgifOS9m6Y8-rCcF0Q0MbG-iBD4hmgiIi9POsdjI7AVNETq---BgK9RUKwZrGyXtZK7r4atTEzUPPdNM2zxWp4LLeO_PaQCobPA%3D%3D) On the trail, one message has been made clear: keeping Minnesota safe is a key priority. We must ensure that Minnesota is a safe place to live, work, and play. That's why I stood in the State Capitol Rotunda and highlighted several proposals to help get crime under control and support our police. [I encourage you to watch my press conference here!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=a726e0b1d78545f68a382063ed525bdd&_e=T4_HmP-s2omJkfWqFt5z7_lpjoQ8_SG1mu-Sjb98zNbhyhRjkdQusN-zi7oQvPu9BBF_uQ4BJbHCivUP6bgBnSEnkJg5Oqx8DpKVgnFwP548PMcD474suUNNjA_JqO6tRtiC1LTVTAwKjgr_Pgq6-HObLeV6iFCYTbsRfB2_fwRU-afYRyUW7H1vI4SmYbMco7IxlJym4ihLedYXgm8_ds8spZVR_6FWqbnCHI7y2LTWDFwe5GxNZpcQKEhUrpi-5yc8WwDbcon_6POkCyy215ZssLLvR7bHNsuBYYkuMEUoodEh-9WSGzOoKZ9ajkto) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=a726e0b1d78545f68a382063ed525bdd&_e=T4_HmP-s2omJkfWqFt5z7_lpjoQ8_SG1mu-Sjb98zNbhyhRjkdQusN-zi7oQvPu9BBF_uQ4BJbHCivUP6bgBnSEnkJg5Oqx8DpKVgnFwP55gOeaocoEcVEL-EKE6mMkjXScDl3GqOddtbFlq4pwOeumjdP0h98Swh9jdGmllnihUcpfeO-eWe5qiLfZH_QpmQLls6Ksjs7Qvu1v-e1Yvx4uLNYqLS_tnrABWdVSsBvtaXS95Xgd2BOE2MCwitqm6ixk28kggNjCXfqouLeJ0MZaGGeEA_bXY56eG3yPkuwgAh3gcjH0USDJ9aaReC7wG) This month, I made sure to stand with you on two incredibly important issues.
* Defending the rights of our unborn by walking at the MCCL March for Life
* Advocating for our students by participating in School Choice Week

As your governor, I will always stand up for our children, born and unborn! [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=a726e0b1d78545f68a382063ed525bdd&_e=T4_HmP-s2omJkfWqFt5z74ZZ2ojFo0C0neEQ9Su_wRdqeB_HfpbvNcItXP5WgXVIAt4xI6ShWPS_RzRyZXABMFZD9LarBS42JUkv4eRR3xsnK43n7AABU0RKQsf5f7mDjrbYFgGt7y31oWOTSdCOvRV-CXaY8CIowh-iq_Z8rGd-UMxiU5jdXufxrQD6pZ2nLO5SZ0a23R8bAChTxVW-EzL84vmmi2hp5JaqklOsenppU2R2pra9hl53ckJDtS8WwOUu5P3qr27HDSSO2wbfexGZg6qWy_rNGj_SyhKg1elDV-FhskfRfH6_nfKAZB4Uvg1Z9ZEWJurUeSliIGbemg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=a726e0b1d78545f68a382063ed525bdd&_e=T4_HmP-s2omJkfWqFt5z74ZZ2ojFo0C0neEQ9Su_wRdqeB_HfpbvNcItXP5WgXVIAt4xI6ShWPS_RzRyZXABMFZD9LarBS42JUkv4eRR3xsnK43n7AABU0RKQsf5f7mD336Yf0dIFgnxg-pN6_iINtoBBihjYxUe2mJejaAUsyM6GU_WvFYmimzYFUYDzs4W_vxjLdkg7rca_Uh7gL1Ym_KXGG29FnxQTDM_sirNb-Q1O7h1urzD1Qu7TvtYFdOpXRjYC9CG6noj5xsjrwr5BL8Qa9Pnbw4LbpGYSxA7frcu8Fw6TBZ4roNJzd5J0Fk--d-i1bs9jxPuMCqU0MF4lg%3D%3D) It is an honor to serve you in the Senate, and I look forward to serving as your governor.[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=a726e0b1d78545f68a382063ed525bdd&_e=T4_HmP-s2omJkfWqFt5z7_lpjoQ8_SG1mu-Sjb98zNbhyhRjkdQusN-zi7oQvPu9BBF_uQ4BJbHCivUP6bgBnSEnkJg5Oqx8DpKVgnFwP55gj2C_9CFBltMQxi-KdFHMtHt_9SWvKNoDs3294BqXVsw13J3ByGmfkDzQJM4MoucfyUFzG7BiqMoEGGiFRNRYGoCPOdwJzgBEZ3WqjrRTHOBfEyd8JaF7dxIY1h2lwoFBMhnJlMncF0TL8itYXLZZNlNY9eGaHR0E5fguP8MZQqXsCGjLrzW3qQ0IaKVKaQ-Jujadl4qqB2xbkqsp0p-U) Thank you for your continued support and dedication to our movement! clean_body: An update from the trail! My friend, January was our busiest month yet — and we're still just getting started! I've said it over and over again: this campaign is not any ordinary campaign. It's a movement. A movement for a safer, more independent, and better Minnesota. How do we get there? By empowering YOU and telling government to get out of the way. Our movement was all over our beautiful state in January as we worked to earn your support in our fight against the radical liberal agenda attempting to infiltrate our state. It was a pleasure having the opportunity to talk with all of you, and I thank you for taking the time with me! On the trail, one message has been made clear: keeping Minnesota safe is a key priority. We must ensure that Minnesota is a safe place to live, work, and play. That's why I stood in the State Capitol Rotunda and highlighted several proposals to help get crime under control and support our police. This month, I made sure to stand with you on two incredibly important issues. Defending the rights of our unborn by walking at the MCCL March for Life Advocating for our students by participating in School Choice Week As your governor, I will always stand up for our children, born and unborn! It is an honor to serve you in the Senate, and I look forward to serving as your governor. Thank you for your continued support and dedication to our movement! Paul Gazelka P.S. I need your help! | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

Partisan gerrymandering in Texas means that our race, along with _almost every other race_ in Texas, will be decided in the primary election on March 1. Early voting starts on Valentine's Day.
The _Texas Tribune_ reported this week that a federal panel is hearing arguments in a lawsuit that claims the Texas GOP violated the Voting Rights Act to lessen Black and Hispanic voting power.
**That’s not all, GOP State Sen. Kel Seliger admitted it.** In a signed declaration he said: "it was obvious to me that the renewed effort to dismantle Senate District 10 violated the Voting Rights Act and the U.S. Constitution.”
The way to defeat gerrymandering in Texas is to win statewide seats — where gerrymandering doesn’t apply — and take back power from the GOP. This is why our campaign is critical to Texas. To win Texas we have to get every Democrat in the bluest city — Austin — out to vote. That’s how we win!
But to do that, first we have to win the primary in the newly created Congressional District 37.

Early voting starts on Valentine's Day. In a signed declaration he said: "it was obvious to me that the renewed effort to dismantle Senate District 10 violated the Voting Rights Act and the U.S. Constitution.” The way to defeat gerrymandering in Texas is to win statewide seats — where gerrymandering doesn’t apply — and take back power from the GOP. This is why our campaign is critical to Texas. To win Texas we have to get every Democrat in the bluest city — Austin — out to vote. That’s how we win! But to do that, first we have to win the primary in the newly created Congressional District 37. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = For the first time in decades, Austin has the opportunity to send a new representative to Congress that will champion lowering the cost of healthcare, expanding Medicare to include dental, hearing and vision, and eliminating student loan debt. = Thanks for standing up. – Team Donna | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

name: Doyle Canning
subject: It's time to decide.
body:
As this month draws to a close, it is time to decide. I will be taking some time this weekend in deep discernment with my family, and in walking in the forest on our rural Lane County woodlot property, which is where I go to recharge and reconnect. Friend, Since we launched our exploratory committee the first week of January, we've had so many messages of support, volunteers raising hands, and financial contributions ranging from $5 to $500 to $5,000. I am overwhelmed by the daily reminders that our movement is strong, organized, and ready to move forward to make the change that our climate, communities, and country need right now. As this month draws to a close, it is time to decide if it's the right time to run for Congress. But this decision isn't mine alone. **This decision belongs to you, and the movement we've built together. ** That's why I am asking you to **[donate now to make sure we hit our month-end goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y0TiD2LFqyDZoCgu8R4O2vmHT7Ar8IwZgzW0YI970IFX52HX4XXbYycDNbvePkA2Vn9Z8So7JKcBBZNW_mnEeM25sfpRlOtWa9eU0TRPGNxWTf1r6GtMZ6dyvaC4eCiG9cD6MCf8g7CRZbfxd2iHdlQZn0JNrbg45h-QXavIqMaTJbgjE08oMIyheOdrheetu3q5OHPLamOsfK63IJy6Y5ETtebdPs8pwITWYaTr1M5OkvpDPiLdm-X3pnULr8GBY75Gvj7Rv_kQjQOmayAGdMhDzuyERqdYGuAlTZpncD_c8fIZ9I0SQQKTtz7K4eeKUAjq_PXrqCbgJ_vy-6nCSXPn-5hn7p95xywjNYEjOYsxP89CAvN950PlmXNrAXDhE/3j4/qPfyHndCSJGaFkoFD2w-HA/h1/2Mk0VwY6aoaW4m4xo7RXXjtFAmomyMaGkmr_br2wOeY)** There's really only one way I will know if I have the support I need to run, to be considered "viable" in the eyes of the political establishment, and that is if **you make a contribution right now.** **Join hundreds of supporters who've already sent their donations and messages of support, and [Donate now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y0TiD2LFqyDZoCgu8R4O2vhPPf8SfvW04l9fuqDWUqOufZGpwUe7KGdlpMvy64GrJwWRwjrUxZ7HFPf8fLI4Uo35cb_7r0JCUwg1Lfn2_J-b-QR-soF1Vj6iTYO5vX-fgC6RaH-UFqDGOo0AHOqxtYRHFrTeVUKCFlalX8nz-Bs5qvigDO4CaLqn_0-kEZlCnKUOZRB1S6yYWAg2aD2cnSmPVsAtJnKuZq5mVm0OklNa3E6Xqbr6s2BAUmGE_Swccc0Avg6_tOKOi4u9y0PzsU53iX5FYzJh64Dtw3BH8uUcM-zfBxky1LKYRRCmfdJmNiKTqPttNf8RLzuCqjj0zi4mLSW1TN35eONbECUlH9cQwlNiQvQYjqFMz54aA7DGc/3j4/qPfyHndCSJGaFkoFD2w-HA/h2/j8Cr7jWjZjoDaOPKBpxZXiBZFKjEzUyxTfdN1tWgDao). **

But to win it, we have to organize.** This movement is going to take unprecedented people power. **Are you ready? Are you with me? Last call: **

I am overwhelmed by the daily reminders that our movement is strong, organized, and ready to move forward to make the change that our climate, communities, and country need right now. As this month draws to a close, it is time to decide if it's the right time to run for Congress. But this decision isn't mine alone. This decision belongs to you, and the movement we've built together. That's why I am asking you to There's really only one way I will know if I have the support I need to run, to be considered "viable" in the eyes of the political establishment, and that is if you make a contribution right now. Join hundreds of supporters who've already sent their donations and messages of support, and . | | | | | | When it comes to climate justice, Medicare for All, standing up for working people and ending the soft corruption of corporate money in politics -- we know that the people are ready for real change. But to win it, we have to organize. This movement is going to take unprecedented people power. Are you ready? Are you with me? Last call: | I will be taking some time this weekend in deep discernment with my family, walking in the forest on our rural Lane County woodlot property. This photo is of one our our favorite mature Douglas Fir trees, which is where I go connect with nature and do my best thinking. Thank you for your support, Doyle P.S. Contributions to Doyle Canning Exploratory Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. To contribute via check, please address to "Doyle Canning Exploratory Committee" P.O. body:
Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b137cc7d-ec7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/5f7de343-4781-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjdkZTM0My00NzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQXLVKX16h6JqjbYx2MM9ABGcUSSVu7Ix8FlPT8U9-I=&id=103697760)

| As we head into the on-year, we want to remind you of why Mark’s race is so important:
* He brings common-sense experience from his time as Mayor of Kansas City.
* He is committed to rising above partisanship to get the job done.
* Mark is the right person for the job because he understands that there is _no Democrat or Republican way to pave a street, protect the environment, or support our schools._

The Senate majority is seriously at risk, but Mark is ready to step up to the challenge. [The end of the month is in TWO DAYS, and the urgency to finish strong is at an all time high. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

### Donnelly, ID - January 22

America is a nation founded by young patriots with a bold vision. We need that spirit now!

| | |

### Rexburg, ID - January 21

Ronald Reagan said it best: "The only experience you get in politics is how to be political."

### Star, ID - January 17

We have to change course and promote free market principles and the American dream again.

---
| |

---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved.
