clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | January 27, 2022 | | | | "The right of the citizen to keep and bear arms cannot be infringed if liberty in America is to survive." \- Ronald Reagan | == | | | | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | Donnelly, ID - January 22 America is a nation founded by young patriots with a bold vision. We need that spirit now! | | | | Rexburg, ID - January 21 Ronald Reagan said it best: "The only experience you get in politics is how to be political." | | | | Star, ID - January 17 We have to change course and promote free market principles and the American dream again. | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | == | | == | | | | | Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful. | | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, have you
seen our new Charles Booker for Senate yard signs yet? ⬇️

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220129?refcode=em20220129-1510&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1510_346206_B6-6uj&akid=1510%2E346206%2EB6-6uj ]Charles Booker yard sign

Peter, if we
want to make sure that every home in Kentucky has one of these signs, we
have to make it happen. We’re so excited to fill up ALL the yards,
gardens, fields, and windows in Kentucky with our sign, and remind people
that better leadership is possible in our Commonwealth — but we can’t do
it without your help.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220129?refcode=em20220129-1510&t=1023&refcode2=1510_346206_B6-6uj&akid=1510%2E346206%2EB6-6uj ]Please chip in $16 — the price of producing one yard sign — to our
campaign today and help us reach our $35,000 end-of-month goal. Together,
we can blanket Kentucky with Charles Booker yard signs and show the
strength of our grassroots movement to replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220129?refcode=em20220129-1510&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1042&refcode2=1510_346206_B6-6uj&akid=1510%2E346206%2EB6-6uj ]Contribute $5

for a brighter future, from the hood to the holler.

doing outreach in all forms: online, offline, yard signs, and more.

Thank you,

Team Booker

name: Giffords.org
subject: Your suggested donation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We have some good news and some bad news.
#

**_January Fundraising Drive_**
Deadline: 01/31
Email on record: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested donation: $3
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?refcode=em220129-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**
Friends,
We have some good news and some bad news.
**The good news** is that 5,132 people have donated towards our January 31st fundraising deadline.
**The bad news is** that we are still $39,944 away from reaching our $115,000 fundraising goal.
This is our first goal of 2022 and will set the tone for the rest of the year. 2022 is an extremely important year for gun safety—midterm elections are in November, and we need to ensure gun safety is a top priority issue.
The gun lobby is spending millions of dollars to support campaigns and politicians who will stand by their corrupt, profit-driven agenda. So that’s why we need to count on you so that we can prioritize saving lives and progressing gun safety.
We can meet our goal if everyone who believes in our fight for gun safety pitches in. So we have to ask:
[**Can you make a donation of any amount to Giffords today? Your contribution will go directly towards our fight to hold the gun lobby accountable and keep Americans safe.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?refcode=em220129-1-30&t=2&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220129-1-30&t=21&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220129-1-30&t=22&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220129-1-30&t=23&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220129-1-30&t=24&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220129-1-30&t=25&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&refcode=em220129-1-30&t=26&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**
---
****
We already have filed a lawsuit against the NRA to hold them accountable for their $35 million in illegal campaign contributions in previous election years. This year, we can only imagine they will do whatever they can to elect politicians in their pocket. We need to protect our gun safety majority in Congress and ensure that the gun lobby does not roll back our decades of progress.
Thank you for pitching in and keeping up the fight with us.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?refcode=em220129-1-30&t=27&refcode2=1494_3935704_d8XYiN&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1494%2E3935704%2Ed8XYiN) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Marcy Kaptur | |

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBngRxwV-5o5_Ed1MEV24Vk6x0SMO_peMdV1HGqClcYVgQSXGFzu6jUUsoEt8nX0s2ERxV6E7wznMlk2SM9gDZMXD1q7HB_Y-whTDmlVcXhPaO5X6Ba8WrpeJsEefkzHHgQah0B2P9cgP00x7qKdlWOtd3LrF2pzhryxuJR44XxlLwl8gTPaG5BVWQ-TtKp-b56p2xkmTjSol4X7L-8f2Lpoy_WBnkdsucESGjfJvN7QmF_LTartNB0uuygH54wvqycorbZRIKm7kccyBA7FBGXpi4vkzwe5RTSNDSNd5tSkBB-7rWC5rXNlGDHGyQGMwZdFqidSBUT7VOR3VGijsV2pXvU9A2ytf7dwqAHqq0Gey8nTGc08KTwUIuIhh2Pb56qnP6brDZhyed_5ZHyr7G6E/3j4/YjZequBfREKPQT7g2r5p-w/h0/iXEZIhv1Bwxd95EJaC6GtV6t1PblPInLsB8drbL8lIc)

| | Team,

**ICYMI: We have some great news on the technology front.** Ohio just became the future location of the newest Intel Inside Semiconductor Chip factory. [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBngRxwV-5o5_Ed1MEV24Vk6x0SMO_peMdV1HGqClcYVgOnPjgsgXW0d1ff37dkLRW2beGZXJMpyWSXpbnqXkAE6XDQzYRYYcp7jLMKMoImkS4tOXhDecVk56oj9fTOA1otKR_P0Lduuj_n_PhGKJxAyMgRPOEp_cUdXl3ThJJ8jvcByrWttoCZyD2Hd96hwCIqwh2V1V7ShBgKpcUSJ39wvlv2qEifpcLoeiLjj0PSsi2LUr0-mtNXR_4ivugYy8Wviy1lolvYSsh21D3l0cRUiLpKMvqevooWYdtO2FYuiam0rqAHWoYmnHxtvYDSFNQWIwN39SSA18Gjih15TWPZKgLXKoKcMSRHNiFRD4-qXhWAoy_vGt8V4YI_W4wA856WD30VaQ-5iRhX3BXuGNA9U3JdA1S9uiPe8K8HptPD_5/3j4/YjZequBfREKPQT7g2r5p-w/h1/4BxkZX0rW1TfhloXjYYwMvoeqPX04jFm8L3aM3FKP2A)
This **$20 billion investment** is expected to create tens of thousands of jobs in Ohio and revamp our state’s auto and tech industries.

**[As you know, manufacturing is one of Marcy’s signature issues. That’s why she has supported legislation that helped to attract Intel to Ohio. It’s now more urgent than ever that we keep Marcy Kaptur in Congress fighting for projects like this. Will you contribute $25 to make sure we hit our January fundraising goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBngRxwV-5o5_Ed1MEV24Vk6x0SMO_peMdV1HGqClcYVgO_z5jZutT1h6pi1I11Y8A4tyiLO11w4haQNazkC703DLB3JSe8_8x4MKV3XcT3qZYVNyxSOe1bKdSnx-rj0zAh5CkeaBKV1CO2PZRChf9nXzz4TbR6Nn345Lu4C2wDLelBSAmZGt57SywhcU5ANV8vfrKLnfZ6XbS2SjwM358bkWFpPOqFewRB72WwYHkmTO3uJtvdxvr4KZxe9aU6FFc2QtA1RNZ_CxIud7uw5YPzPw134LoahAcfi1H1EOqKYWxtQLx995cjyDindT4jYIl0L9JRPB1AbfHy79Ic8fc1qKguqhNSLmRQc68wJYcTP_TuUxNvqLBCEmr5g_fIrA1yRFoZZGU-KNaQkM_Qul-W-uClQUIfm5cU0YZ5Kah6G1/3j4/YjZequBfREKPQT7g2r5p-w/h2/0MS9KN8V2CqBNa1W1mkJt1OaKy3Fr_1sWMj5UahcMMg)**

**[](https?link_id=3&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-breaking-ohio-supreme-court-acts-3&email_referrer=email_1424945___body_1878292___subject_1878290&email_subject=a-big-get-for-ohio)** | [**Donate $25 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBngRxwV-5o5_Ed1MEV24Vk6x0SMO_peMdV1HGqClcYVgnKWO6upcpnDOHvVz3FrTS7xEIYHgFG69IJ8wKSKu9EgmlN0y90BFHhKV948fcKpMis6CkBviBrxsvrWERRf5WccndounMn6qZ4unNtMA9fjRqFvqaswRwJtpj2y73NEXLGAGnIxPFlF3m-MqSQXcImbkKYyb6D2zzaUwUM-05iXA84IRwm9kNJz1TZOJi7G5ZbonniRXpy-oDbVlrE6S8maCoBTGF9CyLlZ5zO_ebMV73QYbw-_qWzavoVT7Hj5GfhfIM805ABUcziL-hPZCUDihkCpXDiWVjZOrLlqL9U70kNzhdow2fdVOt2zWLCHfu6nNt-TnkraEJLGa5Jyf5cBP3nZKoO6YPSt9Dva5Qf-Y56XnHcGwpg3B9_uv00yL/3j4/YjZequBfREKPQT7g2r5p-w/h3/zftTQCNiOog1SqXZV4C93Sy2uxVMPbMhlTSn65Tndwg)

Congresswoman Kaptur has looked out for Ohio’s workers. She has a long history of standing up for domestic manufacturing, and now **her advocacy is paying off.**

Building this factory puts a down payment on our future. As Marcy told WTOL-11 Eyewitness News, **“breaking America’s reliance on foreign countries for these chips will be important for the next decade and beyond.”**

**[Marcy is always thinking two steps ahead, and we need to as well. _"In a likely general election showdown in what would be**one of the most expensive and consequential Senate races in the country** that could ultimately decide which party controls the chamber's majority, the poll indicates **Walker at 49% and Warnock at 48%** among registered voters."_

-- Fox News 1/26/22

Peter,

Numerous news outlets are remarking what we've been saying since Day One: **The victor of this Senate campaign in Georgia will determine which party controls the Senate come January 2023.**

This has been a big news week, to say the least. Not just ONE, but TWO polls were released back-to-back highlighting the importance of our Senate race in Georgia.

Look no further than a few words the media used in their news reports about both polls:

_"ONE OF THE MOST EXPENSIVE AND CONSEQUENTIAL SENATE RACES IN THE COUNTRY..."
"WALKER AT 49% AND WARNOCK AT 48%"
"ONE OF THE MOST CLOSELY WATCHED AND EXPENSIVE CONTESTS IN THE NATION"

name: Stu Thomas
subject: Josh’s new Campaign Manager
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Hi, my name is Stu, and I am honored to be Representative Josh Gottheimer’s new Campaign Manager for the 2022 midterms. name: Democracy Watch with DASS
subject: This worst-case scenario for 2024 is more likely than you think (read more >>>)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team, did you see this story from the LA Times earlier? The worst-case scenario for 2024 is looking more and more likely every day.
If Trump’s candidates take over Secretary of State offices in November, they could reject or change vote counts in 2024. That means they could turn the Big Lie into a full-on coup . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3]
DASS is fighting to stop that from happening and elect Democratic, pro-voter Secretaries of State – but we need your help! We’re still more than $10,000 away from Monday’s midnight deadline. Rush $20 or more RIGHT NOW to help close the gap and hit this massive $60,000 goal! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3]
RUSH $20 NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3]
Begin forward:
Team, the aftermath of the 2020 election was one of the most dangerous periods in our democracy’s history.
A sitting president tried, repeatedly, to overturn a free and fair election. He almost succeeded. But if we lose Secretaries of State in the midterms, 2024 could be so much worse . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3]
“If you think 2020 chaos was bad, imagine if Trump was put in charge of elections”

We don’t even want to imagine it. We can’t let it become reality.
Rush $20 towards our $60,000 goal to keep Trump’s hands off your vote!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3] Trump has endorsed loyalists for Secretary of State in more than one key swing state. Together, they could turn a landslide defeat into victory for Trump! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3]
DASS is rushing to match the far-right’s dark money war chest. We need every single supporter to chip in ASAP if we’re ever going to hit Monday’s $60,000 goal! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3]
Take a stand for democracy, team. Don’t let Donald Trump and his cronies take over our elections! Rush $20 ASAP to hit Monday’s $60,000 goal and defeat the far-right this November! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_012921_3]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jennifer=20Soldano?=
subject: Victory is on the Horizon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Garrett and I appreciate your support from the bottom of our hearts. | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=45aec2de8d&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | Peter,

Jennifer Soldano here _-_

**I just wanted to take a moment to thank each and every Michigan patriot who is supporting Garrett and helping our movement take back the state we all love.**

We are so grateful to those who have taken this journey with us \- those who have stepped up and entered the world of politics for the first time to make a difference and fight for the conservative values we hold dear.

As you know, Garrett has spent this month on the campaign trail, attending events and meeting voters in all corners of our beautiful state.

It's tough having Garrett miss dinners and spend time away from the kids, but we know that Michigan needs a fighter who will give it all they've got to **restore our liberty and put government back in the hands of the people.**

[**Are you able to pitch in $10, $20, $50 or more to help Garrett win the Republican Primary and take on Gretchen Whitmer in November?**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=3590cfbeb1&e=fe4b890356)
Right now, Garrett is on his way to Macomb County for a fundraiser hosted by a wonderful group of volunteers. It can't be said enough - money is message, and grassroots fundraising is how our movement will be able to compete with the deep pockets and dark money of the Lansing establishment.

Our January fundraising deadline is just two days away, and right now, we're just about $7,500 short of our January goal. [**A generous contribution of any amount will allow us to spread our message to more Michiganders.**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=c6c47fa4f8&e=fe4b890356)

---
| [Donate Before January Deadline](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=eb9d98e6cf&e=fe4b890356 "Donate Before January Deadline")
---
| **Thank you, Peter, for your continued support and commitment.**

It's been almost a year since I told Garrett that he should run for Governor - because the citizens of Michigan deserved a fighter with the integrity, principles and determination to restore our state.

Now, with just over 7 months until the Republican Primary, victory is on the horizon. **I believe that we will win!**
---
| Sincerely,

[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=a16504eb08&e=fe4b890356)

Jennifer Soldano

---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081
---
| Garrett Soldano for Michigan
1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=f7493b1b9d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7ef952e175&e=fe4b890356&c=f7493b1b9d).

Peter,
I had to forward you this email from our finance team.
As our first deadline of 2022 approaches, it’s important that we have the resources to keep our campaign going.

HARRIET HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING JANUARY FUNDRAISING MEMO Note: this memo is not to be shared

Peter,

Today is the start of our 2022 January End-of-Month Goal. If we want to keep Wyoming a Republican-Red State, we will need your assistance.

We set a goal of $9,042 to represent the 9,042 miles that Harriet Hageman drove in Wyoming since her campaign launching her campaign in September and the end of 2021.

Each contribution towards this goal not only sets the standard and goes to our filing reports, but it allows Harriet and Team Hageman to continue traveling around the state to meet with voters from every town.

Harriet knows that regardless of whether you are from Laramie, Hartville, Star Valley Ranch, or anywhere else in our wondrous state, your opinion matters, your interest matters.

Help Harriet stand up against an overbearing government that wants to take our property, control our lives, and dictate what we are allowed to think and say.

clean_body: | | | | I want to make sure you didn’t miss this. | Peter, I had to forward you this email from our finance team. As our first deadline of 2022 approaches, it’s important that we have the resources to keep our campaign going. While the polls say we are ahead, and the people of Wyoming say we are ahead, the Coastal elites continue to flood millions of dollars into Cheney’s war-chest. It is so important that we reach our goal of $9,042 by the end of January! Thank you, Harriet Hageman Proud Republican Wyoming Tough \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Hageman Finance Team Date: Thurs, Jan 28, 2022 Subject: Urgent Fundraising Memo To: HARRIET HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING JANUARY FUNDRAISING MEMO Note: this memo is not to be shared Peter, Today is the start of our 2022 January End-of-Month Goal. If we want to keep Wyoming a Republican-Red State, we will need your assistance. We set a goal of $9,042 to represent the 9,042 miles that Harriet Hageman drove in Wyoming since her campaign launching her campaign in September and the end of 2021. Each contribution towards this goal not only sets the standard and goes to our filing reports, but it allows Harriet and Team Hageman to continue traveling around the state to meet with voters from every town. Harriet knows that regardless of whether you are from Laramie, Hartville, Star Valley Ranch, or anywhere else in our wondrous state, your opinion matters, your interest matters. Help Harriet stand up against an overbearing government that wants to take our property, control our lives, and dictate what we are allowed to think and say. Make a contribution using our secure link: Thank you, Hageman Finance Team | | | | |

Our southern border is wide open. Big Government spending is through the roof. And inflation is at a 40-year high. to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and end America’s far-left nightmare? 10 Months before the election! [](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7c58b5fd034944e98d2f63d7f065514e&_e=EY0V16XLwnW-RrVFm5L4wJsChGQIpEVxJxSHjUZVDV97in0KhULoz1VWrjnNQcsBLakhjMHje86KoXyZ6Ea0kpCuhHHay3SG_Hg5uvruf3v-uozLhu-ISYGu49LhWs51XctC3cUm3600pxT-5UGnvoAr6hYVTtA9UsCk5WNOmcSafxFSwcPc7DIyFIpBV5iE1karJFBPa9cO4iTvfMsX4OJeIbWE7A_n2KGmX0Iiwf1__4_bAWsUbCl5_BN2ncLmoK4Db0P_dVq9AKzDjloVl0rNs8VUw7zn61HnlzHXGJjE1AizSJ_DDMZrMcC9DM9a8UTsGr9rMy05dUs1z7H_lSRi9iAuM3Y_lU7b_9lKdVIbDW4S6pu64XqoSSGQCWtNWmGqDC8-I7WNsXHv3q9_vapngZoWICPvgthp_iDiJCsCydgWPWB8oarnFNs7SSk9ef71XCcBWhFOafJSS2-VZISix8Uo3O0CUkg7wnLnk9Qry_5w-QAFIzzFAOY9XvNA) Hi Peter, Claudia here. Joe Biden gave a press conference last week, and it was telling... He is casting doubt on the outcome of the November 2022 election, _**10 MONTHS BEFORE THE ELECTION****!**_ Biden said, **_“The prospect of being illegitimate is in direct proportion to us not being able to get these reforms (H.R.1) passed."_** That’s pretty convenient. So according to Joe Biden, all we have to do to make elections fair is turn over all election authority to the Democrat party. President Biden also said the quiet part out loud: _“it’s not who votesーit’s all about who counts the votes.”_ That’s why Democrats’ federal election takeover is focused on raw power and maintaining control, not voting rights, as they claim. Peter, I’m doing everything in my power to defeat H.R.1, but this fight isn’t won until we Take Back the House一 _[**Help ensure this bill is never passed by investing in this final fight for election integrity >>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7c58b5fd034944e98d2f63d7f065514e&_e=EY0V16XLwnW-RrVFm5L4wJsChGQIpEVxJxSHjUZVDV97in0KhULoz1VWrjnNQcsBLakhjMHje86KoXyZ6Ea0kpCuhHHay3SG_Hg5uvruf3v-uozLhu-ISYGu49LhWs51XctC3cUm3600pxT-5UGnvoAr6hYVTtA9UsCk5WNOmcSafxFSwcPc7DIyFIpBV5iE1karJFBPa9cO4iTvfMsX4OJeIbWE7A_n2KGmX0Iiwf1__4_bAWsUbCl5_BN2ncLmoK4Db0P_dVq9AKzDjloVl0rNs8VUw7zn61HnlzHXGJgt5JPqmEXwrNhXISz8mpac-kz1d2Kz4mDotqnLj6FseAPV7-Geu8iEQKIHMoaSI3fHyQVqBbGr2Bw211_IwpJ72HapJaSHNxEXsKwr_xAFsCZPMlyeKEyCkSxNBay5b2qhhcEoEkL-slKdEt8ejvJ_0c97dltMVSj_CQHxsKZ3uyPH-EMBEgxyB555JtSNNSP6wjqDFqT9FUfAStl9hBA-)_ Thank you, Claudia Tenney \---------- forwarded message below ---------- [](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7c58b5fd034944e98d2f63d7f065514e&_e=EY0V16XLwnW-RrVFm5L4wJsChGQIpEVxJxSHjUZVDV97in0KhULoz1VWrjnNQcsBLakhjMHje86KoXyZ6Ea0kpCuhHHay3SG_Hg5uvruf3v-uozLhu-ISYGu49LhWs51XctC3cUm3600pxT-5UGnvoAr6hYVTtA9UsCk5WNOmcSafxFSwcPc7DIyFIpBV5iE1karJFBPa9cO4iTvfMsX4OJeIbWE7A_n2KGmX0Iiwf1__4_bAWsUbCl5_BN2ncLmoK4Db0P_dVq9AKzDjloVl0rNs8VUw7zn61HnlzHXGJgkHTn5VaWNrXI7UhI5EEsNSILduDyBFf3654gmyhzof3MpiW9Ss2-VFexjYlS92sfhHjr2tNvjjGZelkWK7ZSQpXD6aYz8j_BsNnddThLzzuyzC1eQJmSplLOubLVST0Dq6beEI0FitGup2pIf1P8rgRtLJDM5Buxk8f0HHgz5DdeJ3HVZwVnN8WeUAa-xjl42d9-8_X5L7gqsdVAVKbbj) Peter, It’s clear what the motivations of Democrats are... clean_body: 10 Months before the election! Hi Peter, Claudia here. Joe Biden gave a press conference last week, and it was telling... He is casting doubt on the outcome of the November 2022 election, 10 MONTHS BEFORE THE ELECTION! Biden said, “The prospect of being illegitimate is in direct proportion to us not being able to get these reforms (H.R.1) passed." That’s pretty convenient. So according to Joe Biden, all we have to do to make elections fair is turn over all election authority to the Democrat party. President Biden also said the quiet part out loud: “it’s not who votesーit’s all about who counts the votes.” That’s why Democrats’ federal election takeover is focused on raw power and maintaining control, not voting rights, as they claim. Peter, I’m doing everything in my power to defeat H.R.1, but this fight isn’t won until we Take Back the House一 - Thank you, Claudia Tenney \---------- forwarded message below ---------- Peter, It’s clear what the motivations of Democrats are... Nancy Pelosi and Democrats are deadset on federalizing our elections before the midterms, but can they get it done? clean_body: | = Friends — Remember when we did something amazing together? When we took back the Senate, creating a Democratic majority for the first time in 6 years? When we defied the odds and flipped not just one but TWO Georgia Senate seats blue in a historic runoff election, making a 50-50 tie? We did the impossible and it’s all thanks to you. We were seeing record levels of enthusiasm and grassroots energy all over the country in 2020 and that’s why we were able to win. It’s time to come together and do something important and “impossible” yet again. Experts are projecting this to be a tough year for Democrats’ in the Senate, but not all hope is lost. It will take a lot of work — voter outreach and more education than ever before, along with lots of ads online and on the air — but these races aren’t over until polls close on November 8th. It’s our responsibility to do everything possible before that day to protect our Senate majority and keep Mitch McConnell out of power. So we’re reaching out today to ask for $5. Really. body:

**_🚨BREAKING: 2020 Pennsylvania mail-in ballot law declared unconstitutional🚨_**
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b3a4f04d6ac440e9992adc349de1b609&_e=ewg1N1sqKANtgNbjJSY8WKGrCsJ1KNyuEcPAtlod5-UuZYn-IYdMO9UadYg2m4pO8-52YMg6jfL3rkkKJpIS0b304LrFC6WuBvryNtG4Jf5x7rV_EXabJJAObFVAXAETeWX0ETxUxN6N2dLF68pI2HIg0O2EPTK5-M7YPKcZikI0CNWSucLklawq9y20aEIYB0aGfWS119cp-znuumB3MlFOLrTw7oTJa7SUmb4tLfhEuT6EI8zI4Xg0XeEs0AfSebTdmwkqHVu01Nl6_KwWgV2mXteu6AQf2Tl8m9wcHI-VDrpijE2zcv6c0gzQvg6DLGYOawHu1Rw1th_BDMifQuS_NEKmXuy_zkqDYr-PXmnFWCnSZczESdtqvTo8bqibmRfu1VMrOp_PTG2B3elOUw%3D%3D)
Peter,
You won't hear this from the mainstream media, but the controversial 2020 mail-in ballot law in Pennsylvania, which tilted the scale for Democrats, was ruled on in court. [_**Turns out the Pennsylvania mail-in balloting law was unconstitutional, as I said when I objected to certifying Pennsylvania electoral votes.**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b3a4f04d6ac440e9992adc349de1b609&_e=ewg1N1sqKANtgNbjJSY8WKGrCsJ1KNyuEcPAtlod5-UuZYn-IYdMO9UadYg2m4pO8-52YMg6jfL3rkkKJpIS0b304LrFC6WuBvryNtG4Jf5x7rV_EXabJJAObFVAXAETeWX0ETxUxN6N2dLF68pI2HIg0O2EPTK5-M7YPKcZikI0CNWSucLklawq9y20aEIY4Hb4YQ5SlgQhb2PCFW1o4H8eps1pEEvvpsp2U03KjfXnP3fmgmrPTlnsnHFkDKPX8xJrhX2QrKbXfXKTBN4MY6AoeLCn3kwYxSsW5CPaS1L3ZPH3PgrI7XyCyXFej36WUWXEwvb6vuQI4Cw5W4_EwTe8vFPN1JPHyWWK_2IuBMZhAg4Un_-CCnz6GNn8F11NrHFDEeHSmFzSB2rcplM0CA%3D%3D)

I'm not expecting the mainstream media to correct their stories, apologize for smearing and slandering Republicans for the past year, or try to cover elections in a fair manner. In fact, I expect the opposite. I expect the media to continue defending Joe Biden's reckless policies.

I'm fighting for the _**TRUTH**_ , and the truth is this — _**Democrats will continue trying to change the law to benefit them on election day**_. They want to change the rules to benefit them, and their devious federal takeover of elections cannot be allowed to pass. Like I've done from the beginning, I will continue to fight for election integrity, for a level playing field, and _**AGAINST**_ democrat attempts to hijack elections.

[_**Will you stand with me? We are almost at the end of our first major fundraising deadline. We need 240 new donors to hit our January goal. Be one of them ➡ DONATE HERE.**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b3a4f04d6ac440e9992adc349de1b609&_e=ewg1N1sqKANtgNbjJSY8WKGrCsJ1KNyuEcPAtlod5-UuZYn-IYdMO9UadYg2m4pO8-52YMg6jfL3rkkKJpIS0b304LrFC6WuBvryNtG4Jf5x7rV_EXabJJAObFVAXAETeWX0ETxUxN6N2dLF68pI2HIg0O2EPTK5-M7YPKcZikI0CNWSucLklawq9y20aEIYdSTLa16D5A-UiW_5nXpriVPfbYRDZgmGYJAkLifn_zydy4_8m5Eg4fdupUel8HzjRBxS26AVBEzNDBd-10TNJOMcQS2cpTLAELzlfgNR8p8kweJTp-ObkOe0aY_sfOb2xbagBMnmKEOhVcYUD1X7URr8Q5lDBhRYwZgKTSOr986AiIN9I6AykMqlqHW3tHDsOlnCo9hA5AF1gOBLbMcGTA%3D%3D)
In Liberty,
Josh Hawley

name: Team Lira
subject: TX-23 is a district in play
body:
Peter, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has declared TX-23 a “district in play.”
That means that National Democrats are seeing just how important winning this seat is to their mission to keep the Democratic majority in the House.
And John is our best chance to do just that. His service in the military and determination to win this race and participate in Washington has prepared John already to be an important voice and advocate in Congress.
To put John in Congress, we need your help to power this campaign. Will you contribute towards our End of Month fundraising deadline? We are still $8,727 away from our goal and we only have until Monday at midnight! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220129?refcode=em20220129]
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220129?refcode=em20220129]John is ready to work hard for the people of TX-23 and create change through meaningful legislation and creative solutions. We know he is the candidate with the experience to represent the voters of this district, and we need your help in this final, upcoming month before the primary.
And while the pressure is mounting on this race, and could make-or-break our majority in the House — John is making sure his priority remains on the people and as the focus of this campaign.
Join us in our work by making a donation today to make sure we have a fighter like John in Washington fighting for the people and protecting our House majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220129?refcode=em20220129]
Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

name: Team Chelsea
subject: Chelsea is standing up for Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
Her passion to build a better future for our state is what will take her all the way.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203566/327779560/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220129EOM_EOM_TC_TC_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTU5ZmNmZi0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xwf5NH8VdH5_Xs32r7ugiK5OUxGzzcpSTNdgQ8mkRRY=)
---
Creating a fairer, more representative democracy starts now, friend. After Trump’s 2020 loss, Republicans across the country went on a rampage, storming the Capitol on January 6, and then ramming through dozens of voter suppression bills. They’ve shown us repeatedly where their loyalty lies, and now it’s up to us to end their madness. Chelsea Clark is running to replace Frank LaRose, but she needs your help! An outspoken and passionate leader, Chelsea has never shied away from her duty to serve and better her community. As the end of January approaches and the year’s first of end-of-month draws near, we need your help. January will set the tone for this campaign, establishing Chelsea as a real contender against LaRose and the Republican machine. As a sixth-generation Ohioan, Chelsea is no stranger to the people of this state, and the real issues they face each and every day. Electing her this November will guarantee that we all have a voice, and that no concern will go unheard. [**So can we count on you, friend? Pitch in $10, $15, or $22 to help spread our message and reach voters across our state before our midnight deadline on 1/31!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203567/327779561/-1374079767?refcode=EM_FR_220129EOM_EOM_TC_TC_6_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTU5ZmNmZi0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xwf5NH8VdH5_Xs32r7ugiK5OUxGzzcpSTNdgQ8mkRRY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41203568/327779562/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220129EOM_EOM_TC_TC_6_NG_N_el10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTU5ZmNmZi0yNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xwf5NH8VdH5_Xs32r7ugiK5OUxGzzcpSTNdgQ8mkRRY=)

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: this fight requires us all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | |
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/P4raFvv3k_)

It's Amy Klobuchar.

I'll be blunt: **I 've been appalled watching Republicans in Congress and across the country undermine our sacred voting rights.**

That's why I was proud to join my Democratic colleagues in fighting back by introducing voting rights legislation earlier this year.

At each stage, Republicans have derailed our efforts and sabotaged the fight to defend our democracy.

And at each stage, I've refused to let them have the final word -- **because our democracy is just too important to give up on.**

But please understand: This fight requires us all -- each and every grassroots Democrat -- to rise up, get engaged and take a stand for our democracy.

**[That's why I'm reaching out today and personally calling on supporters like you to help defend our House Democrats and our critical House Majority.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)**

So please, can I count on you to chip in $3 before the End of Month Deadline in just 48 hours to elect House Democrats?

| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46321289&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MzIwMjg5OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46321289&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MzIwMjg5OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
clean_body: | | | It's Amy Klobuchar. I'll be blunt: I 've been appalled watching Republicans in Congress and across the country undermine our sacred voting rights. That's why I was proud to join my Democratic colleagues in fighting back by introducing voting rights legislation earlier this year. At each stage, Republicans have derailed our efforts and sabotaged the fight to defend our democracy. And at each stage, I've refused to let them have the final word -- because our democracy is just too important to give up on. But please understand: This fight requires us all -- each and every grassroots Democrat -- to rise up, get engaged and take a stand for our democracy. So please, can I count on you to chip in $3 before the End of Month Deadline in just 48 hours to elect House Democrats? | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Amy Klobuchar Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Mia
subject: Mia’s record of criminal justice reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
South Carolinians can trust that Mia will address the systemic factors that disproportionately impact Black and brown people. | | | Team, Having served as South Carolina’s first director of the Violence Against Women Act Project and the state’s top Victim Advocate, Mia’s deeply familiar with our criminal justice system — and its weaknesses. **Mia will bring the same collaborative, bipartisan, multidisciplinary approach she’s used throughout her career to the governor’s office to push for meaningful criminal justice reform.** South Carolinians can trust that Mia will address the systemic factors that disproportionately impact Black and brown people, and create unsafe environments for all people. But first, we have to get her to the governor’s office. **[Chip in $10 or more to help elect a true criminal justice advocate to the governor’s office. Mia’s counting on grassroots support to win this race and get to work enacting meaningful change for South Carolinians.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A35ugv0Xnc2MLuvOnhsL3t1ZB4qbJxKbWiqsfo8EZ53X2stvVH3Y8ya8dMmQrM83wQHk3LBAU2tPtqiGzSZ96-kyTKPH7XGInU6K4KM4_JGE88A1wMHHwdfLheqcbsSDbb7nLyZfRv5C8mnwJkD83_ZKto48rBE6Ww4CyjLU6YiRZ7RZHShOfQU5abinH_jpHH5qPMq-OPiGIo6zUORUV4yqwa6RYkA2lTMzLVRQJY9Xur365iN7hKA57r2tbY9dtrYDRd5vSoHqulPhx0_UCiOJqLBgsNtUZ6LMV_KCOgtlIci_1_hF9eGYV8zSQKbO7J0HSoT8m0JqjX8oA88GQrGM/3j4/K_klACe9RIqWSFFJcI9P2Q/h0/B_GwYSarFYICKdCmd-FqAlzVsn3E1ahtcSTmSwZe8x8)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A35ugv0Xnc2MLuvOnhsL3t1ZRDWZpeKHutzvffXKjlKmOsBh9OLxtdFru09_p95fw5lUtGt9Vdjxc3EowoPafROPvb9NUiZiBOAoxKXnTfHN24vUHu7qsgZW3Ebrp-HFVqJdcPL7MykQUqcphSuen-CQuWlRX9VV0gzIzUxLVAw72fkvt0OgNNgCNRdSpJWOzTAps6wabY4QPA3s6Kwa5xSRzW9UhdVRKFKWKVi99EwyQkqvbWDxTdiPaSdlcKdm8wM0pedr6JSHiYaclZ070Lq_r-Hw_d2YwILrNeiGaXAXjVvu_56omcl0nwyITzyyHV-lbWSFLncFwdqHtY7-3T4_65SNNplbksW7VeTKFnTTXQ/3j4/K_klACe9RIqWSFFJcI9P2Q/h1/a9LQCeN1nQuUHyWEzROd4--Hc5Z1_SyJ6AcKfxWPh1w)

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. name: Ryan McLaren, Welch for Vermont
subject: We’ll need your help to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
I’m reaching out because Monday is our first fundraising deadline of the year, and we need your help.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
Hello,
It’s me again. I’m Ryan, the campaign manager here at Welch for Vermont. I’m reaching out because Monday is our first fundraising deadline of 2022, and it’s a big one.
I’ll explain a little more about why donations like yours make our campaign possible in one moment.
[**But if you’re ready to make a contribution right now, can you pitch in $15 to help reach our goal by Monday’s deadline?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=3&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
As a life-long Vermonter, I know Peter has what it takes to fight for our progressive values in the Senate. He does what he says and says what he means. In an era of partisanship and division, he is widely recognized as a progressive leader and a skillful legislator who chooses governing over gridlock. If we are going to actually address the challenges of this moment, we need people like Peter working for us.
Our campaign is about empowering Vermonters and delivering for working families all over the country. Since launching, we have been dedicated to lifting up the stories of Vermonters and organizing around issues that really matter, like racial justice, reproductive justice, and voting rights for all. It’s why over 700 folks have already hopped on the Welch Wagon and publicly endorsed our campaign.
But we need everyone in the fight to save our democracy — and that takes resources.
We’re not taking any corporate PAC money, so we need grassroots donors like you to chip in what they can, when they can.
[**Our first deadline of 2022 is coming up — Monday at midnight — and I know this team will help us hit our goal by then. Can you pitch in now to keep our campaign on track? Our most frequent contribution is $5, but anything you can give will go directly to building a strong foundation so we can win here in Vermont.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=4&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=13&amount=3&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=15&amount=15&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=17&amount=28&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=19&amount=50&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=9&amount=100&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1278?t=11&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)
---

---
This is an all hands on deck moment for Vermont and for our country. Thanks for stepping up. We’re so grateful for your support!
Ryan McLaren
Campaign Manager, Welch for Vermont

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22jan?refcode=em_20220129_f_r_eom2&refcode2=91_61531_C7iKDA&akid=91%2E61531%2EC7iKDA)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen=20Brown?=
subject: Big News - First Major Endorsement!
body:
Texas AFL-CIO Endorses Kathleen Brown for Congress! | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=53c6e7fac8&e=4712f71bea)
---
|
## **Workers Are the Engine of Our Economy**
---
| I am so honored to announce **my first major endorsement - from the Texas AFL-CIO.** As many of you know, I started working as a teenager and worked my way through college and law school while raising a family.
---
| I am so thankful for the worker protections we had. I believe strongly we need more. A universal basic income, access to affordable healthcare, paid time off, maternity leave, a safe workplace, anti-discrimination protections, and so much more. **These are the values I will fight for in Congress.**
---
| For too long, the national and state democratic party have ignored North Texas, Texoma, and the Panhandle. **I intend to change that,** and we are well on our way. We are building the largest democratic coalition in the district in the last 25 years. **Our small donors have doubled in the last month,** which means hundreds more are committed to positive change in Texas.

**To get our message out and beat Ronny Jackson, we need to continue to grow.**
**Can you help?**

subject: Why I’m Running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MDQ0NDU1NDE4MzM3MzMyJmM9ejhjOSZlPTAmYj04ODcyNjk1ODAmZD12NmUzbjNi.htVRV75Rfe5DDZK_BAoOAaGDM6Alxaqe4SGyf0tGbnU)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MDQ0NDU1NDE4MzM3MzMyJmM9ejhjOSZlPTAmYj04ODcyNjk2MDEmZD11OHk3dzF2.bCT5icaWd5JjUVh9s4rTY85uHXIuV5kJFhtrXVfRcWg)
---
| | | Friend, ****
This morning I made a **_HUGE_ **campaign announcement.
I am officially running for the United States Senate to represent the 603 in Washington. _**Here is why I am running:**_ It’s simple... I was able to live the American Dream - the New Hampshire dream - here in this great state. I worked multiple jobs just to make ends meet before finding success and running a small business. As soon as I could, I wanted to give back to the community that helped me fulfill my dreams. I did that by running for public office, and I’ve been working with my colleagues in the Senate to make common-sense conservative improvements in the lives of the great, hard-working people of the 603. **But now, we need someone who will bring that same fighting spirit to the U.S. Senate, and represent New Hampshire in Washington - not the other way around.** **_[We can make this happen together...](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MDQ0NDU1NDE4MzM3MzMyJmM9ejhjOSZlPTAmYj04ODcyNjk2MTAmZD1yMnU4eDJm.QJBsTD3AHJc23N5X_dXCRMssN0izBBhyHZe5kGznoc0)_** I am going to bring the same commitment to our economy, to working families, to freedom, and to preserving the American Dream that we’ve shown in the Granite State. We have to replace the career politicians that are trying to destroy our country. **That’s why I’m not standing on the sidelines -****[and you don’t have to either.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MDQ0NDU1NDE4MzM3MzMyJmM9ejhjOSZlPTAmYj04ODcyNjk2MzcmZD1vN2cyaDVy.1eS9A6ITcdn8X0QRCOaHStuW_1ZaPdlkX-epmCw0Psc)** Let me know if you’re on board by clicking the button below.

---
| |
---
| | [603 NOT DC! JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MDQ0NDU1NDE4MzM3MzMyJmM9ejhjOSZlPTAmYj04ODcyNjk2NzYmZD13N3MxcDZn.iNQMJbdHdFubL3fiUNpy_hslWCsYsuJod6BwOph4Eds)
---
---
| | | Thank you!

-_Chuck Morse
_ _
__**P.S. With an open Supreme Court seat hanging in the balance, we have to do everything we can to stop a radical activist from being confirmed in the U.S. Senate. Can you rush in $20.22 to show the Radical Left you won’t go down without a fight in 2022?****[CLICK HERE TO CONTRIBUTE!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MDQ0NDU1NDE4MzM3MzMyJmM9ejhjOSZlPTAmYj04ODcyNjk3MDAmZD1wNmIwYTJl.tFsLszpxcmkvbKs33f1MaXMwZblpT5Uxp-1JGnGQZFU)**_____

-- Fox News 1/26/22

Peter,

Numerous news outlets are remarking what we've been saying since Day One: **The victor of this Senate campaign in Georgia will determine which party controls the Senate come January 2023.**

This has been a big news week, to say the least. Not just ONE, but TWO polls were released back-to-back highlighting the importance of our Senate race in Georgia.

Look no further than a few words the media used in their news reports about both polls:

_"ONE OF THE MOST EXPENSIVE AND CONSEQUENTIAL SENATE RACES IN THE COUNTRY..."
"WALKER AT 49% AND WARNOCK AT 48%"

"THE POLL PEGGED WALKER AT 47% AND WARNOCK AT 44%, WITHIN THE MARGIN OF ERROR" _

With ten months to go until Election Day, we're deadlocked in an EXTREMELY TIGHT RACE. One of the polls released this week had our campaign up by 1% while the other put us up by 3%. Whatever the number might be, both polls are within the margin of error. It's a dead heat.

We've got our work cut out for us, and we need your help. Honestly, in case you didn't see the news, our opponent reported more than **$23 MILLION DOLLARS** in the bank TEN MONTHS before election day.

**In such a tight race, the effort to communicate with undecided voters and turn out our supporters will be incredibly expensive. Right now, our Democrat opponent has significantly more money for his campaign.**

**[Can we count on you to chip in $6 or more before our Monday deadline?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8af731d418cd46b0a6784085867dfebe&_e=2VnicsXCqXOsBXZnyzlGCOM76IgYeubNPIgd0I66UBtRUnNK7QIs0POIaqVnFyNjxd-B4gfHfAgbWSfVHtKdtudFqqA13ACV8jgB0thYR4wAeEUxBodGwP24DqQ3QJPVNdK-V_SGi-CD96wzpt3OXppfb4T3rhzIceWS0a3okKAILhhEPsN5qd-gkRHEhk5iEF9o5-yIXQkeMJHjf0LtcpRjIXedkFSUvlVbWC90_8UIbYa9JkYgBa2Oc4-w_rZxJf7SZUMOhjYhDTPFKc8zR7wrqJu-Ev50QcPMZbFC3PEyQ9bFsHYvCjED9dF4TmH2S-MY1AdQ2pFjew04yyH37tJettjw0FZm_1jfj7Zuu4Yi3Rr8uSf3qz9QLsVUm3lbqodPoREoqBBpwGY67JxmP2nqqpy-W7BSUXv9n8N4KV9KNLbAASzZG5r4MSTiyKfVo-B1TqVXV5n2qgjbEQYLOgrYek9xZcSFomhDN5nQ-08%3D)**

We'll update you on our progress as we get closer to Monday evening.

Thank you,

This has been a big news week, to say the least. Not just ONE, but TWO polls were released back-to-back highlighting the importance of our Senate race in Georgia. Look no further than a few words the media used in their news reports about both polls: "ONE OF THE MOST EXPENSIVE AND CONSEQUENTIAL SENATE RACES IN THE COUNTRY..." "WALKER AT 49% AND WARNOCK AT 48%" "ONE OF THE MOST CLOSELY WATCHED AND EXPENSIVE CONTESTS IN THE NATION" "THE POLL PEGGED WALKER AT 47% AND WARNOCK AT 44%, WITHIN THE MARGIN OF ERROR" With ten months to go until Election Day, we're deadlocked in an EXTREMELY TIGHT RACE. One of the polls released this week had our campaign up by 1% while the other put us up by 3%. Whatever the number might be, both polls are within the margin of error. It's a dead heat. We've got our work cut out for us, and we need your help. Honestly, in case you didn't see the news, our opponent reported more than $23 MILLION DOLLARS in the bank TEN MONTHS before election day. In such a tight race, the effort to communicate with undecided voters and turn out our supporters will be incredibly expensive. Right now, our Democrat opponent has significantly more money for his campaign. We'll update you on our progress as we get closer to Monday evening. subject: Can Michelle count on your support?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Precinct caucuses, the kick-off to our grassroots way of endorsing our next Republican candidate for Governor, are on Tuesday, February 1st. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=7dd734e6cf&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Friend,

Precinct caucuses, the kick-off to our grassroots way of endorsing our next Republican candidate for Governor, are on Tuesday, February 1st!
**Can I count on your support on Tues. February 1st at your local caucus? ** **[](mailto:Team@MichelleforMinnesota.com?subject=Yes%2C%20I%20will%20attend%20my%20local%20caucus%20and%20support%20Michelle&body=Yes%2C%20I%20will%20attend%20my%20local%20caucus%20and%20support%20Michelle.%20%20%20)**
** [ Click here to find the caucus near you https://www.michelle4mn.com/caucus](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=b94e06669c&e=9d6926af69)**

**Will you help me get endorsed?** Download my caucus letter by clicking the link below. Take the letter with you to READ to your fellow caucus attendees at YOUR local caucus meeting**.** **[Caucus Letter Link.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=0c45eee70d&e=9d6926af69 "Senator Benson Caucus Letter")**

Let's get to work letting our fellow Minnesotans know that our future is as bright as their dreams of it are. I ask for your support and vote at your local caucus.

Sincerely,

Michelle Benson

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhbhbip7g4m27934vtvqeth1mf7i5cgka5ahffoo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqr6tdm6op77cjme8pr6oj1c9qnbd5jmlqm2dr6ecr6epbl6jh6at1lc2qm8ob7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj3ap5l6grr4cb66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j62p75c5i62oh5u)
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4ntlgip6v4rm22nhdccka6nlv8re33445f7q89o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5ieaob4c5h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv92ce806kl8dspn6m2oe236m06p51h21miv386o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5ieaob4c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zt9bjdp6kq98tej8j8drr77hnt5hi77t0npulmo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c5ieaob4c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2z4r21b3g9ae19h29slsg429nvt67lrmi9hfestv0).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

name: Charlie Crist Finance Team
subject: We need your help to defeat DeSantis NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Not tomorrow, not next week, but right NOW. |
---

| | Folks, we’re coming up on our first, _crucial_ end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022, and **we’ve set an aggressive goal of raising $100,000** to defeat Gov. DeSantis.

Before we ask you to **[pitch in to help us meet our goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211386/327817768/-966672334?refcode=20220129_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNhZDJiMi01MzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZnG4c2Na6VLCY_JvoYX-6vfOjB9iV8HicSPCSW5sKQ=)** , we want to take a moment to explain why your grassroots support has never been more important than it is now -- not tomorrow, not next month, but _right now_.

**This race is more than winnable, but only if we have the resources to build the strongest grassroots movement Florida has ever seen.** Back in 2018, Ron DeSantis won the governor’s race by _less than half a point_ \-- and now, polls show Charlie either neck-and-neck with DeSantis or outright BEATING him.

But DeSantis is not going down without a fight. He has his eyes set on running for president in 2024, and he has far-right billionaires from out-of-state funding his campaign to help him get there.

To defeat Gov. DeSantis, we’re going to need to be extremely strategic with our resources, which is **[why hitting our first end-of-month goal of 2022 is CRITICAL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211387/327817769/-966672334?refcode=20220129_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNhZDJiMi01MzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZnG4c2Na6VLCY_JvoYX-6vfOjB9iV8HicSPCSW5sKQ=)**. Raising funds NOW allows us to think long-term and to build the campaign infrastructure we’ll need to win in November.

**If we wait to get serious about this fight, we’ll be working under the gun to get Charlie’s message out to voters. That’s _not_ a winning strategy, which is why we’re asking for your support TODAY.**

**[We’re counting on grassroots folks like you to pitch in NOW to help us meet our $100,000 goal for January so we can get to work right away. This is our biggest fundraising deadline of the campaign yet, so please, give whatever you can to help us deny Ron DeSantis a second term.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211388/327817770/-966672334?refcode=20220129_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNhZDJiMi01MzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZnG4c2Na6VLCY_JvoYX-6vfOjB9iV8HicSPCSW5sKQ=)**

Thank you!

\-- Charlie Crist Finance Team

This race is more than winnable, but only if we have the resources to build the strongest grassroots movement Florida has ever seen. Back in 2018, Ron DeSantis won the governor’s race by less than half a point \-- and now, polls show Charlie either neck-and-neck with DeSantis or outright BEATING him. But DeSantis is not going down without a fight. He has his eyes set on running for president in 2024, and he has far-right billionaires from out-of-state funding his campaign to help him get there. To defeat Gov. DeSantis, we’re going to need to be extremely strategic with our resources, which is =. Raising funds NOW allows us to think long-term and to build the campaign infrastructure we’ll need to win in November. If we wait to get serious about this fight, we’ll be working under the gun to get Charlie’s message out to voters. That’s not a winning strategy, which is why we’re asking for your support TODAY. = Thank you! \-- Charlie Crist Finance Team | = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: re: Donald Trump in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Donald Trump is set to take the stage in Conroe, TX tonight.
#
I'm emailing to share a timely update with you about the state of our race to defeat Greg Abbott. **[Then, I'm going to humbly ask if you could add a $3 donation today to help hit our $250,000 fundraising goal and elect Beto as Texas' next Governor.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52082?refcode=ema20220129-173821&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=173821%2E444211%2EMi5b63)**
Here's the rundown:
**Donald Trump is set to take the stage in Texas TONIGHT.** You can bet that Trump will rally his supporters behind Greg Abbott and tout his endorsement of Abbott's corrupt, divisive policies. It's more clear than ever that the GOP is going all-out to stay in power.
That's not all, though: **Abbott is flooding the airwaves in Texas with attacks against Beto in every single media market.** He's already spent _$4 million_ on ads — an unprecedented amount for this early in the election year.
It's clear that we've got our work cut out for us in order to go up against Abbott and his $65 million in campaign cash — and that's not counting any money that comes in tonight from Trump's mega-donors.
But here's what I know for sure, and want to make sure you know too: **Beto O'Rourke is the candidate to finally unseat Abbott.** Beto has a positive vision that will move our state forward, and this team has the people-power to make it happen.
One $10, $25, and $50 donation at a time, we will build the resources to go toe-to-toe with Greg Abbott and his special interest donors. **But to be transparent with you, we're falling short of our goal to raise $250,000 before Trump takes the stage, so we're hoping to see a lot more online donations come in today.**
**[Now that you're filled in on the state of our movement to elect Beto, will you chip in $3 or more before Trump takes the stage to help defeat Abbott's divisive, cruel, and exclusionary vision for Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52082?refcode=ema20220129-173821&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=173821%2E444211%2EMi5b63)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52082?refcode=ema20220129-173821&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=173821%2E444211%2EMi5b63)**
Proud to be in this fight with you,
Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220129-173821-footer&t=22&refcode2=173821_444211_Mi5b63&akid=173821%2E444211%2EMi5b63)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=173821%2E444211%2EMi5b63)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: News Alert (Team Bartos)
subject: Fox News: Bartos calls top rivals ‘political tourists’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate |
body:

Hi friend, Darin here.

The Democrat era is coming to an end—and I'm leading the fight that's driving it out of Washington.

We have Biden and the Democrats on their heels with a record number of Democrats quitting Congress in frustration or threatening to quit, **not the least of them the most powerful Democrat in America:****_Nancy Pelosi_.**

**What do you think, friend, is it time to get America** _**back to normal**_**,**_**back to work**_**, and** _**back on track**_**?**

clean_body: The Democrat era is coming to an end | | Hi friend, Darin here. The Democrat era is coming to an end—and I'm leading the fight that's driving it out of Washington. We have Biden and the Democrats on their heels with a record number of Democrats quitting Congress in frustration or threatening to quit, not the least of them the most powerful Democrat in America:Nancy Pelosi. What do you think, friend, is it time to get America back to normal,back to work, and back on track? | | | ---|---|--- By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Get America Back on Track, Darin \---------- forwarded message below ---------- | Friendーit’s been quite a month for Joe Biden. FIRST , his unconstitutional and divisive vaccine mandate was handily defeated by the Supreme Court! THEN , the Democrats’ federal takeover bill H.R. 1 and the Build Back Broke bill failed and are dead in the water! NOW , his approval rating is cratering to all-time lowsーhe might be the most unpopular President in a century! Friend, we’re telling you all this because this means we're winning the fightーthe momentum is on our side, and this November, we can get America back to normal. A crucial part will be taking the gavel out of Pelosi’s hands this November ー END OF MONTH DEADLINE Goal:$25,000 Current:$12,361.73 Email: | | ---|---|--- By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Friend,
---
Right as we were beginning to pull away from Tony Evers in this toss-up governor’s race, Kamala Harris just came to Wisconsin to try and save his failing campaign.
---
The Democrats know that Evers’ entire campaign strategy is simply to BUY his reelection...
---
**It’s why the DGA has built a war chest of more than $54 million to prop up his campaign, and that’s on top of the $10.5 million in cash on hand Evers already has at his disposal.**
---
Needless to say, Monday’s end-of-month deadline – _our FIRST of the election year_ – will be the ultimate test for our campaign.
---
__**But with just 48 hours to go until the deadline, we’re still $16,818 behind.**__
---
**[Please make a contribution before Monday’s deadline to help me crush our FIRST end-of-month goal of 2022 to ensure we have the resources to FIRE radical liberal Tony Evers.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=52ea90f0d0204709b0b4bcaa29e5c086&_e=pylA4oV08zSrr_iDDMv2tYpdDp624dmhTtKETJbhO2M0-Z4Osn3jA-z9GCx5rBggP6K1uciSgppzgweerupdZkIjQ9IaPd7zx2JwqQ2orQL15oVhsNG62WTmLsVkpExqVR3rOuwTfskUA9NiLic4IzSfC7xip6TvL4oy7mmzwBVLQiN5jqYcV2wlgpJW-tUpXac8R7f7MJAfUgOciL4TtmT6br-r6txNlkAhSRd9ObddIMN5SO62EeuvS5S2H98ESEl6vYc_Br2bwIO1m91GZ09KvQq3UEkCrBw2o7tpYJzX_zPQLA9kYRJg0c6U4PR8qurO3Xjk4KSuj-54aOVVp0SxOIIouprNhw6ggaHegZlhfoyRNNpIeFe5pnIWAUUYI_q6wvs7Arkjgv8kPu1RMBDcP8CMo8YFi0iNgoSAdmv4kWanMbXYukpKPR8yDiPTN9KDzzrTa2HG9XJtOG-rJ_EnUyGDPRmxye3v5RvDjrdzTBm-a5Sygi0ZOQ8kzRZcM2yyzuSH1Enaxb-IkZkYVQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: They just sent Kamala to Wisconsin... | Friend, Right as we were beginning to pull away from Tony Evers in this toss-up governor’s race, Kamala Harris just came to Wisconsin to try and save his failing campaign. The Democrats know that Evers’ entire campaign strategy is simply to BUY his reelection... It’s why the DGA has built a war chest of more than $54 million to prop up his campaign, and that’s on top of the $10.5 million in cash on hand Evers already has at his disposal. Needless to say, Monday’s end-of-month deadline – our FIRST of the election year – will be the ultimate test for our campaign. But with just 48 hours to go until the deadline, we’re still $16,818 behind. Friend, if we fall short come Monday night, Evers and his allies will take it as a sign of weakness and swiftly spend their millions to double down on their lying attacks against me. Evers already DOUBLED our recent ad buy this month to drown out our new ad that exposes how his school closures are harming our children. We cannot allow him to continue this trend of owning the ad market. But to marshal the resources we need to fight back, we MUST hit our goal for the first end-of-month deadline. And we can’t get the job done without YOUR sustained support. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. body:

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jocelyn Benson
Date: Saturday, Jan. 22, 2022 at 3:09 PM
Subject: Tell me your policy priorities for this year, friend.
To: Our friend
Talking with Michiganders and getting feedback on how to best serve our state is one of the best parts of my job.

But with COVID limiting some of our in-person time together, I’m emailing so I can hear directly what you believe our policy priorities should be this year.

From protecting the sanctity of elections to improving Secretary of State services, we have already accomplished a lot together. But there is still more to be done, friend.

That’s why I’m asking you to fill out the 2022 policy priority survey below, so I will know what issues matter most to you. It will only take a minute and your responses will help shape our policy agenda this year.

Give feedback here>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7vYYy8O2AUawKD6Jz2Z2EA2]

I hope to hear from you soon!

Onward
Jocelyn

They want to replace Governor Ron DeSantis and me with radical socialists to ensure they take complete control of both Florida and Congress. It’s up to us to stop them, Peter. I’m optimistic about our chances of taking back the House in November. But with Pelosi and the Left reporting the kind of fundraising numbers they are, we simply can’t take any chances. They’re going to throw everything they have at us to try and FLIP my congressional seat, defeat Governor DeSantis, and turn Florida into a carbon copy of California and New York. Dr. Caraveo is no stranger to changing the course of history.

Her family has a rich history that originates in a small town outside of Chihuahua, Mexico.

Her parents moved here to Colorado in search of a better life. When Dr. Caraveo was the first in her family to attend and graduate from college, she changed the course of history for the Caraveos, and she wasn’t done just yet. Dr. Caraveo went on to graduate from medical school and become a union representative.

But Dr. Caraveo knew she could do more to make life a little better for families like hers. So she ran for the state legislature — and won. She went on to pass laws that established paid sick leave for Coloradans, extended eviction protections during the pandemic, and she stood up to Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Gas along the way.

Now, she’s ready to make history again. 2022 is an historic year for Colorado. Dr. Caraveo is running in a new district following population growth in the 2020 census. Our new district, which is more than 38% Hispanic, provides Latino voters with the opportunity to elect a leader of their choice to Congress.

**[Dr. Caraveo has the life experience and leadership experience to make history right here in Colorado, but she can’t do it without your help. We’re less than halfway to our $10,000 end of month goal. clean_body: We’re making history right here in Colorado. | We have an opportunity to make history this year in Colorado, Peter. = | **= Dr. Caraveo is no stranger to changing the course of history. Her family has a rich history that originates in a small town outside of Chihuahua, Mexico. Her parents moved here to Colorado in search of a better life. When Dr. Caraveo was the first in her family to attend and graduate from college, she changed the course of history for the Caraveos, and she wasn’t done just yet. Dr. Caraveo went on to graduate from medical school and become a union representative. But Dr. Caraveo knew she could do more to make life a little better for families like hers. So she ran for the state legislature — and won. She went on to pass laws that established paid sick leave for Coloradans, extended eviction protections during the pandemic, and she stood up to Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Gas along the way. Now, she’s ready to make history again. 2022 is an historic year for Colorado. Dr. Caraveo is running in a new district following population growth in the 2020 census. Our new district, which is more than 38% Hispanic, provides Latino voters with the opportunity to elect a leader of their choice to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you, Team Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. name: BREAKING via Team Ryan
subject: who Marjorie Taylor Greene JUST endorsed…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING: Far-right conspiracy theorist Marjorie Taylor Greene endorses JD Vance in Ohio**
Folks, our campaign is on high alert. Trump wannabe and January 6th agitator Marjorie Taylor Greene’s endorsement is a signal to Trump-loyalists around the country to go ALL-IN on JD Vance.
We’re only ahead of Vance by _1 point_ in the polls—so we’re sending out a rallying cry to our top supporters.
**[We need the resources to compete with the flood of money (and attacks!) her endorsement will bring to our race—so we’ve set a $10,000 Rapid Response goal that we need to hit TODAY. Can we count on your support to make sure Ohio flips blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211728/327819776/488172331?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1628-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGIwODFkZi01NzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybe65oinNjpkebmZLX0_pYgB38j_HRoGRkymZf9RUJ4=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211729/327819777/488172331?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1628-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGIwODFkZi01NzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybe65oinNjpkebmZLX0_pYgB38j_HRoGRkymZf9RUJ4=)
As if a $10 million super PAC boosting Vance’s campaign wasn’t enough—now he’s got the support of the most prominent member of the far-right. _If this doesn’t show that national Republicans have lost their grip on reality—we don’t know what does._
**Bottom Line: This isn’t good for our campaign, friend.** We’re already fending off nasty attacks from GOP mega-donors and this endorsement will only drum up more support for JD Vance from Trump-loyalists and big money donors alike.
**[This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign. We’re counting on our Democratic grassroots network to help us build the resources we need to win. Will you split a donation between our campaign and Jacky Rosen's so we can fight back against the far-right, flip Ohio blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211730/327819778/488172331?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1628-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGIwODFkZi01NzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ybe65oinNjpkebmZLX0_pYgB38j_HRoGRkymZf9RUJ4=)**
Let’s do this!

—Team Ryan

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I'm disappointed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter: These past couple of weeks, I've been thinking a lot about Sens. Sinema and Manchin's infuriating decision to block voting rights legislation and uphold the filibuster. I am deeply frustrated and disappointed by their actions – but truthfully, this goes much deeper than either of them.
**Let's be honest with ourselves here: The Senate is broken, plain and simple.** When I served in the House, I watched as countless bipartisan bills that would move our country forward died in the McConnell-led Senate time and time again. Now, Democrats technically have control, but the GOP is actively exploiting the filibuster to block legislation that would protect our most fundamental, cherished right – the right to vote.
Republicans have made it abundantly clear that they'd rather cling to power than work with Democrats to defend the rights of the American people or fight for working families – and that's the line in the sand for me.
**When people in power stop working to better the lives of the constituents who elected them, and instead focus only on their political fortunes, that's when we know it's time for change – and that starts with electing new leaders.**
I'm sick and tired of having our entire Democratic agenda blocked by far-right extremists like my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA). **But now that Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings, we've got a real chance to change things and expand our Senate majority by electing me right here in Iowa.**
**Peter, you have my word: Send me to the Senate, and I will vote to get rid of the filibuster.** I'll fight tooth and nail to protect voting rights, raise the federal minimum wage and pass the PRO Act in order to strengthen workers' rights and our unions.
**I'm doing everything within my power to defeat Sen. Grassley and move our country forward, I just need you with me. [So please, can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and pass critical legislation to move our country forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211731/327819780/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk578-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmIwODFkZi01NzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EVacI5Ik7b9J6TSXcc_WDm_nZIhRk44t3RBSSRHOk_4=)**
I know that pushing for change and going up against people like Sen. Grassley can be frustrating and hard, so thank you so much for standing with me and fighting today.

– Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41211732/327819781/496662621?refcode=jtk578-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmIwODFkZi01NzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EVacI5Ik7b9J6TSXcc_WDm_nZIhRk44t3RBSSRHOk_4=&emci=325009f6-eb7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7bb081df-5781-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=13784334#!).
