subject: Can you beat me at Wordle?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
Last week, I played my very first Wordle, and I’ve been hooked ever since. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefNtVKz1GKrNmannWzcNpzdjvZWCNBZdFMta4Y1_vsgZZDeTD2pXoMVTpzaZ7_ZcFQl9KrwNyZs1fl81nDW9ABU5mBsLTjJjR62T2sUlHuDjN74X7TYJrR0eSvZmGv1dZ6QBLUUc28b3fRAPX_EtCP3CHFKLcPeIwkBfOxu38UbYvhaGLrRdlHlzAsDR6ezZEMA/3j4/wU0MKZReTt-qIc2mojT0VA/h0/RIFQVaZuutLI6LyGk-Wme2O-PZWGmI1KCFMcqBfDdq0) Hey there, Have y’all heard about Wordle?!
Last week, I played my very first Wordle, and I’ve been hooked ever since — in fact, I loved it so much I made my own. 😂
If you’re new to Wordles, I dropped the rules for my special version at the bottom of this email. If you’re a pro, go ahead, check out your clues, and make your guess. In my version, you only get one chance!****
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmR36QUxKQ3Ni0mF8K0dR6LpLKbVl7CZU9RIGPSuX7HK7S4glyv0tVIzU8HO1VOSIJGpGYnBUiX7slWaidZeXsLpy3WM3yO2R0i_T5f3f-XbhgQlvrkBwTgBtLlBVRBczea-jMhzIrBnY-bBqkHSqBhQeCOrSegv7AgocBWsmqd893GPFJ-Lhg2FFB0hosVQHNzSILGdHEtoESqQR6Erwv5wZM0yHu_nxYeccGQGWRVuw/3j4/wU0MKZReTt-qIc2mojT0VA/h1/ZAcVFC_otakg-91jkCqanJvKurI7Q67P1DNeVSJ1N7Q) This little game has brought me a whole lot of joy in an otherwise tough month for progressive, Black and brown, and LGBTQ+ folks in Nashville.[**__**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiegQuVXpoukrnNpDzdY_3y_Wjl75EhdNjw6xkwMYjEGj_81lJO6GpztTxZg4v6prIUhL4b3i4SQDQ4VfiOO1InwD6zALd1DeWT_QNzSnXOfHvw7g3XczVsvDtAcrvVm9xw7qwQgN7qQ9DMcMbl6HDkJft9-VRPmRygwQkSH15sTiDf8Mdi_FOpuDaZdsHH5HwGZmGAV-DkOzKiPZNojwi9hBgkyDm6wRtbuG20GYjteR0kh531bU2h_UUIgvEZny0KiMP3JvrxVufWLtxYc50btFgwz49VVvpgpAVlrwlyqg/3j4/wU0MKZReTt-qIc2mojT0VA/h2/eewi_kqpX7uOp0xXZEoP7qvSr6k830sR7TevHesnhTA) If you’re new, here are the rules:
* The goal is to guess the Wordle. It’s a five letter word.
* If the letter is gray, it’s not in the word in any spot.
* If the letter is yellow, it’s in the word but in the wrong spot.
* And if the letter is green, it’s in the word _and_ in the right spot!

In my version, you’ve already got some guesses to get you started. You get one chance to guess my very special Wordle! [GUESS THE WORDLE »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmR36QUxKQ3Ni0mF8K0dR6LpLKbVl7CZU9RIGPSuX7HKxxbnQPXWlXCrS4oonr-nQ4uce6q-3Ix2wamz7JkEGI5afIjvmFleNRloSTzfzgP812x2Dekz_mmYPp8CuDgTuehMfwuRBxCtsr1vhXNpko0vHSvLQWWO1XIX55jIUE91F7uSIL58oqSnxLTOJiGbC57wPgUTrdpbFi5XUFDo9jPdUz3aFIVBmnu49VaNzcbNw/3j4/wU0MKZReTt-qIc2mojT0VA/h3/LQxtR7T3_b3zCFapQDtIWy8jD7-Z8p1W-KYVZCobghI) Thanks for playing, Peter — and thanks for being a key supporter of this campaign.
With love, Odessa

name: Team Schmidt
subject: Celebrating Kansas Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Happy Kansas Day! Today we celebrate the “birthday” of the Sunflower State, and its admission to the Union in 1861. In the last 161 years, Kansas has Friend, Happy Kansas Day! Today we celebrate the “birthday” of the Sunflower State, and its admission to the Union in 1861. In the last 161 years, Kansas has become the greatest state in the U.S. to live, work, and raise a family. And today, we’re celebrating Kansas Day by recapping all of the great support Derek has secured over just the last week. We have a lot of momentum. Patriots from Kansas and around the country continue to support our campaign. But we need you. **If you can, forward this email and share these with your friends and family who might be interested in being a part of our team as well.** [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=74904983c59a460eb4d909e68a3667e6&_e=63LjfF5WIPSusKTzFMv0WoZG6Z5oPbdxQr0fXh4eb5-6NFqkilWqL-7ImYMtYu-vLQQQjmY7tpGou2_2DfrWPPv0F3p0-zMbtulAgV4rConoMOzns7PgcRgnscv7fTDZKGCjqywhQBfWu5UjsOo4V8mNNlVoJTPAQQ9etAu2czHewwhWSDClV99-SWbHGnLFn3Q_9MgnLrj4ntUO-rxZtDe9mHqncH39P9dUtF782DOQ7hHLeOjE6cICNANk6je7vVjwEGeocF68jez5wz48gqokgEi2W-NYXL4RTF4l0JwjMoecRCAYT3tsfWDu0JNi3srU_GuqeZY3EV-hw7I-vRaNQ1qxJ28lW6NVqNG9rc-8Ygwr6BzlH-ujx3_TPHuyLSogu6ilGMjLl9vH5ZBDfWps7TZHVeEz9YKDGuEmlXtcGIhUpbVfAecEHdrMdoqrhvUbwSeJygDneaR-t5eIkaR0Uv0KMMfSfylqdW_2uF-NrvsfMEettM_cpapYst2J) Check out our recent endorsements below: _"As Attorney General, Derek Schmidt has been Kansas' strongest voice for liberty, the right to life and the conservative principles that make America great. When Laura Kelly shut down churches on Easter, closed schools and called CRT a 'nothingburger,' Derek Schmidt stood up and fought back. As Governor, Derek will put parents in control of their children’s education and health decisions, create a climate of opportunity for small business and jobs, and always put Kansans and their constitutional rights first in every decision he makes. He will make Kansans proud as Governor, and has my endorsement and full support."_ **_Former Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives Newt Gingrich_** _"I've always appreciated Derek Schmidt and the leadership he's provided to our state. He's always supported law enforcement and been a great asset to Kansas sheriffs as our attorney general. Perhaps his best quality is that he always listens to Kansans for advice on how best to lead, which is why we love having him visit Rice County. He will make a terrific governor for our state and I'm proud to support his campaign." _ **_Rice County Sheriff Bryant Evans_** _“Derek Schmidt has done a phenomenal job as our Kansas Attorney General the last few years, always standing up for Kansans and always fighting for our individual liberty against both Joe Biden and Laura Kelly....Attorney General Schmidt has unified Republican voters behind his campaign and his cause. He received support from both numerous national leaders in the conservative movement and important state leaders like Kansans for Life. He is well-prepared to defeat Governor Kelly this November. Given his track record, his core values, and the vision he has laid out for the future of our state, the Wyandotte County Republican Executive Committee has voted unanimously to endorse Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas.” _ **_Wyandotte County GOP_** **Thanks for supporting Derek and standing with our conservative values. We are so** **grateful to have your support! ** Thanks, Team Schmidt | |
---
PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Our January goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so you know she’s fighting alongside the people to deliver for our communities.
#
Peter,
The average contribution on emails like this one from Pramila and our team is $17.03 so far in January. We’re proud of that number because it shows Pramila’s work is fueled by grassroots donations. Pramila doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so you know she’s fighting alongside the people to deliver for our communities.
So far this month, we’ve brought in a total of 2,732 contributions. But we need to hit 3,000 contributions by the end of January in order to hit our monthly goals and secure the resources we need to keep fighting for bold, transformative change.
[**So, Peter, can you make one of the 268 contributions we need before Monday at 11:59pm? We’re counting on supporters like you to ensure we can keep up a strong fight for our progressive priorities, like passing the Build Back Better Act.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9890?refcode=em20220129-995&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=995%2E420207%2E5G7oU9)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9890?refcode=em20220129-995&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=995%2E420207%2E5G7oU9)**
We can't allow corporate influence to drive public policy — we must do the work of the people for the people, not wealthy CEOs and corporate lobbyists. That’s why we’re fueled by small-dollar donors and it’s why Pramila won’t stop fighting for working people, families, and our communities in Congress.
Pramila firmly believes in the power of the grassroots and the power of the people to enact real, lasting change. She needs your help to keep that work going. And we only have a little over 2 days left to hit our January goal.
[**If you can, chip in to help us hit our 3,000 donation goal before our deadline on Monday night. $3 or anything at all will go a long way in our progressive fight.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9890?refcode=em20220129-995&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=995%2E420207%2E5G7oU9)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220129-995-footer&t=22&refcode2=995_420207_5G7oU9&akid=995%2E420207%2E5G7oU9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=995%2E420207%2E5G7oU9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=995%2E420207%2E5G7oU9)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

You may contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account. You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. By donating through this email, you agree that the first $5,000 of your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and the remainder in House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may also designate a different allocation formula below. You also agree that this allocation formula may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution to the Contribution Account.

Corporations/Labor Organizations: You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may not contribute to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account.

Contributions or gifts to House Majority PAC are not tax-deductible.

body:
Meeting our end-of-month goal helps pay our staff, puts gas in the car, and more. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41206945/327794396/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGVhZmI5Zi0zNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9dO6Q32do40Qdw8R5MfS_L3CpRQZqxfFbusyC6Kx-1g=) Hey there, friend.

Fun fact, Montana’s 1st Congressional District covers about 48,000 square miles in Western Montana. As you can imagine, running a campaign in a district as large as ours – against a former Trump Administration official no less – can get very expensive very _quickly_.

**That’s why we want to be transparent about what we do with your donations. The money you donate goes directly to:**
* Filling the gas tank for when Cora’s on the road meeting with voters
* Creating digital ads to engage voters we can't reach face-to-face
* Sending educational mailers to voters in our district
* Producing literature to hand out to voters at events and meet-and-greets
* Launching our get-out-vote program to get folks to the polls
* And much, much more...

We think it’s important to communicate that these monthly goals aren’t arbitrary, they’re the _minimum_ amount we need to educate and engage voters and build momentum to beat Ryan Zinke.

[**So if you haven't yet, could you rush a donation now to elect Cora Neumann to Congress in Montana? clean_body: Meeting our end-of-month goal helps pay our staff, puts gas in the car, and more. | = Hey there, friend. Fun fact, Montana’s 1st Congressional District covers about 48,000 square miles in Western Montana. As you can imagine, running a campaign in a district as large as ours – against a former Trump Administration official no less – can get very expensive very quickly. That’s why we want to be transparent about what we do with your donations. The money you donate goes directly to: Filling the gas tank for when Cora’s on the road meeting with voters Creating digital ads to engage voters we can't reach face-to-face Sending educational mailers to voters in our district Producing literature to hand out to voters at events and meet-and-greets Launching our get-out-vote program to get folks to the polls And much, much more... We think it’s important to communicate that these monthly goals aren’t arbitrary, they’re the minimum amount we need to educate and engage voters and build momentum to beat Ryan Zinke. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, thank you, thank you 🙏 Team Cora HQ = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . California is an absolute socialist disaster.
People are fleeing so fast that U-Haul can’t keep up with the demand.
Newsom even admitted this month that it looks like a _“third world country.”_

Emily has been working tirelessly this week to help us meet our very first end-of-month deadline of the election year. When the clock strikes midnight on the 31st, I don’t want to have a single regret. Emily and I want to know we did everything we could to meet this crucial deadline and WIN this all-important congressional seat. But as it stands, we're still $22,170 short of our goal. Dear friend,
You may not think $21.25 is a lot of money. But to this campaign, it’s all the money in the world – and all the money we need. You see, $21.25 is the average contribution to our campaign this month. And it’s also proof that we’re going to win this thing—because of you, our grassroots supporters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41212404/327823570/416963966?refcode=X_012922_EOM_C&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTAzNTQ5My01ZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5wmp-YkKv7EYgha4zdKPWeC08AO1K3YsqpcThUmBo8=)
---
Unlike our opponents, **Kirsten isn’t counting on corporate PACs** and wealthy special interest groups to fund her campaign. Kirsten has you, the grassroots donors. And when she goes to Congress, who will she be answering to? That’s right, _you._
In Congress, **Kirsten will fight to expand access to quality healthcare** for every Arizonan and lower the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs. Which means our campaign won’t be flooded with Big Pharma bucks. But that’s fine. We have your **$21.25.**
Kirsten is an environmental policy expert who understands the critical need to **fight the devastating impacts of climate change.** She is committed to enacting policies that move us to the carbon neutral future we need. That means the fossil fuel industry, which funds so many campaigns, won’t be contributing either. But you know what? We’re okay with that. Because we know we can count on your **$21.25.**
[**With our first end-of-month deadline upon us, now is the time we need you to act. Will you join us and chip in $21.25, or whatever you can to help our people-powered, grassroots campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41212407/327823571/2089498197?refcode=X_012922_EOM_C&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTAzNTQ5My01ZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y5wmp-YkKv7EYgha4zdKPWeC08AO1K3YsqpcThUmBo8=)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41212670/327826180/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZlZDc0NC02MDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQqM9B2SxQsFAqBXnfhJHih6Ye82TJbyV7pRyOsAh0Q=)

Peter,

It’s been quite the month on the campaign trail! I’ve switched gears to running for California’s 13th district — _because the Central Valley deserves a strong Latino voice fighting for them in Congress._

**But I just saw the news, and more and more far-right Republicans are throwing their hats into the ring to turn this brand‐new, open seat red.**

So I decided to come to you personally before my campaign’s end-of-month deadline with a final plea: [**Can I count on you to rush $3 to bring progressive change to CA-13 and keep MAGA Republicans out of our communities?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41212671/327826181/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220129_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZlZDc0NC02MDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQqM9B2SxQsFAqBXnfhJHih6Ye82TJbyV7pRyOsAh0Q=) | [479 DEMOCRATS NEEDED TODAY: CHIP IN $3 TO ELECT PHIL ARBALLO IN THIS MUST‐WIN RACE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41212672/327826182/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220129_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZlZDc0NC02MDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQqM9B2SxQsFAqBXnfhJHih6Ye82TJbyV7pRyOsAh0Q=)
---
Peter — For far too long, Republicans have put the people second to their own greedy interests.

I ran against Republican Devin Nunes in 2020 — _and we came up just a few points short of beating him and his Trump‐backed campaign._

Today, it’s more clear than ever before that our communities deserve a representative who is their neighbor, who has been in their shoes.

**I’ve lived paycheck to paycheck. I’m affected by California’s water crisis. I understand the need for quality health care and lower housing costs.**

So I’m running to win this open seat for Democrats, _in a critical midterm election year where every vote, every district, and every small‐dollar donation matters._

[**I just met with my team, and they tell me our campaign needs 479 Cresco donations before midnight to stay on track for our month‐end goal. Will you join my team?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41212673/327826183/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220129_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZlZDc0NC02MDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uQqM9B2SxQsFAqBXnfhJHih6Ye82TJbyV7pRyOsAh0Q=)

clean_body: Now, I’m coming to you with a final plea: | = Peter, It’s been quite the month on the campaign trail! I’ve switched gears to running for California’s 13th district — because the Central Valley deserves a strong Latino voice fighting for them in Congress. But I just saw the news, and more and more far-right Republicans are throwing their hats into the ring to turn this brand‐new, open seat red. So I decided to come to you personally before my campaign’s end-of-month deadline with a final plea: = | = Peter — For far too long, Republicans have put the people second to their own greedy interests. I ran against Republican Devin Nunes in 2020 — and we came up just a few points short of beating him and his Trump‐backed campaign. Today, it’s more clear than ever before that our communities deserve a representative who is their neighbor, who has been in their shoes. I’ve lived paycheck to paycheck. I’m affected by California’s water crisis. I understand the need for quality health care and lower housing costs. So I’m running to win this open seat for Democrats, in a critical midterm election year where every vote, every district, and every small‐dollar donation matters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, — Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. body:
Is this accurate, Peter?

| Peter, we asked and assumed you supported the Democratic Senate Majority but we are **SHOCKED** to see your name wasn’t there. _**Is this accurate, Peter?**_ | **DEMOCRATIC SENATE MAJORITY SUPPORTER RECORD**

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: ICYMI: my interview with OAN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
This is personal. I’ll fight to secure the border every day >> Friend, In case you missed it, I was on One America News to discuss my experience living on a border trafficking route, the threat Biden’s open border poses for Arizona families, and what I am going to do to stop this invasion.
[**Watch my interview below**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fe18f66812c248c4b4337b57c29da598&_e=Gad1_TFcqg_K0Abr4gwwGg09QW87pSkyWVUXiK3vNOmI1uV_LxYRugk4j1f7YxQm8qWFLtCKJH1fkox1rU5-RpN6HxX-k0Z3B5fANL25XGSNBdvxGvUUBt1J5kFiEDlveFYL22cQc0ATJlQ90OXhgomjjV_Ink952C45wTfRAhMjQfTkq2z1YLkC7Phod7tuzy1MacR9EnP3NDIDFd5nlzRGr5XkOdDwz47LpaOmB4A3r3jHA0NMgXPvL8ElGGx0C2dFdDfeJAao5Tqk2oO4Ji0Ng1vH_Jj2NrtIUnuEcytfe0QtfeFuMCrGTVReBrfOWsiVeiYydCx2FqHbFn64vsb0a3R9TJzcBE76ugJf5sQR698pEmSIFDY2XUEsQ3Lz8A9AlyxNSt3RNBec6Bh8emjEacW6HOFT70lSZjj7bGTPfTVp-mfb3RBmWU8vTqmRiDIHyFDSAoMjedAdtEbnFSaeVuXTbqW5kyYcOXn5_-0%3D) ⬇️ [](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fe18f66812c248c4b4337b57c29da598&_e=Gad1_TFcqg_K0Abr4gwwGg09QW87pSkyWVUXiK3vNOmI1uV_LxYRugk4j1f7YxQm8qWFLtCKJH1fkox1rU5-RpN6HxX-k0Z3B5fANL25XGSNBdvxGvUUBt1J5kFiEDlveFYL22cQc0ATJlQ90OXhgomjjV_Ink952C45wTfRAhMjQfTkq2z1YLkC7Phod7tuzy1MacR9EnP3NDIDFd5nlzRGr5XkOdDwz47LpaOmB4A3r3jHA0NMgXPvL8ElGGx0Pd8r_tdTPkGhvT24suNcNn_-jOozIuRzSWJ4x63J_ytTxSAQ6BZlMSH9GUko9qnZ71ZnnTGlVdFlxvPeJ1zL-Rd0e383DwzXOdmk6mgyk_A469lj8T5-6GUlI61BChjmMs-T6oenaDqDkyJplwWCV_WYStppr2xhGlAzsHVr_qYEltBRjrrBcbLHrMJLF2nDF-cXS_2pIfdbE9bedTBb5V8d73gPD3uv6GnrmenjuCw%3D) We can’t afford to wait any longer to address this crisis. Record amounts of dangerous drugs and illegals are flowing across our border. Border Patrol reported a record 2 million + encounters with illegal immigrants just last year – and that doesn’t even include the ones who got away! As Attorney General, my top priority will be protecting Arizonans from this invasion and eradicating the violent cartels and criminals who operate on our border**.**
In only six months, Republicans will go to the polls to choose our nominees for Governor and Attorney General. **[If you agree that we need a Governor AND Attorney General who will FIGHT to secure our border, will you chip in $5, $10, or $25 right away?](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fe18f66812c248c4b4337b57c29da598&_e=Gad1_TFcqg_K0Abr4gwwGg09QW87pSkyWVUXiK3vNOmI1uV_LxYRugk4j1f7YxQm8qWFLtCKJH1fkox1rU5-RpN6HxX-k0Z3B5fANL25XGSNBdvxGvUUBt1J5kFiEDlveFYL22cQc0ATJlQ90OXhgomjjV_Ink952C45wTfRAhMjQfTkq2z1YLkC7Phod7tuzy1MacR9EnP3NDIDFd5nlzRGr5XkOdDwz47LpaOmB4A3r3jHA0NMgXPvL8ElGGx0mMHfzzNyzmpKSfWa-q9e3rXz_fZ815BqU-PHRFIndBppzeAQxs-mKLvbqFjQIcZ-RxkU0o8Gc-Jojs2YtmI6Dkol-RWyLElEzAXURGFLz3B_gWG45GfWoQEHXrPRmybo6-JGZ3c5DptWxgC9hqneyuKzqnXE9zXMJGHlr_e4VJ_uEVYgDNac4O2i0piTMp4mCq6kO8xUF59cH_kC7f_6ppTh3oEbBVJQb4DsAlcAzBQ%3D)** [**Border Security Must Be Number #1 for Arizona**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fe18f66812c248c4b4337b57c29da598&_e=Gad1_TFcqg_K0Abr4gwwGg09QW87pSkyWVUXiK3vNOmI1uV_LxYRugk4j1f7YxQm8qWFLtCKJH1fkox1rU5-RpN6HxX-k0Z3B5fANL25XGSNBdvxGvUUBt1J5kFiEDlveFYL22cQc0ATJlQ90OXhgomjjV_Ink952C45wTfRAhMjQfTkq2z1YLkC7Phod7tuzy1MacR9EnP3NDIDFd5nlzRGr5XkOdDwz47LpaOmB4A3r3jHA0NMgXPvL8ElGGx0TwMpoy9XvGCV8gFS7fwE--wXtG19S2O4ZDBnRPa46wvNXcdgCZA0ZvMFcegSWW80eQO75Kkpq1v6UGP1W8Ec3UQu1xO0hFvAi4o-Ngy-nWXlEB8IkKeL_nctuHHaHO3kStw4Jh3peA3PbaldPOrXO0pArNOPAUm0GHww8LU8WpB5ChMV14v8GbK4rLwlu2BeD-NMA9fcN-eBeJ3A1YfqL1-FlJilQ8mODrxQtTFO-Qk%3D) Even the strongest conservative Governor won’t be able to secure our border if they have a weak Attorney General who won’t back them up in court, challenge the federal government, and face down the cartels. **The establishment “Republicans” keep telling us we cannot secure our border because the federal government won’t let us. Let me be clear – that’s BS. ** I’m done waiting on our incompetent federal government to do something. I am sick of stupid proposals from people like my “Republican” opponent who says we can solve the border crisis with no trespassing signs. And I am fed up with politicians pretending that policy isn’t just as toothless as it sounds. Folks, we’re not going to secure our border with no trespassing signs. That dog don’t hunt! There isn’t a ranch or farm in Arizona, including mine, that doesn’t already have them, yet here we are and the invasion continues. **To secure our border, we need to be bold. We need to be aggressive. And we need to FIGHT for our citizens and our sovereignty. ** That starts with designating the cartels as the terrorists they are, seizing their assets, prosecuting them like the monsters they are, and reconstituting the Arizona Rangers as a border force to stop the flow of illegals, drugs, and violence across our border. And we must FINISH THE WALL. We’ll never comply our way back to safety or liberty, but we can take back our power as a state and protect our citizens. [**Join me and let’s get it done >> **](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fe18f66812c248c4b4337b57c29da598&_e=Gad1_TFcqg_K0Abr4gwwGg09QW87pSkyWVUXiK3vNOmI1uV_LxYRugk4j1f7YxQm8qWFLtCKJH1fkox1rU5-RpN6HxX-k0Z3B5fANL25XGSNBdvxGvUUBt1J5kFiEDlveFYL22cQc0ATJlQ90OXhgomjjV_Ink952C45wTfRAhMjQfTkq2z1YLkC7Phod7tuzy1MacR9EnP3NDIDFd5nlzRGr5XkOdDwz47LpaOmB4A3r3jHA0NMgXPvL8ElGGx0Oy5rAWNxr_yV8D-BGNtuGaPdUaVDpa7ZJB69iYOH9A_HD0jEy9NKN4h90yU8qPqeUfLxpnOUJsZ8fWNk1b19RTgAamso0POgO5W1SqY4wAO40ZG5K7nY555uii0S4o0DMzktrdRi7uboULjx0e2LVeRov3VlbJGDkIhW9FK7VoxXelD0oLLQ5-7mxrzHFEDD9bLZtnXULz54nv5LQTIQNso7DCnAe6IQxou0u6O2S6c%3D) Thank you, Tiffany [**DONATE**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fe18f66812c248c4b4337b57c29da598&_e=Gad1_TFcqg_K0Abr4gwwGg09QW87pSkyWVUXiK3vNOmI1uV_LxYRugk4j1f7YxQm8qWFLtCKJH1fkox1rU5-RpN6HxX-k0Z3B5fANL25XGSNBdvxGvUUBt1J5kFiEDlveFYL22cQc0ATJlQ90OXhgomjjV_Ink952C45wTfRAhMjQfTkq2z1YLkC7Phod7tuzy1MacR9EnP3NDIDFd5nlzRGr5XkOdDwz47LpaOmB4A3r3jHA0NMgXPvL8ElGGx086xxaLDEfiF_ufCU3doxQFhTAKXVCTabpvy0-Msjfj1OtbJjjBf-QmbmoJzyrtwQP35p4tZq3YpW82xfW1j0SMyWuX8GXtNByWN2uC5tRk-zWgy8Zf5HqsgSMxh1p0aS4RS5VuxauP58yXkCXq8mIW3Gdn7f9y5troUl0XrZq-ZLO-KRlHo9eTJd5I48ysb2bub4U1m2oKPjxuGZf5Eid5qWDcUnnEbHU7UQUMMttMM%3D) Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.

clean_body: This is personal. I’ll fight to secure the border every day >> Friend, In case you missed it, I was on One America News to discuss my experience living on a border trafficking route, the threat Biden’s open border poses for Arizona families, and what I am going to do to stop this invasion. ⬇️ We can’t afford to wait any longer to address this crisis. Record amounts of dangerous drugs and illegals are flowing across our border. Border Patrol reported a record 2 million + encounters with illegal immigrants just last year – and that doesn’t even include the ones who got away! As Attorney General, my top priority will be protecting Arizonans from this invasion and eradicating the violent cartels and criminals who operate on our border. In only six months, Republicans will go to the polls to choose our nominees for Governor and Attorney General. Even the strongest conservative Governor won’t be able to secure our border if they have a weak Attorney General who won’t back them up in court, challenge the federal government, and face down the cartels. The establishment “Republicans” keep telling us we cannot secure our border because the federal government won’t let us. Let me be clear – that’s BS. I’m done waiting on our incompetent federal government to do something. I am sick of stupid proposals from people like my “Republican” opponent who says we can solve the border crisis with no trespassing signs. And I am fed up with politicians pretending that policy isn’t just as toothless as it sounds. Folks, we’re not going to secure our border with no trespassing signs. That dog don’t hunt! There isn’t a ranch or farm in Arizona, including mine, that doesn’t already have them, yet here we are and the invasion continues. To secure our border, we need to be bold. We need to be aggressive. And we need to FIGHT for our citizens and our sovereignty. That starts with designating the cartels as the terrorists they are, seizing their assets, prosecuting them like the monsters they are, and reconstituting the Arizona Rangers as a border force to stop the flow of illegals, drugs, and violence across our border. And we must FINISH THE WALL. We’ll never comply our way back to safety or liberty, but we can take back our power as a state and protect our citizens. Thank you, Tiffany Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

name: John Fetterman
subject: The Fern Hollow bridge collapse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We need to talk about the Pittsburgh bridge collapse + infrastructure.
#
Derek, **we need to talk about the Fern Hollow Bridge collapse in Pittsburgh yesterday.**
Early Friday morning (just before 7 AM rush hour) the Fern Hollow Bridge collapsed, sending a Port Authority bus and several other cars tumbling into Frick Park.
Here’s what I saw when I arrived 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42133?refcode=em20220129-4380&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4380%2E434096%2E8GzBh7)
It was *truly* surreal to see a bridge I’ve driven across thousands of times — including the very day before the collapse — crumbled and detached on both ends.
We soon learned from first responders that while 10 people were injured and four were rushed to the hospital, nobody was killed or critically harmed. I’m so grateful to the amazing folks at Pittsburgh Public Safety for their quick responses, and wish those injured a speedy recovery. 🙏
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42133?refcode=em20220129-4380&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4380%2E434096%2E8GzBh7)
People across Pennsylvania — and across our entire country — have been saying it for years: **Our infrastructure is failing us.**
Pittsburgh is *the* city of bridges, Derek. We have 446, more than any other city in the WORLD, including Venice, Italy! We rely on these bridges to connect us and bring us together. We drive across them every day.
Yet, incredibly, more than 10% of bridges in Allegheny County are rated in “poor” condition. Drive around Pittsburgh for an hour and you’ll see for yourself — broken, closed-off bridges around every corner.
Look, I don’t want these bridges fixed as a Democrat, independent, or Republican.**I just want these bridges fixed as a dude who drives his kids over it almost every day.** And frankly, I don’t know how anyone can look at today’s disaster and think we can afford to wait any longer on investing in our infrastructure.
**Someone who agrees with me on that is President Joe Biden. I know because he joined me on the scene.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42133?refcode=em20220129-4380&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4380%2E434096%2E8GzBh7)
_This is what wearing shorts 365 days a year looks like._
Ironically, President Biden was in Pennsylvania on Friday to talk about the importance of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill (BIF), the landmark infrastructure bill he signed into law in 2021.
**Yesterday’s disaster is a wake-up call: We can’t waste any time making use of President Biden’s legislation to rebuild our nation’s roads + bridges.**
Too often, DC politics can feel like insider baseball, leaving people wondering how abstract legislation can actually help them. But here, the answer is clear. President Biden’s infrastructure package means $1.6 billion for Pennsylvania to repair bridges like the Fern Hollow Bridge.
And that’s not all. We need legislation that directly improves the lives of working families. We need leaders in DC who care about keeping us safe + healthy. We need a government that fights for us.
[**_If you’re ready to elect a senator who will fight for every single community in Pennsylvania like it’s my own, starting with fixing our broken roads and bridges, I hope you’ll consider making your first donation to support my campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42133?refcode=em20220129-4380&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4380%2E434096%2E8GzBh7)
This disaster drives home everything that we’re fighting for in this race. I’ve never been more ready to get to work for you in Washington.
In gratitude,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42133?refcode=em20220129-4380&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4380%2E434096%2E8GzBh7)** __

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220129-4380-footer&t=6&refcode2=4380_434096_8GzBh7&akid=4380%2E434096%2E8GzBh7)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

| Team, this may surprise you, but when we set an end-of-month goal, it’s a real number that matters to how we operate at the Arizona Democratic Party.

When we miss our goals, _we have to make budget cuts or delay certain decisions._ The last time we missed our goals, we had to reduce our advertising budget.

Right now, several Republicans are self-funding their campaigns and running advertising. Yes, even in January! If we miss this $10,000 end-of-month goal, **we won’t have the resources to fight back.**

**[Team, our goals have real impacts, and we can’t afford to let Republicans be the only ones getting their message out. Can you make a $10 donation today to make sure we hit our goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yzzoE-iqb2qABM_-1BoxXQ2h9iBjszfl4A-VTogu4_4x6ulup5Wavid8Kno0scHSBRfIGGbvlsGPrG3qssuxlGeMI9SymAaKSZ2i-Dly62PHdWhWzc_azavzZEGfgOeYPxjlAEfPF6zAPrITFN2vmlCYYDjgj0IVLg-kpObAxDuctAr7oymUcIhxNL1LnmR60fp2En6LTae86Op0IzDP5PWYyspeqytkHXR72wXxCPR-ZvNbJtF9GER_DAsCHLusjL55i7IALv36PXnGRFN44NrFK84nMrWEJLvcwdjUcOBGF_cRBqRkybWkip_I6_m-elYh6CQA9y3iuwbGirnzaP6P079u_JobLMzG5sqX1RQqrmVb1geSo5VFQ12MJbPgFmJnM7AVPPO9X2KwSRa9SDvmK86hlyDLZJ5sF3saBZKuffh6gdCQSONFxUhKVkF0w/3j4/uJFzj9ADQeemylVhAiQbAg/h1/8x0jCUMF8g3IFDN8O6lhJXeJ-XfGvPjsPTFACJF97tw)** [

clean_body: | | | I promise, we don’t just make these numbers up | | | Team, this may surprise you, but when we set an end-of-month goal, it’s a real number that matters to how we operate at the Arizona Democratic Party. When we miss our goals, we have to make budget cuts or delay certain decisions. The last time we missed our goals, we had to reduce our advertising budget. Right now, several Republicans are self-funding their campaigns and running advertising. Yes, even in January! If we miss this $10,000 end-of-month goal, we won’t have the resources to fight back. When we hit or exceed our goals, we can hire more organizers to run phone banks and voter outreach. We can increase our advertising and make sure we’re not letting the AZ GOP be the only ones getting their message out. But when we miss our goals, we fall further behind. name: Mikayla Ridley
subject: We still need justice for January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mikayla Ridley for Congress
body:
| |
---
Peter, ** ** The anniversary of January 6th has come and gone, and few of us are satisfied that justice has been done. Republicans still spread the lie that election fraud is a major issue, and they refuse to acknowledge Donald Trump's role. Make no mistake: those who did violence in the Capitol and who aimed to injure or kill Representatives were fueled by Donald Trump's false claims of widespread election fraud. Their aim was to disrupt the official electoral count; their exploits included government property destruction, several deaths, trauma-induced suicides among members of the Capitol Police in the following months, and a tragic reminder of how fragile democracy can be when we don't protect it. Claudia Tenney has added fuel to the lies about election fraud, and she's said that the violence on January 6 had nothing to do with Trump. She even called the Congressional investigation into January 6 "harmful partisan showmanship." To counter this influence, we must take action and reaffirm our commitment to a strong democratic system. The government shouldn't represent the selfish desires of megalomaniacs and those who would destroy democracy on their behalf. The government should represent the will of the people. We must fight to expand the right to vote so We the People can be confident in the strengths of democracy.
---

name: marcolopez.com
subject: Trump's first rally of 2022 was a smashing success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
Friend, we're in danger of FAILING to hit our first official end-of-month goal of the election year, and that's simply not something we can stomach. Not after all that's happened recently:
**FIRST: **Election experts at POLITICO called Arizona's governor's race the most competitive open-seat race in the entire country, and Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight said it was a TOSS-UP, raising the stakes sky-high.
**THEN:** Donald Trump came to Arizona to hold his first rally of the year with our extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R) – and with Trump's blessing, GOP megadonors are sure to flood her campaign with millions to defeat us.
**NOW: With time running out before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're falling short of the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win this race. **
**Experts at The Washington Post say the best ****way to protect our democracy from this out-of-control extremism is by flipping the governorship blue – and Marco Lopez (D) is the one to do it. But he can only win if we hit _every_ goal.**
**[Friend, we MUST defeat Republican extremism – and we CAN if we do it together – but only if grassroots supporters like you pitch in now. **Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. body:
We just wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's earlier email with some updates. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=de73b5fa3b554ed0bd7ca709b154de0f&_e=Qa_IPpjbts_Dcdsem-mx1v-ddzaKjcRdb1FGaLTZG0QoWtrdbQoPQr6r6N2t8bJ4atwKPaaCn_-c_AeXXDAHOfGWvtrLrbCwrYXCoBEkKM2nfPDMn0FJe8Y-8-vBUsV-3HZKjhoZZJF_HporPWSI9Jx_jNNelHsbhc52FeRzuZDeDFCjx20UnG-63bsx-4qI6P3GKfHPBmd7PtJ0TkQ_Pj37lu7mvwAQyRe3u2wfnMgTdZgkILdkFmmPPbsa3xCMgjcOk5G8glGUpkiNjPePxw%3D%3D) Peter, we just wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's earlier email (below) with some updates. Also, we have our first fundraising deadline of 2022 on Monday and [could use your help to continue the fight](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=de73b5fa3b554ed0bd7ca709b154de0f&_e=Qa_IPpjbts_Dcdsem-mx1h6YSsTFST86nszrp7q41giptzXUyqsaCMaN3SFY5_5Te_713m5OgML2wABYGYmSvWQZDneZMmVNdnc1IV4Jj2fpL0kjksP-I8jxOF-u6hzNPBEEPmxcLblm_LtOgAL6OCcj6_cfWakS9MUPxjTp_mmiFINVi1oiCviL4uDAKh4xCYpJn08AIzp8fP78_m6I-GK-_1DeEXqSHoHVusyMSY3ClTewG-qvX0_qEnABo_FicJ5TEcoPK39bomKQMH58eg%3D%3D) to restore sanity to our nation's politics. In case you missed it, Gov. Kasich had actress and activist Sophia Bush on his new podcast and they spoke about how people with large followings or influence can use their platforms to do good. Listen to a clip or learn more on Gov. Kasich's social media accounts! Thank you! -Team Kasich | |
---

To: Peter
From: Gov. John Kasich
Date: January 20, 2022

I wanted to share some updates with you.

President Biden held a press conference this week to reflect on his first year in office. He certainly had some meaningful accomplishments like the bipartisan infrastructure bill, but there were also failures with the military withdrawal from Afghanistan and the inability to reach across the aisle on his other legislative priorities.

Unfortunately, he championed the agenda of the far left rather than keeping his campaign promise to heal Washington and bring about bipartisanship. He needs to shift his strategy to working with moderate Republicans on many of the issues where there can be compromise, such as prescription drug costs, the child tax credit, making government more efficient and efforts to tackle inflation.

As for the Republicans in Congress, they have a real opportunity to take control of the U.S. House, and maybe even the Senate. For that to happen, there needs to be a real agenda to rally around. Loyalty to a former president isn't enough.

You can view clips on my social media account of recent interviews on this topic and other current events.

I'm also excited to share with you that I have a new podcast that will launch on January 27th! I'm teaming up with comedian Jordan Klepper to host a program that will be about life and the fascinating people out there. Please follow along on my social media for more details!

clean_body: We just wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's earlier email with some updates. Peter, we just wanted to make sure that you saw Gov. Kasich's earlier email (below) with some updates. Also, we have our first fundraising deadline of 2022 on Monday and to restore sanity to our nation's politics. In case you missed it, Gov. Kasich had actress and activist Sophia Bush on his new podcast and they spoke about how people with large followings or influence can use their platforms to do good. Listen to a clip or learn more on Gov. Kasich's social media accounts! Thank you! -Team Kasich | | To: Peter From: Gov. John Kasich Date: January 20, 2022 I wanted to share some updates with you. President Biden held a press conference this week to reflect on his first year in office. He certainly had some meaningful accomplishments like the bipartisan infrastructure bill, but there were also failures with the military withdrawal from Afghanistan and the inability to reach across the aisle on his other legislative priorities. Unfortunately, he championed the agenda of the far left rather than keeping his campaign promise to heal Washington and bring about bipartisanship. He needs to shift his strategy to working with moderate Republicans on many of the issues where there can be compromise, such as prescription drug costs, the child tax credit, making government more efficient and efforts to tackle inflation. As for the Republicans in Congress, they have a real opportunity to take control of the U.S. House, and maybe even the Senate. For that to happen, there needs to be a real agenda to rally around. Loyalty to a former president isn't enough. You can view clips on my social media account of recent interviews on this topic and other current events. name: Randolph Bracy
subject: Here’s why I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter—

Throughout my life, I’ve worked to move our community forward, put our kids first, and protect our Democracy.

I’ve spent the past 10 years in the State Legislature doing that in the face of dangerous Republican Governors like Ron DeSantis. Now, I’m ready to take that fight to Congress.

Take a look at who’s sitting in the House of Representatives right now.

Close to 150 Republicans voted to undermine our democracy by decertifying the 2020 election.

More than a year after the January 6th insurrection, Republicans are refusing to take responsibility for their role in the attack. And they’re refusing to protect voting rights.

I’m running for Congress to fight back, protect our democracy, and stand up for our community.

Peter, I need you in this fight. Click here to chip in now and help us win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=eoy1] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=eoy1] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=eoy1] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=eoy1] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=eoy1] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=eoy1]We can’t take ANYTHING for granted heading into 2022. Republicans will be targeting every seat on the map–including this one.
I need you on my team to keep this seat blue.
I hope I can count on your support. Thank you.

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. name: Max Steiner
subject: 14 years ago today, I almost died.
body:
Alive Day is the anniversary of the day a service member almost died, but didn't. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41209082/327807080/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzM1NTgxZC0zZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4-5nEq_y9RHjt_b-khF1SmGOsSQtAC6V71AycbvFpA=)
Today is my Alive Day, friend.

For those who don't know, an Alive Day is the anniversary of the day a service member almost died, but didn't.

On this day 14 years ago, I was on patrol in Iraq navigating a convoy of humvees when our truck ran over an improvised explosive device (IED).

Had the remote operator detonated the device a millisecond later, I would have been killed. Instead, the IED blew up in front of the armored crew compartment and we made it out. We were very much injured, but alive nonetheless. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41209083/327807081/360059203?refcode=em-1.29.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzM1NTgxZC0zZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4-5nEq_y9RHjt_b-khF1SmGOsSQtAC6V71AycbvFpA=)
_The wreckage from the IED explosion_ One lesson (among many) that I reflect on today is that our country has been ill-served by a Congress full of armchair generals and think-tank strategists. These folks are responsible for squandering billions of dollars and countless lives on interventions overseas.

**It's easy to beat the war drum when your life is not on the line. But those who serve know best that our men and women must be used sparingly and decisively -- and only when it means protecting our country. That notion is sorely lacking in Congress.**

My opponent Doug LaMalfa has never worn the uniform, but even now he won't hesitate to fan the flames and play politics when it comes to our military. It's irresponsible, and there's no room for it in Congress.

We need to elect more people who served in the military and understand the stakes. That's why I'm stepping up to run, and it's why I need your help:

**[We're coming up on our end-of-month fundraising deadline and we're still a bit short of our $20,000 goal to unseat Doug LaMalfa. If you're ready to flip CA-01 and change Congress for the better, chip in $ to support my grassroots campaign today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41209084/327807082/360059203?refcode=em-1.29.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzM1NTgxZC0zZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4-5nEq_y9RHjt_b-khF1SmGOsSQtAC6V71AycbvFpA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41209085/327807110/360059203?refcode=em-1.29.22-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzM1NTgxZC0zZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O4-5nEq_y9RHjt_b-khF1SmGOsSQtAC6V71AycbvFpA=)

clean_body: Alive Day is the anniversary of the day a service member almost died, but didn't. | = Today is my Alive Day, friend. For those who don't know, an Alive Day is the anniversary of the day a service member almost died, but didn't. On this day 14 years ago, I was on patrol in Iraq navigating a convoy of humvees when our truck ran over an improvised explosive device (IED). Had the remote operator detonated the device a millisecond later, I would have been killed. Instead, the IED blew up in front of the armored crew compartment and we made it out. We were very much injured, but alive nonetheless. = The wreckage from the IED explosion One lesson (among many) that I reflect on today is that our country has been ill-served by a Congress full of armchair generals and think-tank strategists. These folks are responsible for squandering billions of dollars and countless lives on interventions overseas. It's easy to beat the war drum when your life is not on the line. But those who serve know best that our men and women must be used sparingly and decisively -- and only when it means protecting our country. That notion is sorely lacking in Congress. My opponent Doug LaMalfa has never worn the uniform, but even now he won't hesitate to fan the flames and play politics when it comes to our military. It's irresponsible, and there's no room for it in Congress. We need to elect more people who served in the military and understand the stakes. That's why I'm stepping up to run, and it's why I need your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for hearing me out, Max Steiner Combat Veteran for Congress = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . **Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But Val Demings can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $150,000 before her upcoming End of Month deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41213165/327845429/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2296-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjIyNzVhNC02ODgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajX3tLW3eBoLQAi2FL8UIS9gHGB7vKJZhPc6DkpZVFM=)**

And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be. So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for stepping up. James Carville | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team._ By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Newsweek reported a poll showing former President Trump is the 2024 Presidential election. | | | We appreciate your prompt response! \-- Team Ruiz [1] Newsweek: Donald Trump Beats Joe Biden in 2024 Election Poll | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. body:
Hi friend,
Kathleen Harder here following up to make sure you saw this email!
My finance team sent out a brief campaign update yesterday that I thought you should see. In short, we need to raise $3,000 before the end of the month and need to ramp it up over the next few days. Can you chip in $10 to help me raise the $1,892 I still need? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&amount=10]
Thank you,
Kathleen Harder
Sent from my iPhone
---- Forwarded Message ----
Peter,
We wanted to quickly check-in and let you in on what we’re up against in this race. We’ve set a huge $3,000 January goal to help us prepare for the months ahead. Can you chip in any amount to help us reach our end-of-month deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email]
Dr. Harder is currently up against more than half a dozen candidates looking to win the primary, which means the ballot will be packed. Our team will have to put a lot of effort into spreading the word and raising the money needed to win.
On top of that, a few of Dr. Harder’s opponents are hoping to receive a nomination from the GOP, and it looks like they’ll get it. That would bring hundreds of millions of dollars of dark money into our district. Help Dr. Harder raise funds she’ll need to get ahead of the game by chipping in to her campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email]
-Harder for Congress Finance Team
Democrat Kathleen Harder is a doctor who's been on the frontlines to protect her community against COVID-19. Now, she's answering the call for service again, this time to fight for Oregonians in Congress.
Donate today to send a science-driven leader to Congress.
CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&amount=25] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2201-q1-kh-eom?refcode=220129-email&recurring=true]Follow Dr. Harder Online:
https://www.facebook.com/drkathleenharder [https://www.facebook.com/drkathleenharder] https://twitter.com/DrHarderOR [https://twitter.com/DrHarderOR]

Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
P.O. Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Finance Update via SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: We only need 6 donations from Cresco to stay on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Team — quick update on the fundraising front.

Now that Ron Johnson has officially launched his re-election campaign, reaching each and every one of our goals is more important than ever. We'll need every available resource to combat the outside attacks that will be heading our way.

Sarah’s been out on the road all week talking to rural Wisconsinites about her plan to better support communities across the state. This effort is really important, which means fundraising has taken a backseat — and right now, we're tracking behind on our goal.

**[If 6 people from Cresco decide to chip in a donation of any amount today, we can close the gap. Can you pitch in ahead of our first fundraising deadline since Ron Johnson entered the race? clean_body: Team — quick update on the fundraising front. Now that Ron Johnson has officially launched his re-election campaign, reaching each and every one of our goals is more important than ever. This effort is really important, which means fundraising has taken a backseat — and right now, we're tracking behind on our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Supporters like you have been the driving force behind our campaign. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Senseless. Another Officer Killed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Gretchen Whitmer and her allies demonize law enforcement officers while taking a soft on crime approach. | | | |
---
| | | “Kalamazoo County deputy dies following police pursuit and shooting.”
– Aug 14, 2021 “...the man charged at police with a knife.” – Oct 1, 2021 “Two police officers have been shot in Genesee County during a ‘violent confrontation’ with a gunman...” – Dec 21, 2021 “An NYPD officer was killed and another seriously injured...” – Jan 22, 2022 “DC police officer rushed to hospital after getting shot.” – Jan 24, 2022
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter:

Headlines like those above are disturbing.

Every day the men and women of law enforcement put their lives on the line. We all know it comes with the job, and we accept that as part of our sworn duty to “preserve and protect.”

But in the past couple of years, _the targeted attacks on our men and women in blue have escalated due in part to the inflammatory rhetoric of politicians like Gretchen Whitmer_ and her allies who _demonize law enforcement officers_ while taking a soft on crime approach.

Last week liberal politicians used a study on disparity in police stops to further demonize law enforcement.

**I was the only candidate for Governor to back our men and women in law enforcement. Not one other candidate made a statement defending our police.**

Think about that.

When we have amplified calls to “defund the police” and a coordinated effort to let criminals go free, not one other Republican candidate stood up to back the blue.

That’s disheartening.

What’s more, in this state, we actually have prosecutors following the lead of their California counterparts in refusing to charge offenders with felonies.

The Ingham County prosecutor announced last year **she would “stop issuing charges for drugs, guns or other illegal weapons” and "limit" the number of felony firearm charges she authorizes.**

This is ludicrous.

If a law enforcement officer stops someone with an illegal gun and the prosecutor refuses to issue charges, that _puts another criminal with a gun back on the streets_ in our communities.

How is that good for the community?

In Washtenaw County, the prosecutor is _no longer seeking bail as a condition of release before trial_. No bail? Just walk free until trial?

Nuts.

By eliminating cash bail _these prosecutors are jeopardizing public safety_. When criminals are released with zero bail and they don’t show up for their trial, then what?

**These liberal pro-criminal policies are hurting our communities, and we’re seeing the results.**

In Lansing alone, right in the heart of Ingham County, **homicides increased 100%** from 2019 to 2021.

In Detroit, **violent offenses including aggravated assault were up 5%** in 2021 compared with 2020 and **rape was up 18%**.

It’s a similar story around the state.

Yet Democrat politicians want to just give a slap on the wrist and let these criminals skate. What are they thinking?

Peter, _this is very personal for me_. I’ve spent 33 years in law enforcement. I’ve seen the worst of the worst. There is no reason we should be putting our neighbors in potential jeopardy by releasing criminals like this.

**We need new leadership at the top – a new Governor who understands the issues surrounding public safety and who won’t cave in to the liberal “defund the police” mob.**

That’s why I’ve received the support of St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite and Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli. They understand the importance of having someone who understands public safety in the Governor’s office.

Please know that I stand with all of our officers, troopers, corrections officers, and first responders. They do an exemplary job under trying circumstances. We send them to the most violent cities to keep the peace and protect citizens.

_**Gretchen Whitmer has been a disaster for Michigan.**_ She has provided zero leadership on public safety issues, and instead has _marched in a “defund the police” rally_ and allowed her allies to _demonize law enforcement_.

She even ignored the issue of body cams for our officers for three years. It wasn’t until I called on the legislature to fund body cams for the MSP that Whitmer finally came around.

In these trying times we need genuine leadership in the Governor’s office. I’ve spent my career building high-performing teams to tackle the most difficult law enforcement challenges. It’s this type of leadership that is desperately needed in Lansing.

Do you agree?

If so, please join our campaign today. Volunteer, donate, endorse. We need all hands on deck.

A donation of $25, $50, $100 or more will help immensely. [Donate here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=b5f6b7c315&e=0636b97700)

Are you able to volunteer? [Volunteer here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=5354fe9296&e=0636b97700)

Are you able to publicly endorse me? [Endorse here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=9e1a2104b8&e=0636b97700)

Whatever you can do, know that it is _valuable and very much appreciated_.

Thank you. I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor.

|
---

We’re starting to think Senate Republicans and President Trump have lost your support - **is that true? We didn’t want to tell you this, but our Party has ZERO CHANCE of taking TRUMP’S MAJORITY back if we DO NOT hit our goal. The Left-wing Democrats and their SNOBBY ELITIST donors on the coast are HOPING Patriots, like YOU, have ABANDONED our Party. This is our chance to show them that America First Patriots NATIONWIDE are READY to TAKE TRUMP’S MAJORITY BACK. Your support is SO crucial to our success that we are INCREASING your match from ~~9X~~ to 10X. We have an exclusive 10X-MATCH waiting for you. All you have to do is contribute toward our End-of-Month goal, and you’ll automatically qualify for your 10X-MATCH. This might be your ONLY CHANCE to claim your 10X-MATCH offer before the deadline. subject: How we fund this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The ONLY way we’re going to have the resources to fight back against the GOP’s attacks on Cheri is if lots of people like you get involved.

#
**FIRST:** Democrats united around Cheri Beasley as our presumptive nominee because she is the leader we need to turn North Carolina blue and hold the Senate majority!
**THEN:** Republicans _immediately_ went on the attack against Cheri. And they’ve made clear that they’re not going to stop any time soon. Before this race is over, they’re going to spend millions of dollars trying to smear our campaign and stop our grassroots movement.
**SO NOW:** We’re doing everything we can to make sure Cheri has the resources to fight back against the right-wing attacks coming her way. Special interests are willing to say anything it takes to stop us from electing Cheri as a voice for fairness, justice and the people in the U.S. Senate.
**The truth is, grassroots donations in response to emails like this one are how we fund our campaign and fight back. We’re very proud of that fact, but it does mean we have to ask:**
[**Can you please make a contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign before our end-of-month deadline? The ONLY way we’re going to have the resources to fight back against the GOP’s attacks on Cheri is if lots of people like you get involved.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22/?refcode=em220129-2-t1&refcode2=324.357359.OuprCO&t=2&akid=324%2E357359%2EOuprCO)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: this isn’t easy.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Winning the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the country will not be easy.
#

Friends —
Winning the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the country will not be easy.
There’s a lot of travel, events, time spent on the phone and on video calls.
You have to face millions and millions of dollars in ads attacking you personally.
You have to watch the former president hold multiple rallies in your state where he goes on extended rants about you, trying to convince his supporters you are some kind of terrible person.
You have to hope that hundreds of thousands of people you might never meet will rally behind you and help you fight back.
All for a race that will probably come down a few thousand votes.
But that is exactly why every one of those donations matter. Because this could be the closest race in the country. And Mark does need your help — even if he can’t ask you directly and in person.
[**Can you please help Mark win a close re-election by making your first $3 contribution to his campaign today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. That’s our only chance.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220129-2-7&t=1&refcode2=2023_6688874_z5dceU&akid=2023%2E6688874%2Ez5dceU)

clean_body: Winning the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the country will not be easy. Friends — Winning the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the country will not be easy. There’s a lot of travel, events, time spent on the phone and on video calls. You have to face millions and millions of dollars in ads attacking you personally. You have to watch the former president hold multiple rallies in your state where he goes on extended rants about you, trying to convince his supporters you are some kind of terrible person. You have to hope that hundreds of thousands of people you might never meet will rally behind you and help you fight back. All for a race that will probably come down a few thousand votes. But that is exactly why every one of those donations matter. Because this could be the closest race in the country. And Mark does need your help — even if he can’t ask you directly and in person.
