subject: I just need someone to take a chance on me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_t=BZro-_Y3lQ_SiO_gev-aIHD7wnZWNbP0t3GEk0vPHjnPMPNh2L0DZ1JIm9JXTX5fMrFXjGLqUsW_q3nAbX6Zh4J8gv2XsYPsTkMzZdBYNyB4RWegRxO8Tu1938wwO7V8fkPdrsPtGUqHtZeiSP-f2lk2hVawbJuO4HI7U0ySswA%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_e=b6QEqSLWeFwjshSd7THOaUcrgphBw7tKI2pfbSH4hXJ9KWHHKUuRVcgEYIaFpijyUDYxZXL1261o8yfgdnEqgkLF2ovH35F8HbezqvPSaE8YIDNMmRsGEzqBFjx0JfL0JwJ5mi9Ks_pnOmV9QfThsC3WWe54ORiziLjdvtAOp4mx2OspD-PUb8ENhedtFknejei7OC3DKjk8egtqNOb6ZwREnlr9xKy2OndLpwiOIVlLpRnRNu4JzWszv6aZiwWzNNjK4R81OCPqJuZNnJs4OCA_Zr6qLEYfP5exTPNoVIOOCPrwnl0QlF-t8Z4pC2Knw6bpYZP4QzqnBINFA22dV7-pLerux34RUUIK7l9s65DNaAvQ2c10Q4WM1HNWdeHP3wnks0POx6Ato67zWG_I9O8sMjewSt_JMqwWOq-GhFl5sJIGqylqG8-VHcuVnbQWpaZn0jcgued_JMKnVFyURcPnPiodvM9geBBoNC2OQ5c%3D)

---
Fellow American,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[All I'm asking of you today is that you please take a 10-30 seconds to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_e=b6QEqSLWeFwjshSd7THOaUcrgphBw7tKI2pfbSH4hXJ9KWHHKUuRVcgEYIaFpijyUDYxZXL1261o8yfgdnEqgkLF2ovH35F8HbezqvPSaE8YIDNMmRsGEzqBFjx0JfL0JwJ5mi9Ks_pnOmV9QfThsC3WWe54ORiziLjdvtAOp4mx2OspD-PUb8ENhedtFknejei7OC3DKjk8egtqNOb6ZwREnlr9xKy2OndLpwiOIVlLpRnRNu4JzWszv6aZiwWzNNjK4R81OCPqJuZNnJs4OAQXrhRFMs5s1YcTQKj4K6fwNwrGvd-H6yKYivtCNl4zyfD2i3NbJZCVUzou1-r9RSRF6wNu5mvOV4otoWZS6DWjoecAsZpQpFywKJp49o7-OapCNg8TCRdG-DVE6KVDoJejfAoX5hrTl5UyJrGmL0L16yzjlSpC0iUhRQNR_675Zl7NDl79LY2ndYL0p26Kd0BvtyuBnGyVQMTrwVf-kjg%3D)**.

As a first generation American, I thank god every day the American Dream is alive and well.

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_e=b6QEqSLWeFwjshSd7THOaUcrgphBw7tKI2pfbSH4hXJ9KWHHKUuRVcgEYIaFpijyUDYxZXL1261o8yfgdnEqgkLF2ovH35F8HbezqvPSaE8YIDNMmRsGEzqBFjx0JfL0JwJ5mi9Ks_pnOmV9QfThsC3WWe54ORiziLjdvtAOp4mx2OspD-PUb8ENhedtFknejei7OC3DKjk8egtqNOb6ZwREnlr9xKy2OndLpwiOIVlLpRnRNu4JzWszv6aZiwWzNNjK4R81OCPqJuZNnJs4OCNZSx0f4Rli-Gfc9qTIPu_jUPsXYd6rpNXl3lEMzNp3gquN-VJFirPbToZX6kSk6T6c9zhuxEdbz450-q8mSk_3NPCQshkS-eN-vTWaEMWjctuR79A1oticih1xIi3_-s8s7l1aTYgdTAmxjbEDsQblo8A7mGERw_xbKyIK3ep8GILpl5jVeiJa08g3daxtot6P-0YEr_CgDsZvcf91dnE%3D)
A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO TODAY >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_e=b6QEqSLWeFwjshSd7THOaUcrgphBw7tKI2pfbSH4hXJ9KWHHKUuRVcgEYIaFpijyUDYxZXL1261o8yfgdnEqgkLF2ovH35F8HbezqvPSaE8YIDNMmRsGEzqBFjx0JfL0JwJ5mi9Ks_pnOmV9QfThsC3WWe54ORiziLjdvtAOp4mx2OspD-PUb8ENhedtFknejei7OC3DKjk8egtqNOb6ZwREnlr9xKy2OndLpwiOIVlLpRnRNu4JzWszv6aZiwWzNNjK4R81OCPqJuZNnJs4ONY1aiOOfRzT0LPkQuTGvKeseutvJxt0AolJZnhmDVZTIYttrBWTQELmpj_C_PbGGxP-S9idE5WjisYL2mp3Jpb7SlSFWSF891Nu3a3IY2yznZc6Q0w_58X7pf49bFwepGoZGb0ndWfS_DC5quaoJdQsWMyr5ViKXSSCtfEzlvDggvA-7QuFJ7_BFWE-HPKQ3bMVX2I3v_yoWexQWlBanvE%3D)
**With 435 members, the U.S. House is bigger than any one person**. However, my own personal story has taught me that just about anything in America is possible if you work hard enough. I believe that maxim still rings true today, and that’s why I’m asking you to send a few dollars to my campaign if you can.

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** TAKE A CHANCE ON ME>>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_e=b6QEqSLWeFwjshSd7THOaUcrgphBw7tKI2pfbSH4hXJ9KWHHKUuRVcgEYIaFpijyUDYxZXL1261o8yfgdnEqgkLF2ovH35F8HbezqvPSaE8YIDNMmRsGEzqBFjx0JfL0JwJ5mi9Ks_pnOmV9QfThsC3WWe54ORiziLjdvtAOp4mx2OspD-PUb8ENhedtFknejei7OC3DKjk8egtqNOb6ZwREnlr9xKy2OndLpwiOIVlLpRnRNu4JzWszv6aZiwWzNNjK4R81OCPqJuZNnJs4ON90GAkBIB7mDjl_En7hcCY-JLlqiZS0SoGxawXEP77dkt2O97gwaHLaALbTfjo3YWe4xxh0eXv9YiSMsQzxITVLhmg910fw9hgA-ozSSWsoVtHo1OPdI09EDRrc4rQ7uGZmlB0z7UwP8bgnBK3SopgLJ4pSdvQXgGpk7k9lDFnEhZ6443mz-qZBWnycCp-JBtCCS8cn-SZMUy5E_qYKAUw%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_e=b6QEqSLWeFwjshSd7THOaUcrgphBw7tKI2pfbSH4hXJ9KWHHKUuRVcgEYIaFpijyUDYxZXL1261o8yfgdnEqgkLF2ovH35F8HbezqvPSaE8YIDNMmRsGEzqBFjx0JfL0JwJ5mi9Ks_pnOmV9QfThsC3WWe54ORiziLjdvtAOp4mx2OspD-PUb8ENhedtFknejei7OC3DKjk8egtqNOb6ZwREnlr9xKy2OndLpwiOIVlLpRnRNu4JzWszv6aZiwWzNNjK4R81OCPqJuZNnJs4OHNnWlZtiakeLtDFZCGgTZmI5_hZ8P0-tCG3nfPFlj0--e-kcECxuUmaPxxlRVZtfl5G37mWqdEoGVbBizXm-W5NjyuLoKRTWDF1X7uUNDq984zWTsnnaObaoye271rJbSUJJQGJBxw0D3BjvatWJ15Px2EOmZ5XugryxjDj3z2tGQAFkH9goS4s-QAC8OX96lhYYFTNPLLUrpA5VrObLvE%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=84df24db07c0436c913381dae8f7be04&_t=BZro-_Y3lQ_SiO_gev-aIHD7wnZWNbP0t3GEk0vPHjnPMPNh2L0DZ1JIm9JXTX5fMrFXjGLqUsW_q3nAbX6Zh4J8gv2XsYPsTkMzZdBYNyB4RWegRxO8Tu1938wwO7V8fkPdrsPtGUqHtZeiSP-f2lk2hVawbJuO4HI7U0ySswA%3D).

| Friends, ICYMI, the Josiah Bartlett Center for Public Policy recently released the story below about the strength of NH's business tax revenues. **NH Senate Republicans have always fought to lower taxes on our small businesses** **because we know that when businesses are given a chance to reinvest more of their own money back into their businesses, that our economy will expand.** Last year we lowered business taxes and tax revenues are up! Despite proof that tax cuts work, Senate Democrats are still trying to raise your taxes. [Will help us protect the Republican majority and fight for sound lower-tax policies by chipping in $5, $15 or even $100 to the NH Senate Republicans? (Secure link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MTg3NzkxMjUyODU0Mjc4JmM9ejFiNyZlPTE5MjgmYj04ODc0NjA5MjYmZD1jNW42bzJu.d7kzlHRNv3D5lKDMB_OYNYVmSeYe5WuISV03YscnGXU) Thank you, NH Senate Republicans
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
# N.H. business tax revenues’ stunning surge
January 10, 2022
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| New Hampshire’s booming economy continues to fill state coffers with excess cash drawn from business taxation, with impressive numbers posted each month. But a longer look back illustrates the stunning sums businesses have contributed to the state budget in the past decade. From Fiscal Year 2012 through Fiscal Year 2021, business tax revenues exceeded budget projections by $649.6 million — or 100.1 percentage points. That is, over that time businesses gave legislators an additional $649.6 million to spend beyond what lawmakers had budgeted. Imagine if, over a decade, your largest source of income came in at double what you had budgeted for it. That’s what happened to state business tax revenues from FY 2012-2021. State Fiscal Year 2022 began last July, and so far the trend continues. Since the start of the fiscal year in July, business tax revenues are $109.5 million (27.9%) above the prior fiscal year and $72.7 million (16.9%) above budget. Add this to the total from FY 2012-2021, and business tax revenues have come in over budget by $722.3 million since FY 2012. To get an idea of just how much larger state business tax revenues are today, consider that in FY 2012, Business Profits Tax revenue from July-December totaled $140.5 million. Adjusted for inflation, that $140.5 million would be approximately $166 million in 2021. Actual BPT revenues for July-December of 2021, however, were a record $381.2 million — 240.7 million (171%) higher than in 2012. Combined BPT and BET revenues in the first six months of FY 2012 were $231.7 million. In the first six months of FY 2022, they were $501.8 million, a 216.5% increase. The historical context shows that state is playing with house money, so to speak, when it comes to business tax revenues. It shows further that additional small reductions to business tax rates are not only affordable, but fully justified. The state has taken in nearly 3/4 of a billion dollars in unanticipated business tax revenue since 2012. Claims that tiny rate reductions will bankrupt the state or devastate essential services are laughably unfounded.
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Business tax rate reductions that began in the 2016 fiscal year did not cause business tax revenue to fall below previous levels, as critics had predicted. Then-Gov. Maggie Hassan said the rate cuts would reduce business tax revenue by $90 million. Instead, business tax revenues were $132.8 million (23.4%) above plan in FY 2016. From FY 2012-2021, business tax revenues came in below budget for the year only twice: in 2014 (before the start of the business tax cuts) and in 2020 (when businesses were hit by the pandemic). The huge gains in other years more than made up for those relatively small declines (2% and 13%, respectively). Businesses in New Hampshire have fed the state budget astonishing sums over the last decade. Yet every time anyone suggests slight reductions in corporate tax rates, advocates of higher taxes attack businesses as greedy, selfish, avaricious, even unpatriotic. In truth, New Hampshire employers have enabled the state’s ever growing social welfare spending, and most have remained in New Hampshire despite the lure of lower corporate tax rates in other states. They should be thanked for their contributions, not vilified. Adjusting their rates to let them keep a little more of their income would be a reasonable way to say thank you.

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: More money, more problems

body:
Reminder, it’s only January.
#
Derek, Republicans are waging a multi-million dollar cash war to straight-up buy Pennsylvania’s open U.S. Senate seat + destroy our Democratic majority.
**And now the GOP candidates finally pulled ahead of us, spending more than we’ve raised.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42150?refcode=ema20220129-4381&t=1&akid=4381%2E434096%2ESlyfCZ)
**Look, we can’t let the GOP buy Pennsylvania in 2022. Not when CNN ranks PA the #1 Most Likely to Flip State.**
**_There’s really only one way to keep up with this Republican spending frenzy._ We need you and our other grassroots supporters to help John Fetterman go dollar-for-dollar with our ultra-rich GOP opponents. **
**[That’s why we have to ask, Derek: Can you chip in a donation to support John right now? Our power comes from lots of people giving what they can afford, so anything you can give right now helps us fight back.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42150?refcode=ema20220129-4381&t=2&akid=4381%2E434096%2ESlyfCZ)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42150?refcode=em20220129-4381&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4381%2E434096%2ESlyfCZ)**
Make no mistake: Republican candidates like Dr. Oz and David McCormick are in this race for themselves and their rich GOP buddies, NOT working people in the Commonwealth.
When they see the way John Fetterman rolls — supporting a ban on Congressional stock trading, raising money for striking workers, and bringing together people from all over to create one of the largest grassroots-funded campaigns in state history — they see a major threat to the status quo, and they’re willing to spend anything to shut it down.
There’s only one way to make sure we have what it takes to win: We need to out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign our GOP competitors. **That means we need your help today, Derek.**
**[If you can, please chip in $5 or more today to help us fight back against the GOP spending $17 MILLION and counting in Pennsylvania. John’s not taking a single cent from corporate PACs, so it really comes down to folks like you.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42150?refcode=ema20220129-4381&t=22&akid=4381%2E434096%2ESlyfCZ)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you. 🙏
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220129-4381-footer&t=23&refcode2=4381_434096_SlyfCZ&akid=4381%2E434096%2ESlyfCZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4381%2E434096%2ESlyfCZ)

body:

Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

The Left-wing Democrats and their SNOBBY ELITIST donors on the coast are HOPING Patriots, like YOU, have ABANDONED our Party. This is our chance to show them that America First Patriots NATIONWIDE are READY to TAKE TRUMP’S MAJORITY BACK. Your support is SO crucial to our success that we are INCREASING your match from ~~9X~~ to 10X. We have an exclusive 10X-MATCH waiting for you. All you have to do is contribute toward our End-of-Month goal, and you’ll automatically qualify for your 10X-MATCH. This might be your ONLY CHANCE to claim your 10X-MATCH offer before the deadline. Don’t wait. Thank you, National Republican Senatorial Committee If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. subject: Why I’m Running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MjAzMjYyODA3MTg1OTIyJmM9YjNrOCZlPTAmYj04ODc0NzU3MTYmZD14NGQ2ZTd6.lpBo0vwWEUPIqSFlQbJhN39pMcgvUerQWLYM3kaBhHs)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MjAzMjYyODA3MTg1OTIyJmM9YjNrOCZlPTAmYj04ODc0NzU3MTkmZD13M2I1ZDNr.umLIKrOpnBvY56z4n_hphnlDFKmzEJLMp63D8aueT-Y)
---
| | | Friend, ****
This morning I made a **_HUGE_ **campaign announcement.
I am officially running for the United States Senate to represent the 603 in Washington. _**Here is why I am running:**_ It’s simple... I was able to live the American Dream - the New Hampshire dream - here in this great state. I worked multiple jobs just to make ends meet before finding success and running a small business. As soon as I could, I wanted to give back to the community that helped me fulfill my dreams. I did that by running for public office, and I’ve been working with my colleagues in the Senate to make common-sense conservative improvements in the lives of the great, hard-working people of the 603. **But now, we need someone who will bring that same fighting spirit to the U.S. Senate, and represent New Hampshire in Washington - not the other way around.** **_[We can make this happen together...](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MjAzMjYyODA3MTg1OTIyJmM9YjNrOCZlPTAmYj04ODc0NzU3MjImZD1mM20zYTlw.MP1wX9ScYCX_8oCwMqUBpMIHN6FHLgzBjpK6nzjCJ_c)_** I am going to bring the same commitment to our economy, to working families, to freedom, and to preserving the American Dream that we’ve shown in the Granite State. We have to replace the career politicians that are trying to destroy our country. **That’s why I’m not standing on the sidelines -****[and you don’t have to either.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MjAzMjYyODA3MTg1OTIyJmM9YjNrOCZlPTAmYj04ODc0NzU3MjUmZD1yMmsxczR3.cLvxbDuMYkP7d40lEZGng1prMagkrjTPsO2z3ip6VPE)** Let me know if you’re on board by clicking the button below.

---
| |
---
| | [603 NOT DC! JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MjAzMjYyODA3MTg1OTIyJmM9YjNrOCZlPTAmYj04ODc0NzU3MzEmZD1tOXA4ZjRz.O2emz1Si-SePs4U6rhhullhc6iwFgdM1Fd_g3QBu5Kc)
---
---
| | | Thank you!

-_Chuck Morse
_ _
__**P.S. With an open Supreme Court seat hanging in the balance, we have to do everything we can to stop a radical activist from being confirmed in the U.S. Senate. Can you rush in $20.22 to show the Radical Left you won’t go down without a fight in 2022?****[CLICK HERE TO CONTRIBUTE!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc0MjAzMjYyODA3MTg1OTIyJmM9YjNrOCZlPTAmYj04ODc0NzU3MzQmZD13N2Y0eTVu.obD6DNl50uG95E4AasTGdtshrR20N0Ijs6bxO2dAvYE)**_____

Friend,

What would YOU do if someone called you a liar, and questioned your integrity? **You would fight back against the lies!**

Nancy Pelosi tried to steal the election in 2020, and accused me of not being the candidate who the good people of Iowa rightly voted to represent them. That’s pretty desperate if you ask me. **The worst part? She is trying to do it again.**
| [**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT TO STOP NANCY PELOSI**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=1a3188eefd2044c2aee3636f97492870&_e=hMF3ujbEDszCXu4beLwfj6eEvKNYyTt6pfjHHdAAF1lb3ZSzMjNEJBfsokR-d5tiRSvCOoZNl8-tkCMZRQxZEv57NWzpoUSpZAss11sY2olEYhLmFS32DrQxyoBwlhjN_uzRXqQ3BpVsNJKI-HWxsXZsJHQhZ5Eb4RFf-1noG8S5sU_6d_33X5QDSi5HsaRpWirxmHWSD58q5Z_eu3GPbtrvoO4DY1Jd-qrL8AtIPQ8W_ciXOzE5V9g7_ml2zjAflLa1LvSOLAQM9nch7uUwRhLByhbe8s8MtDp2dBMUPNdAXXz9X5JYEnQ8hQB5ty7VofmYbMjJGAzfTvDkE9RyiuDfPxO2QMMyg9gwSSqdLB3NmjOWFx_rRsVQ4enurdZNOkMnuJhpebfwIPy7HZIF73Q0UbiIk_oLR8Id6w2wfWsQMOtGG_zxe7o9fG1PjaGK9DIOO6qAO05IPmAizXNk9iapi4k94XMcBE8ZTDNESqPYJr0xMyx06sQ3_k7Cc87XnNb8aySgQmkRc49XvL3L2jT3557RdXXr0FB1YHnuSSE%3D)
---

The Radical Left knows for a FACT that this election will cost them the House in 2022, and **they are pulling out all of the stops to fight back.**

"WALKER AT 49% AND WARNOCK AT 48%"

"THE POLL PEGGED WALKER AT 47% AND WARNOCK AT 44%, WITHIN THE MARGIN OF ERROR" _

We've got our work cut out for us, and we need your help. Honestly, in case you didn't see the news, our opponent reported more than **$23 MILLION DOLLARS** in the bank TEN MONTHS before election day.

Did you see the news earlier this month?

Inflation hit a 40-year high in December – sending the cost of living through the roof and wiping out real wage gains. At the same time, the supply-chain crisis has resulted in shortages, delays, and empty store shelves.

The American people are hurting thanks to Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda...

We can’t let up in our fight to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE AND SENATE this November!

name: Republican Veteran Update
subject: This American hero needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Peter, Col. Mike Waltz put his life on the line fighting terrorists as a Green Beret in Afghanistan.

**Now, he’s taking his mission to defend American values to Congress, but he needs your help.**

Hey Peter, If you aren’t yet enraged at what Gov. Ron DeSantis and Republicans are doing in this state legislative session around reproductive freedom, our public schools, and voting rights, just wait until you hear this. DeSantis and Republicans are now pushing a bill that would expressly prohibit any discussion of sexual orientation or gender in Florida public schools. You read that right. _They are trying to pass a law that says you can’t say the word gay. _ Not only is this bill completely offensive and ridiculous – it is also completely unwarranted. And the thing that really burns my biscuits, that really frustrates the hell out of me, is that this is only done to get Donald Trump and the Republican base worked up into a frenzy. Folks, this is an attack on people just like you and me, the LGBTQ+ community, and children all across our state. We simply have to fight back. **[Can you help me fight this bill with a contribution right away and pitch in today to support our movement? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41212285/327822522/1060557856?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2JlOGM3Ni01ZjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KrOe-4wGHAiJ7KFGFi6zzxUgOuZCqQcT6WVeDUJrKw=)** I would much rather be working on the real problems people are facing. We’re in a pandemic. We have an affordable housing crisis. We have an environmental crisis that's happening directly in my district and that has not been addressed - because we are dealing with BS like this. I was elected to the state legislature to represent the people and work for solutions that make a real difference in their lives. That’s why I’m running for Congress, and that’s why I need your help today.If you’re like me, you are completely fed up with the Republican’s playbook. Not only are they wasting people’s time, but this bill is harmful to people. It’s harmful to our children. And we’ve got to stop it.
